010101.english: The book of the generation of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.
010101.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎧᏃᎮᎭ ᏧᏁᏢᏔᏅᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ.
010101.phonetic: Hi-a go-we-li ka-no-he-ha tsu-ne-tlv-ta-nv-sv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, De-wi u-we-tsi, E-qua-ha-mi u-we-tsi.

010102.english: Abraham begat Isaac; and Isaac begat Jacob; and Jacob begat Judas and his brethren;
010102.cherokee: ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎡᏏᎩ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎡᏏᎩᏃ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ, ᏤᎦᏈᏃ ᏧᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎬᏩᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010102.phonetic: E-qua-ha-mi E-si-gi u-de-ne-le-i; E-si-gi-no Tse-ga-qui u-de-ne-le-i, Tse-ga-qui-no Tsu-da a-le na-s-gi a-na-da-nv-tli gv-wa-de-ne-le-i;

010103.english: And Judas begat Phares and Zara of Thamar; and Phares begat Esrom; and Esrom begat Aram;
010103.cherokee: ᏧᏓᏃ ᏇᎵᏏ ᎠᎴ ᏎᎳ ᎬᏩᏕᏁᎴᎢ ᏖᎹ ᏚᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎢ; ᏇᎵᏏᏃ ᎢᏏᎳᎻ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎢᏏᎳᎻᏃ ᎡᎵᎻ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010103.phonetic: Tsu-da-no Que-li-si a-le Se-la gv-wa-de-ne-le-i Te-ma du-na-nu-go-wi-se-i; Que-li-si-no I-si-la-mi u-de-ne-le-i; I-si-la-mi-no E-li-mi u-de-ne-le-i;

010104.english: And Aram begat Aminadab; and Aminadab begat Naasson; and Naasson begat Salmon;
010104.cherokee: ᎡᎵᎻᏃ ᎡᎻᏂᏓᏈ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎡᎻᏂᏓᏈᏃ ᎾᏐᏂ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎾᏐᏂᏃ ᏌᎵᎹ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010104.phonetic: E-li-mi-no E-mi-ni-da-qui u-de-ne-le-i; E-mi-ni-da-qui-no Na-so-ni u-de-ne-le-i; Na-so-ni-no Sa-li-ma u-de-ne-le-i;

010105.english: And Salmon begat Booz of Rachab; and Booz begat Obed of Ruth; and Obed begat Jesse;
010105.cherokee: ᏌᎵᎹᏃ ᏉᏏ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ ᎴᎭᏫ ᎤᎾᎸᎪᏫᏎᎢ; ᏉᏏᏃ ᎣᏇᏗ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ ᎷᏏ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎢ; ᎣᏇᏗᏃ ᏤᏏ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010105.phonetic: Sa-li-ma-no Quo-si u-de-ne-le-i Le-ha-wi u-na-lv-go-wi-se-i; Quo-si-no O-que-di u-de-ne-le-i Lu-si u-na-nu-go-wi-se-i; O-que-di-no Tse-si u-de-ne-le-i;

010106.english: And Jesse begat David the king; and David the king begat Solomon of her that had been the wife of Urias;
010106.cherokee: ᏤᏏᏃ ᏕᏫ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᏕᏫᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏐᎵᎹᏅ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ ᏳᎳᏯ ᎤᏓᏴᏛ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎢ;
010106.phonetic: Tse-si-no De-wi u-gv-wi-yu-hi u-de-ne-le-i; De-wi-no u-gv-wi-yu-hi So-li-ma-nv u-de-ne-le-i Yu-la-ya u-da-yv-dv u-na-nu-go-wi-se-i;

010107.english: And Solomon begat Roboam; and Roboam begat Abia; and Abia begat Asa;
010107.cherokee: ᏐᎵᎹᏅᏃ ᎶᏉᎹ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎶᏉᎹᏃ ᎡᏆᏯ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎡᏆᏯᏃ ᎡᏏ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010107.phonetic: So-li-ma-nv-no Lo-quo-ma u-de-ne-le-i; Lo-quo-ma-no E-qua-ya u-de-ne-le-i; E-qua-ya-no E-si u-de-ne-le-i;

010108.english: And Asa begat Josaphat; and Josaphat begat Joram; and Joram begat Ozias;
010108.cherokee: ᎡᏏᏃ ᏦᏏᏆ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ.  ᏦᏏᏆᏃ ᏦᎳᎻ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᏦᎳᎻᏃ ᎣᏌᏯ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010108.phonetic: E-si-no Tso-si-qua u-de-ne-le-i.  Tso-si-qua-no Tso-la-mi u-de-ne-le-i; Tso-la-mi-no O-sa-ya u-de-ne-le-i;

010109.english: And Ozias begat Joatham; and Joatham begat Achaz; and Achaz begat Ezekias;
010109.cherokee: ᎣᏌᏯᏃ ᏦᏓᎻ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᏦᏓᎻᏃ ᎡᎭᏏ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎡᎭᏏᏃ ᎮᏏᎦᏯ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010109.phonetic: O-sa-ya-no Tso-da-mi u-de-ne-le-i; Tso-da-mi-no E-ha-si u-de-ne-le-i; E-ha-si-no He-si-ga-ya u-de-ne-le-i;

010110.english: And Ezekias begat Manasses; and Manasses begat Amon; and Amon begat Josias;
010110.cherokee: ᎮᏏᎦᏯᏃ ᎹᎾᏏ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎹᎾᏏᏃ ᎠᎼᏂ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎠᎼᏂᏃ ᏦᏌᏯ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010110.phonetic: He-si-ga-ya-no Ma-na-si u-de-ne-le-i; Ma-na-si-no A-mo-ni u-de-ne-le-i; A-mo-ni-no Tso-sa-ya u-de-ne-le-i;

010111.english: And Josias begat Jechonias and his brethren, about the time they were carried away to Babylon:
010111.cherokee: ᏦᏌᏯᏃ ᏤᎪᎾᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎬᏩᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎾᎯᏳ ᏓᏗᎶᏂ ᏥᏫᏗᎨᎦᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁᎢ;
010111.phonetic: Tso-sa-ya-no Tse-go-na-ya a-le a-na-da-nv-tli gv-wa-de-ne-le-i; na-hi-yu Da-di-lo-ni tsi-wi-di-ge-ga-ti-nv-s-ta-ne-i;

010112.english: And after they were brought to Babylon, Jechonias begat Salathiel; and Salathiel begat Zorobabel;
010112.cherokee: ᏓᏗᎶᏂᏃ ᏫᏗᎨᎦᏘᏃᎸ ᏤᎪᎾᏯ ᏌᎳᏓᏱᎵ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᏌᎳᏓᏱᎵᏃ ᏥᎳᏇᎵ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010112.phonetic: Da-di-lo-ni-no wi-di-ge-ga-ti-no-lv Tse-go-na-ya Sa-la-da-yi-li u-de-ne-le-i; Sa-la-da-yi-li-no Tsi-la-que-li u-de-ne-le-i;

010113.english: And Zorobabel begat Abiud; and Abiud begat Eliakim; and Eliakim begat Azor;
010113.cherokee: ᏥᎳᏇᎵᏃ ᎠᏆᏯᏗ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᏆᏯᏗᏃ ᎢᎳᏯᎩᎻ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎢᎳᏯᎩᎻᏃ ᎡᏐ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010113.phonetic: Tsi-la-que-li-no A-qua-ya-di u-de-ne-le-i, A-qua-ya-di-no I-la-ya-gi-mi u-de-ne-le-i; I-la-ya-gi-mi-no E-so u-de-ne-le-i;

010114.english: And Azor begat Sadoc; and Sadoc begat Achim; and Achim begat Eliud;
010114.cherokee: ᎡᏐᏃ ᏎᏙᎩ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᏎᏙᎩᏃ ᎡᎩᎻ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎡᎩᎻᏃ ᎢᎳᏯᏗ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010114.phonetic: E-so-no Se-do-gi u-de-ne-le-i; Se-do-gi-no E-gi-mi u-de-ne-le-i; E-gi-mi-no I-la-ya-di u-de-ne-le-i;

010115.english: And Eliud begat Eleazar; and Eleazar begat Matthan; and Matthan begat Jacob;
010115.cherokee: ᎢᎳᏯᏗᏃ ᎢᎵᎡᏌ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎢᎵᎡᏌᏃ ᎹᏓᏂ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ; ᎹᏓᏂᏃ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ;
010115.phonetic: I-la-ya-di-no I-li-e-sa u-de-ne-le-i; I-li-e-sa-no Ma-da-ni u-de-ne-le-i; Ma-da-ni-no Tse-ga-qui u-de-ne-le-i;

010116.english: And Jacob begat Joseph the husband of Mary, of whom was born Jesus, who is called Christ.
010116.cherokee: ᏤᎦᏈᏃ ᏦᏩ ᎤᏕᏁᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎺᎵ ᎤᏰᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏣᏃᎭᎰᎢ.
010116.phonetic: Tse-ga-qui-no Tso-wa u-de-ne-le-i, na-s-gi Me-li u-ye-hi na-s-gi tsu-na-nu-go-wi-se Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv tsa-no-ha-ho-i.

010117.english: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations; and from David until the carrying away into Babylon are fourteen generations; and from the carrying away into Babylon unto Christ are fourteen generations.
010117.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᎾᏓᏁᏟᏴᏒ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏤᎮ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏕᏫᏃ ᏤᎮ ᏅᏛᏍᏘ ᏂᎦᏚ ᏄᎾᏓᏁᏟᏴᏎᎢ; ᏕᏫᏃ ᏤᎮ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏅᎵᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏓᏗᎶᏂᏃ ᏥᏫᏗᎨᎦᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏅᏛᏍᏘ ᏂᎦᏚ ᏄᎾᏓᏁᏟᏴᏎᎢ; ᏓᏗᎶᏂᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᏫᏗᎨᎦᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁ ᎤᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᏌᏃ ᏧᏕᏁ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏅᏛᏍᏘ ᏂᎦᏚ ᏄᎾᏓᏁᏟᏴᏎᎢ.
010117.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ni-ga-dv nu-na-da-ne-tli-yv-sv E-qua-ha-mi tse-he na-hi-yu nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv De-wi-no tse-he nv-dv-s-ti ni-ga-du nu-na-da-ne-tli-yv-se-i; De-wi-no tse-he na-hi-yu nv-li-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv Da-di-lo-ni-no tsi-wi-di-ge-ga-ti-nv-s-ta-ne na-hi-yu nv-dv-s-ti ni-ga-du nu-na-da-ne-tli-yv-se-i; Da-di-lo-ni-no na-hi-yu tsi-wi-di-ge-ga-ti-nv-s-ta-ne u-da-yu-da-le-nv-dv Tsi-sa-no tsu-de-ne na-hi-yu nv-dv-s-ti ni-ga-du nu-na-da-ne-tli-yv-se-i.

010118.english: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was on this wise: When as his mother Mary was espoused to Joseph, before they came together, she was found with child of the Holy Ghost.
010118.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎴ ᎤᏕᏅ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎺᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏥ ᏦᏩ ᎤᏓᏴᏍᏗ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᏂᏓᎾᏤᎬᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏁᎵᏤ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ.
010118.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-le u-de-nv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.  Na-s-gi Me-li Tsi-sa u-tsi Tso-wa u-da-yv-s-di, a-si-quo ni-da-na-tse-gv-na ge-se-i, u-ne-li-tse Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do u-da-nv-te-lv-hi.

010119.english: Then Joseph her husband, being a just man, and not willing to make her a publick example, was minded to put her away privily.
010119.cherokee: ᏦᏩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᎾᏨᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎤᏕᎵᏛᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏮᏓᏥᏯᎧᏂ, ᎤᏪᎵᏎᎢ.
010119.phonetic: Tso-wa na-s-gi na tsu-na-tsv-s-di u-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv i-yu-s-di, a-le nu-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di gv-ni-ge-sv u-de-ho-hi-s-do-di-yi, u-de-li-dv-quo i-yv-dv wv-da-tsi-ya-ka-ni, u-we-li-se-i.

010120.english: But while he thought on these things, behold, the angel of the Lord appeared unto him in a dream, saying, Joseph, thou son of David, fear not to take unto thee Mary thy wife: for that which is conceived in her is of the Holy Ghost.
010120.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏅᏏᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏛᏁᎴ ᎠᏍᎩᏓᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ; ᏦᏩ, ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏍᎦᎸ ᎯᏯᏅᏗᏱ ᎺᎵ ᏣᏓᏴᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ Ꮎ ᏥᎦᏁᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ;
010120.phonetic: A-se-no a-si-quo hi-a na-s-gi nu-s-de-a-da-nv-te-s-ge-i, gv-ni-yu-quo di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi Yi-ho-wa u-nv-si-dv gv-ni-ge-sv nu-dv-ne-le a-s-gi-da-s-gv-i, hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i; Tso-wa, De-wi u-we-tsi, tle-s-di tsa-s-ga-lv hi-ya-nv-di-yi Me-li tsa-da-yv-s-di, na-s-gi-ye-no na tsi-ga-ne-li Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do u-da-nv-te-lv-hi;

010121.english: And she shall bring forth a son, and thou shalt call his name JESUS: for he shall save his people from their sins.
010121.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏓᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏏ ᎠᏧᏣ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏌ ᏕᎯᏲᎥᎭ, ᏧᏤᎵᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏙᏛᏍᏕᎸᎯ ᏙᏓᎫᏓᎴᏏ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
010121.phonetic: A-le da-ga-na-nu-go-wi-si a-tsu-tsa, na-s-gi-no Tsi-Sa de-hi-yo-v-ha, tsu-tse-li-ye-no yv-wi do-dv-s-de-lv-hi do-da-gu-da-le-si u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

010122.english: Now all this was done, that it might be fulfilled which was spoken of the Lord by the prophet, saying,
010122.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎸᏒᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
010122.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-ga-di-yu nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-le u-do-hi-yu-di-yi a-ye-lv-sv-i hi-a tsi-nu-we-se Yi-ho-wa a-do-le-ho-s-gi a-gv-di-s-gv-i;

010123.english: Behold, a virgin shall be with child, and shall bring forth a son, and they shall call his name Emmanuel, which being interpreted is, God with us.
010123.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏛ ᎾᏥᏰᎲᎾ ᎦᏁᎵᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏏ ᎠᏧᏣ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᎹᏄᎡᎵ ᎠᏃᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎦᏛᎦ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎨᎳᏗᏙᎭ.
010123.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo a-dv na-tsi-ye-hv-na ga-ne-li-dv ge-se-s-di, a-le da-ga-na-nu-go-wi-si a-tsu-tsa, na-s-gi-no I-ma-nu-e-li a-no-se-he-s-di, na-s-gi a-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi ge-sv hi-a nu-s-di ga-dv-ga, U-ne-la-nv-hi i-ge-la-di-do-ha.

010124.english: Then Joseph being raised from sleep did as the angel of the Lord had bidden him, and took unto him his wife:
010124.cherokee: ᏦᏩᏃ ᎤᏰᏨ ᎤᎸᏅᎢ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏅᏓᏳᏅᏏᏛ ᏄᏪᏎᎸ ᏄᏛᏁᎴᎢ, ᎤᏯᏅᎨᏉ ᎤᏓᏴᏍᏗ.
010124.phonetic: Tso-wa-no u-ye-tsv u-lv-nv-i di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi Yi-ho-wa nv-da-yu-nv-si-dv nu-we-se-lv nu-dv-ne-le-i, u-ya-nv-ge-quo u-da-yv-s-di.

010125.english: And knew her not till she had brought forth her firstborn son: and he called his name JESUS.
010125.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎦᏙᎥᏎᎢ ᎬᏂ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏧᏣ, ᏥᏌᏃ ᏑᏬᎡᎢ.
010125.phonetic: A-le v-tla yu-ga-do-v-se-i gv-ni u-na-nu-go-wi-sv i-gv-yi e-hi u-we-tsi a-tsu-tsa, Tsi-sa-no su-wo-e-i.

010201.english: Now when Jesus was born in Bethlehem of Judaea in the days of Herod the king, behold, there came wise men from the east to Jerusalem,
010201.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏕᏅ ᎦᏚᏱ ᎦᏚᎲ ᏧᏗᏱ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏤᎮ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎤᏂᎷᏤ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ ᏅᏙ ᏗᎧᎸᎬ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏧᏂᎶᏎᎢ,
010201.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-de-nv Ga-du-yi ga-du-hv Tsu-di-yi, na-hi-yu tse-he E-lo-dv u-gv-wi-yu-hi, gv-ni-yu-quo u-ni-lu-tse Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ni-ga-ta-hna-i nv-do di-ka-lv-gv i-di-tlv tsu-ni-lo-se-i,

010202.english: Saying, Where is he that is born King of the Jews? for we have seen his star in the east, and are come to worship him.
010202.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎭᏢ Ꮎ ᏧᏕᏅ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ, ᎣᎩᎪᎲᏰᏃ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏃᏈᏏ ᏗᎧᎸᎬ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵᎦ.
010202.phonetic: Hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; ha-tlv na tsu-de-nv U-gv-wi-yu-hi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga, o-gi-go-hv-ye-no u-tse-li no-qui-si di-ka-lv-gv i-di-tlv, a-le o-tsa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-li-ga.

010203.english: When Herod the king had heard these things, he was troubled, and all Jerusalem with him.
010203.cherokee: ᎡᎶᏛᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏓᏕᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏁᎯ.
010203.phonetic: E-lo-dv-no u-gv-wi-yu-hi u-dv-ga-nv na-s-gi, u-we-li-hi-s-di u-da-nv-da-de-i, a-le ni-ga-dv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ne-hi.

010204.english: And when he had gathered all the chief priests and scribes of the people together, he demanded of them where Christ should be born.
010204.cherokee: ᏚᎳᏫᏛᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᏗᏃᏪᎳᏁᎯ, ᏚᏛᏛᏁᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏕᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
010204.phonetic: Du-la-wi-dv-no ni-ga-dv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv a-ne-lo-hi, a-le yv-wi di-no-we-la-ne-hi, du-dv-dv-ne-i, na-hna u-de-di ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv.

010205.english: And they said unto him, In Bethlehem of Judaea: for thus it is written by the prophet,
010205.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏧᏗᏱ ᎦᏚᏱ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏄᏩᏅ ᎤᏬᏪᎳ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ;
010205.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i; Tsu-di-yi Ga-du-yi ga-du-hv-i; hi-a-ye-no nu-wa-nv u-wo-we-la a-do-le-ho-s-gi;

010206.english: And thou Bethlehem, in the land of Juda, art not the least among the princes of Juda: for out of thee shall come a Governor, that shall rule my people Israel.
010206.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎦᏚᏱ ᎦᏚᎲ ᏧᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂ ᏣᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᏱᎩ, ᏥᎶᏓᏑᏯ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏧᏗᏱ, ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᏓᏣᏄᎪᏥ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎢᏏᎵ-ᏗᎧᏁᏤᎯ.
010206.phonetic: A-le ni-hi Ga-du-yi ga-du-hv Tsu-di-yi, v-tla-s-gi-ni tsa-s-di-ka-ni yi-gi, tsi-lo-da-su-ya nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv Tsu-di-yi, ni-hi-ye-no da-tsa-nu-go-tsi di-qua-tse-li yv-wi I-si-li--di-ka-ne-tse-hi.

010207.english: Then Herod, when he had privily called the wise men, inquired of them diligently what time the star appeared.
010207.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᏚᏛᏘᏌᏁ ᎢᏳᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏃᏈᏏ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏨᎢ.
010207.phonetic: Hna-quo-no E-lo-dv u-de-li-dv wi-du-ya-nv-hv na-s-gi a-ni-ga-ta-hna-i, o-s-dv du-dv-ti-sa-ne i-yu-quo na-s-gi no-qui-si u-na-nu-go-tsv-i.

010208.english: And he sent them to Bethlehem, and said, Go and search diligently for the young child; and when ye have found him, bring me word again, that I may come and worship him also.
010208.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏚᏅᏎ ᎦᏚᏱ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎢᏤᎾ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏪᏥᏲᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎠᏲᎵ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎡᏥᏩᏛᎲᎭ, ᎢᏍᎩᏃᏁᎵᎸᎭ, ᎠᏴᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏫᏥᎷᏨᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎭ.
010208.phonetic: A-le du-nv-se Ga-du-yi, hi-a nu-we-se-i; I-tse-na o-s-dv we-tsi-yo-ga na-s-gi u-s-di a-yo-li, i-yu-no e-tsi-wa-dv-hv-ha, i-s-gi-no-ne-li-lv-ha, a-yv-no na-s-quo wi-tsi-lu-tsv-ha, a-le tsi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-lv-ha.

010209.english: When they had heard the king, they departed; and, lo, the star, which they saw in the east, went before them, till it came and stood over where the young child was.
010209.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏃᏁᎸᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎾᏂᎩᏎᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᏃᏈᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎪᎲᎯ ᏗᎧᎸᎬ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᏁᏅᎡᎴᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᏭᎷᏥᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎴᏫᏍᏔᏅ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏢ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏥᎵ ᎡᎲᎢ.
010209.phonetic: U-na-dv-ga-no-ne-lv-no u-gv-wi-yu-hi u-na-ni-gi-se-i, gv-ni-yu-quo-no no-qui-si, na-s-gi u-ni-go-hv-hi di-ka-lv-gv i-di-tlv, i-gv-yi u-ne-nv-e-le-i, gv-ni wu-lu-tsi-lv a-le u-le-wi-s-ta-nv ga-lv-la-di-tlv na-hna a-tsi-li e-hv-i.

010210.english: When they saw the star, they rejoiced with exceeding great joy.

010211.english: And when they were come into the house, they saw the young child with Mary his mother, and fell down, and worshipped him: and when they had opened their treasures, they presented unto him gifts; gold, and frankincense, and myrrh.
010211.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏁᎸᏃ ᎤᏂᏴᎸ ᎤᏂᎪᎮ ᎠᏲᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ ᎺᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏁᎢ, ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏂᎳᏅᏛ ᏚᏂᏍᏚᎢᏒ ᎤᏂᏁᎸᏁ ᏅᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏓᎶᏂᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎦᎾᏍᏛ ᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎠᏜᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎻᎳ.
010211.phonetic: A-da-ne-lv-no u-ni-yv-lv u-ni-go-he a-yo-tla a-le u-tsi Me-li, a-le e-la-di du-na-da-nv-ne-i, u-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-le-i, a-le tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-ni-la-nv-dv du-ni-s-du-i-sv u-ni-ne-lv-ne nv-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi, a-de-lv--da-lo-ni-dv, a-le u-ga-na-s-dv ga-wa-sv-gi a-dla, a-le mi-la.

010212.english: And being warned of God in a dream that they should not return to Herod, they departed into their own country another way.
010212.cherokee: ᎠᎾᏍᎩᏓᏍᎬᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏁᏤᎸ ᎡᎶᏛᏱ ᏭᏂᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎤᎾᏂᎩᏒ ᎤᏣᏘᏂᏉ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏭᏂᎶᏎ ᎢᎤᏁᏅ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
010212.phonetic: A-na-s-gi-da-s-gv-no U-ne-la-nv-hi du-ne-tse-lv E-lo-dv-yi wu-ni-lo-hi-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, u-na-ni-gi-sv u-tsa-ti-ni-quo i-di-tlv wu-ni-lo-se i-u-ne-nv u-na-tse-li-go-hi.

010213.english: And when they were departed, behold, the angel of the Lord appeareth to Joseph in a dream, saying, Arise, and take the young child and his mother, and flee into Egypt, and be thou there until I bring thee word: for Herod will seek the young child to destroy him.
010213.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏂᎩᏒᏃ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏅᏏᏛ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏛᏁᎴ ᏦᏩ ᎠᏍᎩᏓᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏔᎴᎲᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᏘᏄᎦ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ ᎠᎴ ᎭᎵᏘ, ᎢᏥᏈ ᏫᎶᎯ, ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᏪᎮᏍᏗ ᎬᏂ ᏫᎬᏁᏤᎸᎭ, ᎡᎶᏛᏰᏃ ᎠᏎ ᏛᏲᎵ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎤᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
010213.phonetic: U-na-ni-gi-sv-no gv-ni-yu-quo di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi u-nv-si-dv Yi-ho-wa gv-ni-ge-sv nu-dv-ne-le Tso-wa a-s-gi-da-s-gv-i, hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ta-le-hv-ga, a-le ta-ti-nu-ga a-yo-li a-le u-tsi a-le ha-li-ti, I-tsi-qui wi-lo-hi, na-hna-no we-he-s-di gv-ni wi-gv-ne-tse-lv-ha, E-lo-dv-ye-no a-se dv-yo-li u-s-di a-yo-li u-hi-s-di-yi.

010214.english: When he arose, he took the young child and his mother by night, and departed into Egypt:
010214.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏚᎴᏅ ᎤᏘᏅᏎ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ ᏒᏃᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏛᏱ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ.
010214.phonetic: Hna-quo-no du-le-nv u-ti-nv-se a-yo-li a-le u-tsi sv-no-yi, a-le I-tsi-dv-yi wu-lo-se-i.

010215.english: And was there until the death of Herod: that it might be fulfilled which was spoken of the Lord by the prophet, saying, Out of Egypt have I called my son.
010215.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᏪᎮ ᎬᏂ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ, ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏧᏮᏔᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎢᏥᏈᏱ ᏫᏥᏯᏅᎲ ᎠᏇᏥ.
010215.phonetic: A-le na-hna we-he gv-ni E-lo-dv u-yo-hu-sv; u-do-hi-yu-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-tsv-i, a-do-le-ho-s-gi tsu-wv-ta-ne-i, hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-i; I-tsi-qui-yi wi-tsi-ya-nv-hv a-que-tsi.

010216.english: Then Herod, when he saw that he was mocked of the wise men, was exceeding wroth, and sent forth, and slew all the children that were in Bethlehem, and in all the coasts thereof, from two years old and under, according to the time which he had diligently inquired of the wise men.
010216.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ ᎬᏩᎵᏓᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏎ ᏫᏚᏂᎰᏁ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᎦᏚᏱ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ, ᏔᎵ ᎢᏳᎾᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᏩᏍᏘ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᏓᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᏥᏓᏛᏛᎮᎸᎥᏍᎨ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ.
010216.phonetic: Hna-quo-no E-lo-dv u-do-le-ho-sv a-ni-ga-ta-hna-i gv-wa-li-da-s-ta-nv-i, u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-ta-la-wo-se-i, a-le u-da-nv-se wi-du-ni-ho-ne ni-ga-dv di-ni-yo-li ga-du-yi a-ne-hi, a-le ni-ga-dv ni-gv-na-dv na-hna-ni, ta-li i-yu-na-de-ti-yv-dv wa-s-ti, na-hi-yu nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-dv tsi-da-li-si-na-hi-s-da-ne-he tsi-da-dv-dv-he-lv-v-s-ge a-ni-ga-ta-hna-i.

010217.english: Then was fulfilled that which was spoken by Jeremy the prophet, saying,
010217.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏁ ᏤᎵᎹᏯ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏨᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎢ;
010217.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-do-hi-yu-ne Tse-li-ma-ya a-do-le-ho-s-gi u-ne-tsv-hi, a-le tsi-nu-we-se-i;

010218.english: In Rama was there a voice heard, lamentation, and weeping, and great mourning, Rachel weeping for her children, and would not be comforted, because they are not.
010218.cherokee: ᎴᎹᏱ ᎧᏁᎬ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎩ, ᏓᏂᏴᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏠᏱᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏁᎷᎬᎢ; ᎴᏥᎵ ᏓᏍᎪᏂᎲ ᏧᏪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏄᏬᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏁᎲᎾᏉ ᎨᏒᎢ.
010218.phonetic: Le-ma-yi ka-ne-gv u-na-dv-ga-nv-gi, da-ni-yv-gv-i, a-le da-na-tlo-yi-hv-i, a-le u-tsa-ti u-ne-lu-gv-i; le-tsi-li da-s-go-ni-hv tsu-we-tsi, a-le nu-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv u-nu-wo-hi-s-di-yi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv na-ne-hv-na-quo ge-sv-i.

010219.english: But when Herod was dead, behold, an angel of the Lord appeareth in a dream to Joseph in Egypt,
010219.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏛᏁᎴ ᏦᏩ ᎠᏍᎩᏓᏍᎬ ᎢᏥᏈᏱ,
010219.phonetic: Hna-quo-no E-lo-dv u-yo-hu-sv, gv-ni-yu-quo di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi Yi-ho-wa u-tse-li-ga gv-ni-ge-sv nu-dv-ne-le Tso-wa a-s-gi-da-s-gv I-tsi-qui-yi,

010220.english: Saying, Arise, and take the young child and his mother, and go into the land of Israel: for they are dead which sought the young child's life.
010220.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏔᎴᎲᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎭᏘᏄᎦ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎮᎾ ᎢᏏᎵᏱ, ᎿᎭᏉᏰᏃ ᏚᏂᏲᎱᏒ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎬᏅ ᏧᏂᏲᎲᎩ.
010220.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ta-le-hv-ga a-le ha-ti-nu-ga a-yo-li a-le u-tsi, a-le he-na I-si-li-yi, hna-quo-ye-no du-ni-yo-hu-sv a-yo-li gv-nv tsu-ni-yo-hv-gi.

010221.english: And he arose, and took the young child and his mother, and came into the land of Israel.
010221.cherokee: ᏚᎴᏅᏃ ᎤᏘᏅᏎ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏏᎵᏱ ᏭᎷᏤᎢ.
010221.phonetic: Du-le-nv-no u-ti-nv-se a-yo-li a-le u-tsi, a-le I-si-li-yi wu-lu-tse-i.

010222.english: But when he heard that Archelaus did reign in Judaea in the room of his father Herod, he was afraid to go thither: notwithstanding, being warned of God in a dream, he turned aside into the parts of Galilee:
010222.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎠᏥᎳ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏗᏱ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᏓᏁᏟᏴᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎤᏍᎦᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᏭᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏯᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏍᎩᏓᏍᎬᎢ, ᎨᎵᎵ ᏭᎪᎸᏍᏔᏁᎢ;
010222.phonetic: A-se-no u-dv-ga-nv A-tsi-la u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv Tsu-di-yi u-do-da E-lo-dv u-da-ne-tli-yv-s-da-ne-lv-i, u-s-ga-le na-hna wu-lo-hi-s-di-yi; a-se-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-we-ya-ta-nv-hi ge-sv a-s-gi-da-s-gv-i, Ge-li-li wu-go-lv-s-ta-ne-i;

010223.english: And he came and dwelt in a city called Nazareth: that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the prophets, He shall be called a Nazarene.
010223.cherokee: ᎦᏚᎲᏃ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᏭᎷᏨ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᎮᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏁ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏁᏤᎢ, ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎠᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᏧᎾᏛᏁᎢ.
010223.phonetic: Ga-du-hv-no Na-se-li-di tsu-do-i-dv wu-lu-tsv na-hna e-he-i.  Na-s-gi-no u-do-hi-yu-ne a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi tsu-ni-ne-tse-i, Na-se-li-di e-hi a-go-se-he-s-di, tsu-na-dv-ne-i.

010301.english: In those days came John the Baptist, preaching in the wilderness of Judaea,
010301.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᎷᏤ ᏣᏂ ᏗᏓᏬᏍᎩ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨ ᎢᎾᎨ ᏧᏗᏱ,
010301.phonetic: Na-hi-yu u-lu-tse Tsa-ni Di-da-wo-s-gi a-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge i-na-ge Tsu-di-yi,

010302.english: And saying, Repent ye: for the kingdom of heaven is at hand.
010302.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ; ᏗᏥᏁᏟᏴᎾ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏍᎦᏂᏳ ᏓᏯᎢ.
010302.phonetic: Hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i; Di-tsi-ne-tli-yv-na de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, hna-quo-ye-no ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv e-s-ga-ni-yu da-ya-i.

010303.english: For this is he that was spoken of by the prophet Esaias, saying, The voice of one crying in the wilderness, Prepare ye the way of the Lord, make his paths straight.
010303.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ Ꮎ ᏥᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎢᏌᏯ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ; ᎤᏪᎷᎦ ᎩᎶ ᎢᎾᎨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ; ᎣᏍᏛ ᏂᏨᎦ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏚᏅᏅ ᏗᏥᏥᏃᎯᏍᏓ.
010303.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a na tsi-ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge a-do-le-ho-s-gi I-sa-ya, hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-s-ge-i; U-we-lu-ga gi-lo i-na-ge-i, hi-a ni-ga-we-ha; O-s-dv ni-tsv-ga Yi-ho-wa u-lo-hi-s-di-yi, du-nv-nv di-tsi-tsi-no-hi-s-da.

010304.english: And the same John had his raiment of camel's hair, and a leathern girdle about his loins; and his meat was locusts and wild honey.
010304.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏣᏂ ᎤᏄᏪ ᎨᎻᎵ ᎤᏍᏘᏰᏅᎯ, ᎦᏃᏥᏃ ᎤᏓᏠᏍᏕᎢ, ᎤᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏃ ᎥᎴ ᎨᏎ ᎢᎾᎨᏃ ᎡᎯ ᏩᏚᎵᏏ.
010304.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a Tsa-ni u-nu-we ge-mi-li u-s-ti-ye-nv-hi, ga-no-tsi-no u-da-tlo-s-de-i, u-li-s-da-yv-di-no v-le ge-se i-na-ge-no e-hi wa-du-li-si.

010305.english: Then went out to him Jerusalem, and all Judaea, and all the region round about Jordan,
010305.cherokee: ᎾᏉᏃ ᏫᎬᏩᎷᏤᎴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏅᎾᏛ ᏦᏓᏂ,
010305.phonetic: Na-quo-no wi-gv-wa-lu-tse-le Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-le ni-ga-dv Tsu-di-yi, a-le ni-ga-dv na-nv-na-dv Tso-da-ni,

010306.english: And were baptized of him in Jordan, confessing their sins.

010307.english: But when he saw many of the Pharisees and Sadducees come to his baptism, he said unto them, O generation of vipers, who hath warned you to flee from the wrath to come?
010307.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏚᎪᎲ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏌᏚᏏ ᎠᏂᎷᎬ ᏓᏓᏬᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᎭᎴᎢ; Ᏺ! ᎢᎾᏛ ᏧᏁᏥ ᏂᎯ! ᎦᎪ ᎢᏤᏯᏔᏅ ᎡᏣᎵᎡᏗᏱ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᏨᏣᎢ?
010307.phonetic: A-se-no du-go-hv u-ni-tsa-ti A-ni-qua-li-si a-le A-ni-sa-du-si a-ni-lu-gv da-da-wo-s-gv-i, hi-a ni-du-we-ha-le-i; Yo! i-na-dv tsu-ne-tsi ni-hi! Ga-go i-tse-ya-ta-nv e-tsa-li-e-di-yi u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di tsv-tsa-i?

010308.english: Bring forth therefore fruits meet for repentance:

010309.english: And think not to say within yourselves, We have Abraham to our father: for I say unto you, that God is able of these stones to raise up children unto Abraham.
010309.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏝᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᏲᏥᏪᏏ ᎢᏤᎵᏒᎩ ᏙᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ; ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎣᎩᏙᏓ; ᎢᏨᏲᏎᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏯ ᏱᏕᎬᏓ ᏱᏕᎪᏢᎾ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏧᏪᏥ.
010309.phonetic: A-le tla-s-di hi-a nv-da-yo-tsi-we-si i-tse-li-sv-gi do-di-tsa-da-nv-dv-i; E-qua-ha-mi o-gi-do-da; i-tsv-yo-se-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi ye-li-quo hi-a nv-ya yi-de-gv-da yi-de-go-tlv-na E-qua-ha-mi tsu-we-tsi.

010310.english: And now also the axe is laid unto the root of the trees: therefore every tree which bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire.
010310.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎦᎷᏯᏍᏗ ᎠᎭ ᏚᎿᎭᏍᏕᏢ ᏕᏡᎬᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏕᏡᎬ ᎠᏃᏍᏛ ᎾᎾᏓᏛᏍᎬᎾ ᏗᎦᎴᏴᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸᏱ ᏫᏓᏗᏅᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
010310.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo ga-yu-la ga-lu-ya-s-di a-ha du-hna-s-de-tlv de-tlu-gv-i; na-s-gi-no ni-ga-dv de-tlu-gv a-no-s-dv na-na-da-dv-s-gv-na di-ga-le-yv-s-do-di a-le a-tsi-lv-yi wi-da-di-nv-di ge-se-s-di.

010311.english: I indeed baptize you with water unto repentance: but he that cometh after me is mightier than I, whose shoes I am not worthy to bear: he shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost, and with fire:
010311.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᎹ ᏕᏨᏯᏬᏍᏗᎭ ᏗᏥᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏂ ᏨᏓᏯᎢ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎠᏴ, ᏧᎳᏑᎶ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏱᏂᎪᎢ ᏗᎩᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ ᏙᏓᏣᏬᏍᏔᏂ.
010311.phonetic: A-yv u-do-hi-yu-hi a-ma de-tsv-ya-wo-s-di-ha di-tsi-ne-tli-yv-s-di-yi de-tsa-da-nv-dv u-gv-wa-li; a-se-no na-s-gi na o-ni tsv-da-ya-i u-tli-hi-yu u-li-ni-gi-di-yu e-s-ga-quo a-yv, tsu-la-su-lo v-tla ye-li yi-ni-go-i di-gi-ni-da-s-di-yi; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do a-le a-tsi-lv do-da-tsa-wo-s-ta-ni.

010312.english: Whose fan is in his hand, and he will throughly purge his floor, and gather his wheat into the garner; but he will burn up the chaff with unquenchable fire.
010312.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎳᏐᏫᏍᏗ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᏰᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᎦᎳᏐᏫᏏ, ᎤᏤᎵᏃ ᎤᎦᏔᏔᏅᎯ ᏓᎦᏟᏌᏂ ᏛᏂ ᎠᏓᎾᏅᏗᏱ ᎤᏘᏴᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏛᎪᎲᏍᏔᏂ ᏂᎬᏠᏍᎬᎾ ᎠᏥᎸᏱ.
010312.phonetic: Na-s-gi ga-la-so-wi-s-di u-tse-li-ga a-ye-ha, a-le ni-ga-dv da-ga-la-so-wi-si, u-tse-li-no u-ga-ta-ta-nv-hi da-ga-tli-sa-ni dv-ni a-da-na-nv-di-yi u-ti-yv-hi-s-gi-ni dv-go-hv-s-ta-ni ni-gv-tlo-s-gv-na a-tsi-lv-yi.

010313.english: Then cometh Jesus from Galilee to Jordan unto John, to be baptized of him.
010313.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏧᎶᏎᎢ, ᏦᏓᏂ ᎤᎷᏤ ᏣᏂ ᎡᏙᎲᎢ ᎠᎦᏬᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏰᎸᏎᎢ.
010313.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa Ge-li-li tsu-lo-se-i, Tso-da-ni u-lu-tse Tsa-ni e-do-hv-i a-ga-wo-s-di-yi u-ye-lv-se-i.

010314.english: But John forbad him, saying, I have need to be baptized of thee, and comest thou to me?
010314.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏣᏂ ᏚᏢᏫᏎᎴᏉ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᏱᏍᏆᏬᎥ; ᏥᎪᏃ ᎢᏍᎩᎷᏤᎭ?
010314.phonetic: A-se-no Tsa-ni du-tlv-wi-se-le-quo, hi-a nu-we-se-i; A-yv-s-gi-ni yi-s-qua-wo-v; tsi-go-no i-s-gi-lu-tse-ha?

010315.english: And Jesus answering said unto him, Suffer it to be so now: for thus it becometh us to fulfill all righteousness. Then he suffered him.
010315.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏧᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎮᎳ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎩᏂᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎩᎳ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎤᏪᎵᏎᎴᎢ.
010315.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no tsu-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; U-ne-la-gi he-la go-hi ge-sv-i, o-si-yu-ye-no na-s-gi i-gi-na-dv-ne-di-yi gi-ni-s-qua-di-s-di-yi ni-ga-v du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i.  Gi-la u-ne-la-gi u-we-li-se-le-i.

010316.english: And Jesus, when he was baptized, went up straightway out of the water: and, lo, the heavens were opened unto him, and he saw the Spirit of God descending like a dove, and lighting upon him:
010316.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎠᎦᏬᎥ, ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᎿᎭᎷᏎᎢ, ᎠᎹᏱ ᎤᏓᏅᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏣᏥᏍᏚᎩᎡᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᎪᎮ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏅᏧᏛᎿᎭᏗᏎ ᎫᎴ-ᏗᏍᎪᏂᎯ ᏗᏤᎵᏛ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏯᎸᏤᎢ.
010316.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no a-ga-wo-v, gi-la-quo i-yv-dv u-hna-lu-se-i, a-ma-yi u-da-nv-se-i, a-le gv-ni-yu-quo ga-lv-la-di tsa-tsi-s-du-gi-e-le-i, a-le wu-go-he U-ne-la-nv-hi U-da-nv-do e-la-di nv-tsu-dv-hna-di-se gu-le--di-s-go-ni-hi di-tse-li-dv; a-le u-we-ya-lv-tse-i.

010317.english: And lo a voice from heaven, saying, This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.
010317.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏧᏪᏎ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ; ᎯᎠ ᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎠᏇᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏥᏥᏰᎸᎠ.
010317.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo hi-a nv-tsu-we-se ga-lv-la-di; Hi-a tsi-ge-yu-i A-que-tsi, na-s-gi o-si-yu tsi-tsi-ye-lv-a.

010401.english: Then was Jesus led up of the Spirit into the wilderness to be tempted of the devil.
010401.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᎾᎨ ᏭᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎸᏎᎢ.
010401.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-da-nv-do i-na-ge wu-ti-nv-s-ta-ne Tsi-sa, a-s-gi-na u-go-li-ye-di-yi a-ye-lv-se-i.

010402.english: And when he had fasted forty days and forty nights, he was afterward an hungred.
010402.cherokee: ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯᏃ ᏧᏙᏓᏆᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᏧᏒᎯᏛ ᎠᎹᏟ ᎤᏩᏅ ᎩᎳ ᎤᏲᏏᏌᏁᎢ
010402.phonetic: Nv-ga-s-go-hi-no tsu-do-da-qua-dv a-le nv-ga-s-go-hi tsu-sv-hi-dv a-ma-tli u-wa-nv gi-la u-yo-si-sa-ne-i

010403.english: And when the tempter came to him, he said, If thou be the Son of God, command that these stones be made bread.
010403.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᎤᎷᏤᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᏅᏯ ᎦᏚ ᎤᎾᏙᏢᏗᏱ ᎯᏁᎩ.
010403.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-go-li-ye-s-gi u-lu-tse-lv hi-a nu-we-se-i; I-yu-no ni-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi ge-se-s-di, hi-a nv-ya ga-du u-na-do-tlv-di-yi hi-ne-gi.

010404.english: But he answered and said, It is written, Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of God.
010404.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ, ᏴᏫ ᎥᏝ ᎦᏚᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏱᎬᎿᎭᏗᏍᏗ, ᏂᎦᎥᏍᎩᏂ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎰᎵ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᏄᎪᏨᎯ.
010404.phonetic: A-se-no u-ne-tsv, hi-a nu-we-se-i; Hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-la, yv-wi v-tla ga-du-quo u-wa-sv yi-gv-hna-di-s-di, ni-ga-v-s-gi-ni ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ho-li nv-da-yu-na-nu-go-tsv-hi.

010405.english: Then the devil taketh him up into the holy city, and setteth him on a pinnacle of the temple,
010405.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏗᎦᏚᎲ ᏭᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᎩᎸᏔᏁ ᎤᏍᎪᎵ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ;
010405.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-s-gi-na ga-lv-quo-di-yu di-ga-du-hv wu-ti-nv-s-ta-ne-i, a-le wu-gi-lv-ta-ne u-s-go-li u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi;

010406.english: And saith unto him, If thou be the Son of God, cast thyself down: for it is written, He shall give his angels charge concerning thee: and in their hands they shall bear thee up, lest at any time thou dash thy foot against a stone.
010406.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎭᏓᎶᎥᏓ ᏨᏒ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎪᏪᎳ; ᎠᏎ ᏙᏓᎧᏁᏤᎵ ᎫᏤᎵ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏂᏌ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏃᏰᏂ ᎨᏣᏌᎳᏙᏕᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏅᏲᎯ ᏣᎾᏍᏆᎶᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
010406.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le-i; I-yu-no ni-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi ge-se-s-di, ha-da-lo-v-da tsv-sv; hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv i-go-we-la; A-se do-da-ka-ne-tse-li gu-tse-li di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ni-sa ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, a-le tsu-no-ye-ni ge-tsa-sa-la-do-de-s-di na-s-gi i-lv-hi-yu nv-yo-hi tsa-na-s-qua-lo-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

010407.english: Jesus said unto him, It is written again, Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God.
010407.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎪᏪᎳ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎯᎪᎵᏰᎥᎩ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
010407.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Hi-a na-s-quo ni-gv-nv i-go-we-la; Tle-s-di hi-go-li-ye-v-gi Yi-ho-wa Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi.

010408.english: Again, the devil taketh him up into an exceeding high mountain, and sheweth him all the kingdoms of the world, and the glory of them;
010408.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏆᎴ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏅ-ᎢᎦᏘ ᎣᏓᎸ ᏫᎤᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏎᎮᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏕᎪᏢᏩᏗᏒ ᎡᎳᏂᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏚᏬᏚᏒᎢ;
010408.phonetic: Hna-qua-le a-s-gi-na u-tsa-ti i-nv--i-ga-ti o-da-lv wi-u-ti-nv-s-ta-ne-i, a-le du-se-he-le ni-ga-v a-ye-li de-go-tlv-wa-di-sv e-la-ni-gv-i, a-le na-s-gi ni-du-wo-du-sv-i;

010409.english: And saith unto him, All these things will I give thee, if thou wilt fall down and worship me.
010409.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏱᏕᎬᏲᎯᏏ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏣᏓᏅᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏍᏆᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ.
010409.phonetic: A-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Hi-a ni-ga-dv yi-de-gv-yo-hi-si, i-yu-no yi-tsa-da-nv-nv, a-le yi-s-qua-da-do-li-s-da-ne-lv.

010410.english: Then saith Jesus unto him, Get thee hence, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship the Lord thy God, and him only shalt thou serve.
010410.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎤᏟ ᏫᎶᎯ, ᏎᏓᏂ, ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎪᏪᎳ; ᎠᏎ ᎯᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ ᏕᎯᏯᏁᎶᏕᏍᏗ.
010410.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; U-tli wi-lo-hi, Se-da-ni, hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv i-go-we-la; a-se hi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-he-s-di Yi-ho-wa Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le na-s-gi-quo u-wa-sv-hi-yu de-hi-ya-ne-lo-de-s-di.

010411.english: Then the devil leaveth him, and, behold, angels came and ministered unto him.
010411.cherokee: ᎩᎳᏃ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᏓᏅᎡᎴᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏕᎸᎯᏙᎴᎢ.
010411.phonetic: Gi-la-no a-s-gi-na u-da-nv-e-le-i, gv-ni-yu-quo-no di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi u-ni-lu-tse-i, a-le gv-wa-s-de-lv-hi-do-le-i.

010412.english: Now when Jesus had heard that John was cast into prison, he departed into Galilee;
010412.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᏣᏂ ᎠᏥᏍᏚᎲᎢ, ᎨᎵᎵ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ.
010412.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-dv-ga-nv Tsa-ni a-tsi-s-du-hv-i, Ge-li-li wu-lo-se-i.

010413.english: And leaving Nazareth, he came and dwelt in Capernaum, which is upon the sea coast, in the borders of Zabulon and Nephthalim:
010413.cherokee: ᎾᏎᎵᏗᏃ ᎤᏓᏅᏒ ᎨᏆᏂ ᎨᎷᏤ ᎾᎿᎭᏭᏕᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏓᎵ ᎠᎹᏳᎶᏗ ᏥᎦᏚᎭ, ᏤᏆᎳᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏁᏩᏔᎵ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎪᎯ,
010413.phonetic: Na-se-li-di-no u-da-nv-sv ge-qua-ni ge-lu-tse na-hna wu-de-ne-i, na-s-gi v-da-li a-ma-yu-lo-di tsi-ga-du-ha, Tse-qua-la-ni a-le Ne-wa-ta-li u-na-tse-li-go-hi,

010414.english: That it might be fulfilled which was spoken by Esaias the prophet, saying,
010414.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎢᏌᏯ ᏧᏁᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎢ;
010414.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-di-yi a-do-le-ho-s-gi I-sa-ya tsu-ne-tse-i, hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-i;

010415.english: The land of Zabulon, and the land of Nephthalim, by the way of the sea, beyond Jordan, Galilee of the Gentiles;
010415.cherokee: ᏤᏆᎳᏂ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎪᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏁᏩᏔᎵ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎪᎯ, ᎢᏓᎵ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᏦᏓᏂ ᎤᏗᏗᏢ, ᎨᎵᎵ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏂᏁᎸᎢ,
010415.phonetic: Tse-qua-la-ni u-na-tse-li-go-hi, a-le Ne-wa-ta-li u-na-tse-li-go-hi, i-da-li i-di-tlv, Tso-da-ni u-di-di-tlv, Ge-li-li Tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi da-ni-ne-lv-i,

010416.english: The people which sat in darkness saw great light; and to them which sat in the region and shadow of death light is sprung up.
010416.cherokee: ᏴᏫ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᏣᏂᏅᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ ᎤᏂᎪᎲ, ᎾᏃ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏩᏗᏍᎬ ᏣᏂᏅᎩ, ᎢᎦᎦᏘ ᎤᏂᎾᏄᎪᏤᎸ.
010416.phonetic: Yv-wi u-li-si-gv tsa-ni-nv-gi u-tsa-ti i-ga-ga-ti u-ni-go-hv, na-no a-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi ge-sv u-tse-li-go-hi a-le u-da-wa-di-s-gv tsa-ni-nv-gi, i-ga-ga-ti u-ni-na-nu-go-tse-lv.

010417.english: From that time Jesus began to preach, and to say, Repent: for the kingdom of heaven is at hand.
010417.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ; ᏗᏥᏁᏟᏴᎾ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏍᎦᏂᏳ ᏓᏯᎢ.
010417.phonetic: Na-hi-yu Tsi-sa u-le-nv-he a-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge-i, hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i; di-tsi-ne-tli-yv-na de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, hna-quo-ye-no ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv e-s-ga-ni-yu da-ya-i.

010418.english: And Jesus, walking by the sea of Galilee, saw two brethren, Simon called Peter, and Andrew his brother, casting a net into the sea: for they were fishers.
010418.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎠᎢᏒ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎥᏓᎷᎶᏗ ᏚᎪᎮ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ, ᏌᏩᏂ ᏈᏓ ᏣᏃᏎᎰᎢ ᎤᏅᏟᏃ ᎡᏂᏗ, ᎥᏓᎵ ᎠᏂᎦᏯᎷᎥᏍᎨᎢ-ᎠᏂᎦᏯᎷᎥᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎨᏎᎢ.
010418.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no a-i-sv Ge-li-li v-da-lu-lo-di du-go-he a-ni-ta-li a-na-li-nv-tli, Sa-wa-ni Qui-da tsa-no-se-ho-i u-nv-tli-no E-ni-di, v-da-li a-ni-ga-ya-lu-v-s-ge-i--a-ni-ga-ya-lu-v-s-gi-ye-no ge-se-i.

010419.english: And he saith unto them, Follow me, and I will make you fishers of men.
010419.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏍᎩᏂᏍᏓᏩᏚᎦ, ᏴᏫᏃ ᎢᏍᏗᎦᏯᎷᎥᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏍᏛᏴᏁᎵ.
010419.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i; S-gi-ni-s-da-wa-du-ga, yv-wi-no i-s-di-ga-ya-lu-v-s-gi nv-da-s-dv-yv-ne-li.

010420.english: And they straightway left their nets, and followed him.
010420.cherokee: ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏚᏂᏲᏎ ᏗᎦᏯᎷᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎᎢ.
010420.phonetic: Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv du-ni-yo-se di-ga-ya-lu-di a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-se-i.

010421.english: And going on from thence, he saw other two brethren, James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother, in a ship with Zebedee their father, mending their nets; and he called them.
010421.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᏫᎤᏪᏅ, ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᏚᎪᎮᎢ, ᏥᎻ ᏤᏈᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏅᏟᏃ ᏣᏂ, ᏤᏈᏗ ᎤᏂᏙᏓ ᏥᏳᎯ ᎤᎾᏣᎡᎢ, ᏓᏃᏢᎯᏏᏍᎨ ᏧᏂᎦᏯᎷᏗ; ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎮᏃ.
010421.phonetic: Na-hna-no wi-u-we-nv, a-ni-ta-li nv-wa-na-da-le a-na-li-nv-tli du-go-he-i, Tsi-mi Tse-qui-di u-we-tsi u-nv-tli-no Tsa-ni, tse-qui-di u-ni-do-da tsi-yu-hi u-na-tsa-e-i, da-no-tlv-hi-si-s-ge tsu-ni-ga-ya-lu-di; wi-du-ya-nv-he-no.

010422.english: And they immediately left the ship and their father, and followed him.
010422.cherokee: ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏚᏂᏲᏎ ᏥᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎᎢ.
010422.phonetic: Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv du-ni-yo-se tsi-yu a-le u-ni-do-da, a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-se-i.

010423.english: And Jesus went about all Galilee, teaching in their synagogues, and preaching the gospel of the kingdom, and healing all manner of sickness and all manner of disease among the people.
010423.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎡᏙᎮᎢ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎨ ᏧᏂᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎧᏅᏫᏍᎨ ᏧᎵᎴᏅᏛ ᏚᏂᏢᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎥᏳᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏁᎲᎢ.
010423.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no ni-gv-na-dv Ge-li-li e-do-he-i da-de-yo-hv-s-ge tsu-ni-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le a-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv ka-no-he-s-ge-i, a-le de-ka-nv-wi-s-ge tsu-li-le-nv-dv du-ni-tlv-gv-i, a-le tsu-da-le-nv-dv v-yu-gi yv-wi u-ne-hv-i.

010424.english: And his fame went throughout all Syria: and they brought unto him all sick people that were taken with divers diseases and torments, and those which were possessed with devils, and those which were lunatick, and those that had the palsy; and he healed them.
010424.cherokee: ᏕᎦᏃᏣᎸᏃ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᏏᎵᏱ ᎤᏰᎵᏎᎢ; ᏕᎬᏩᏘᏃᎮᎴᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏂᏢᎩ, ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎥᏳᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏱᎵᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏯᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᏂᎸᏃᏘᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏍᎩ; ᏚᏅᏩᏁᏃ.
010424.phonetic: De-ga-no-tsa-lv-no ni-gv-na-dv Si-li-yi u-ye-li-se-i; de-gv-wa-ti-no-he-le-no ni-ga-dv tsu-ni-tlv-gi, tsu-da-le-nv-dv v-yu-gi a-le e-hi-s-di u-ni-yi-li-do-hi, a-le na-s-quo a-ni-s-gi-na di-gv-wa-ni-ya-i, a-le na-s-quo tsu-ni-lv-no-ti-s-gi, a-le na-s-quo tsu-ni-na-wi-s-gi; du-nv-wa-ne-no.

010425.english: And there followed him great multitudes of people from Galilee, and from Decapolis, and from Jerusalem, and from Judaea, and from beyond Jordan.
010425.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎᎢ ᏅᏓᏳᏂᎶᏒᎯ ᎨᎵᎵ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏃ-ᎦᏚᎩᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏦᏓᏂ ᏍᎪᏂᏗᏢ.
010425.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti-no yv-wi gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-se-i nv-da-yu-ni-lo-sv-hi ge-li-li, A-s-go-hi-no--Ga-du-gi-yi, a-le Tsi-lu-si-li-mi, a-le Tsu-di-yi, a-le Tso-da-ni s-go-ni-di-tlv.

010501.english: And seeing the multitudes, he went up into a mountain: and when he was set, his disciples came unto him:
010501.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᏫᏚᎪᎲ ᎤᏌᎯᎸ ᎤᎿᎭᎷᏎᎢ, ᎤᏪᏅᏃ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎴᎢ.
010501.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti-no wi-du-go-hv u-sa-hi-lv u-hna-lu-se-i, u-we-nv-no gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi gv-wa-lu-tse-le-i.

010502.english: And he opened his mouth, and taught them, saying,

010503.english: Blessed are the poor in spirit: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
010503.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ; ᎤᎾᏤᎵᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
010503.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi du-na-da-nv-dv-i; u-na-tse-li-ye-no ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

010504.english: Blessed are they that mourn: for they shall be comforted.

010505.english: Blessed are the meek: for they shall inherit the earth.
010505.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ, ᎦᏙᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ.
010505.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di u-na-da-nv-ti, ga-do-hi-ye-no u-na-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di.

010506.english: Blessed are they which do hunger and thirst after righteousness: for they shall be filled.
010506.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᏂᏲᏏᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏔᏕᎩᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᏛᎨᏥᎧᎵᎵᏰᏃ.
010506.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di u-ni-yo-si-s-gi a-le u-ni-ta-de-gi-s-gi u-na-da-nv-ti i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi; dv-ge-tsi-ka-li-li-ye-no.

010507.english: Blessed are the merciful: for they shall obtain mercy.

010508.english: Blessed are the pure in heart: for they shall see God.
010508.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏧᏓᏅᎦᎸᏛ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗ;
010508.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di tsu-da-nv-ga-lv-dv tsu-ni-na-wi, U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-ni-go-wa-dv-di;

010509.english: Blessed are the peacemakers: for they shall be called the children of God.
010509.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᏃᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏛᎨᎪᏎᎵ.
010509.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di a-no-hi-s-di-s-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no tsu-we-tsi dv-ge-go-se-li.

010510.english: Blessed are they which are persecuted for righteousness' sake: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
010510.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᏲ ᎢᎨᎬᎾᏕᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᏍᏛᏗᏍᎩ, ᎤᎾᏤᎵᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
010510.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di u-yo i-ge-gv-na-de-gi du-yu-go-dv ge-sv u-ni-s-dv-di-s-gi, u-na-tse-li-ye-no ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

010511.english: Blessed are ye, when men shall revile you, and persecute you, and shall say all manner of evil against you falsely, for my sake.
010511.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏐᏅ ᏂᎨᏥᏪᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏂᎨᏨᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏐᏅ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎨᏥᏃᎮᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏍᏛᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
010511.phonetic: O-si-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di i-yu-no yv-wi u-so-nv ni-ge-tsi-we-se-he-s-di a-le u-yo ni-ge-tsv-ne-he-s-di, a-le ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-so-nv ga-ye-go-gi ge-tsi-no-he-s-ge-s-di a-yv ge-sv i-tsi-s-dv-di-s-ge-s-di.

010512.english: Rejoice, and be exceeding glad: for great is your reward in heaven: for so persecuted they the prophets which were before you.
010512.cherokee: ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ, ᎤᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏰᏃ ᎤᏥ ᏂᏚᏅᏁᎸᎩ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏥᏂᎨᏤᏅᎡᎸ.
010512.phonetic: I-tsa-li-he-li-ge-s-di a-le u-tsa-ta-nv-hi o-s-dv i-tsa-da-nv-te-s-di, u-tsa-ti-ye-no e-tsa-gu-yv-e-di ga-lv-la-di; na-s-gi-ya-ye-no u-tsi ni-du-nv-ne-lv-gi a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi i-gv-yi tsi-ni-ge-tse-nv-e-lv.

010513.english: Ye are the salt of the earth: but if the salt have lost his savour, wherewith shall it be salted? it is thenceforth good for nothing, but to be cast out, and to be trodden under foot of men.
010513.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎠᎹ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎹ ᏳᏥᏍᎪᎸ ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎠᎹ ᏯᏙᏢᎾ; ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏱᎦᎩ, ᎠᏗᏅᏗᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎤᎾᎳᏍᏓᎡᏗ.
010513.phonetic: Ni-hi a-ma e-lo-hi u-tse-li-ga; i-yu-s-gi-ni a-ma yu-tsi-s-go-lv ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da a-ma ya-do-tlv-na; v-tla hna-quo go-hu-s-di gv-do-di yi-ga-gi, a-di-nv-di-quo u-wa-sv, a-le yv-wi-quo u-na-la-s-da-e-di.

010514.english: Ye are the light of the world. A city that is set on an hill cannot be hid.
010514.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎢᏣᏘᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ.  ᎦᏚᎲ ᎤᏌᎯᎸ ᏥᎦᎧᎰᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏴᎦᏰᎬᏍᎦᎸᎦ.
010514.phonetic: Ni-hi i-ga i-tsa-ti-s-di-s-gi e-lo-hi.  Ga-du-hv u-sa-hi-lv tsi-ga-ka-ho-i v-tla ye-li yv-ga-ye-gv-s-ga-lv-ga.

010515.english: Neither do men light a candle, and put it under a bushel, but on a candlestick; and it giveth light unto all that are in the house.
010515.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᏨᏍᏛᎦ ᎠᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏟᎶᏍᏗ ᏯᏄᏢᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎦᎪᏗᏱᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏂᎧᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎢᎦᏃ ᎤᎾᏘᏍᏓᏁᎰ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎦᎵᏦᏕ ᎠᏂᏯᎢ.
010515.phonetic: V-tla a-le yv-wi a-ni-tsv-s-dv-ga a-tsv-s-do-di a-tli-lo-s-di ya-nu-tlv-di-s-go-i, ga-go-di-yi-s-gi-ni a-ni-ka-hv-s-go-i, i-ga-no u-na-ti-s-da-ne-ho ni-ga-dv ga-li-tso-de a-ni-ya-i.

010516.english: Let your light so shine before men, that they may see your good works, and glorify your Father which is in heaven.
010516.cherokee: ᎢᎦ ᎢᏣᏘᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏚᏂᎸᏌᏓᏕᎮᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ.
010516.phonetic: I-ga i-tsa-ti-s-di-s-gv du-ni-lv-sa-da-de-he-s-di yv-wi, na-s-gi-no o-s-dv de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv a-ni-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di, a-le a-ni-lv-quo-di-s-ge-s-di I-tsi-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi.

010517.english: Think not that I am come to destroy the law, or the prophets: I am not come to destroy, but to fulfill.
010517.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏚᏲᏍᏔᏂᎸ ᏱᏍᎩᏰᎵᏎᎮᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂ ᏱᏓᎩᏲᏍᏔᏂᎸ, ᏓᎩᎧᎵᎵᎸᏍᎩᏂ.
010517.phonetic: Tle-s-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi du-yo-s-ta-ni-lv yi-s-gi-ye-li-se-he-s-di; v-tla-s-gi-ni yi-da-gi-yo-s-ta-ni-lv, da-gi-ka-li-li-lv-s-gi-ni.

010518.english: For verily I say unto you, Till heaven and earth pass, one jot or one tittle shall in no wise pass from the law, till all be fulfilled.
010518.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎬᏂ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏂᎶᏐᏅᎭ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏌᏉ ᏭᏍᏗᎬ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎦᎶᎯ ᎬᏂ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎠᎧᎵᏨᎭ.
010518.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya-ye-no hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, gv-ni ga-lv-lo-i a-le e-lo-hi a-ni-lo-so-nv-ha sa-quo u-s-di a-le sa-quo wu-s-di-gv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di v-tla yv-ga-lo-hi gv-ni ni-ga-di-yu a-ka-li-tsv-ha.

010519.english: Whosoever therefore shall break one of these least commandments, and shall teach men so, he shall be called the least in the kingdom of heaven: but whosoever shall do and teach them, the same shall be called great in the kingdom of heaven.
010519.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏲᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏌᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᎤᎵᏁᏨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᏕᎨᏲᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᎠᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᏓᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
010519.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gi-lo a-yo-s-di-s-ge-s-di sa-quo hi-a u-s-di-ka-ni u-li-ne-tsv-i, a-le na-s-gi nu-s-de-s-di yv-wi de-ge-yo-hv-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi u-s-di-ka-ni a-go-se-he-s-di ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i; gi-lo-s-gi-ni da-ka-hna-wa-de-ge-s-di, a-le na-s-gi nu-s-de-s-di da-de-yo-hv-s-ge-s-di, ga-lv-quo-di-yu a-go-se-he-s-di ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

010520.english: For I say unto you, That except your righteousness shall exceed the righteousness of the scribes and Pharisees, ye shall in no case enter into the kingdom of heaven.
010520.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎢᏨᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏘ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏗᏥᎪᎾᏛᏔᏅᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ, ᎥᏝ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏴᎨᏥᏴᎭ.
010520.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-tsv-we-se-ha, i-tsv-no na-s-gi i-tsa-da-nv-ti ge-sv ni-di-tsi-go-na-dv-ta-nv-na i-ge-se-s-di di-no-we-li-s-gi a-le A-ni-qua-li-si, v-tla ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv yv-ge-tsi-yv-ha.

010521.english: Ye have heard that it was said by them of old time, Thou shalt not kill; and whosoever shall kill shall be in danger of the judgment:
010521.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎢᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎨᏥᏪᏎᎴ ᎡᏘ ᏣᏁᎮᎢ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᎸᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏓᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏄᎪᏗᏍᎩᏱ.
010521.phonetic: I-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi i-gi hi-a tsi-ni-ge-tsi-we-se-le e-ti tsa-ne-he-i; Tle-s-di tsa-da-lv-gi; a-le gi-lo a-da-hi-he-s-di gv-wa-s-dv-di-s-di ge-se-s-di di-nu-go-di-s-gi-yi.

010522.english: But I say unto you, That whosoever is angry with his brother without a cause shall be in danger of the judgment: and whosoever shall say to his brother, Raca, shall be in danger of the council: but whosoever shall say, Thou fool, shall be in danger of hell fire.
010522.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎩᎶ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎠᏍᎦᎨᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎬᏩᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏄᎪᏗᏍᎩᏱ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᏂᏣᏓᏅᏛᎾ ᎢᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᏕᎦᎳᏫᎥ ᎬᏩᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᏣᏁᎫ ᎢᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᎬᏩᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏨᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏥᎸᏱ.
010522.phonetic: A-se-no a-yv hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Gi-lo di-na-da-nv-tli a-s-ga-ge-s-di go-hu-s-di nu-s-dv-di-s-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di, gv-wa-s-dv-di-s-di ge-se-s-di di-nu-go-di-s-gi-yi; gi-lo-no di-na-da-nv-tli Ni-tsa-da-nv-dv-na i-go-se-he-s-di, de-ga-la-wi-v gv-wa-s-dv-di-s-di ge-se-s-di; gi-lo-no Tsa-ne-gu i-go-se-he-s-di, gv-wa-s-dv-di-s-di ge-se-s-di tsv-s-gi-no a-tsi-lv-yi.

010523.english: Therefore if thou bring thy gift to the altar, and there rememberest that thy brother hath ought against thee;
010523.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ ᎯᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᏁᏗ, ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎢᎭᏅᏓᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏤᎵᏎᎲᎢ,
010523.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no a-tsi-lv-ge-la-s-di-yi hi-yo-hi-he-s-di tsa-da-ne-di, na-hna-no i-ha-nv-da-di-s-ge-s-di di-s-da-da-nv-tli go-hu-s-di tse-li-se-hv-i,

010524.english: Leave there thy gift before the altar, and go thy way; first be reconciled to thy brother, and then come and offer thy gift.
010524.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ ᎯᎯᏯᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎭᏓᏅᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏂᏍᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ; ᎩᎳᏃ ᎯᎷᎨᏍᏗ ᎭᎵᏍᎪᎸᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᏁᏗ.
010524.phonetic: Na-hna a-tsi-lv--ge-la-s-di-yi hi-hi-ya-s-ge-s-di tsa-da-ne-di a-le ha-da-nv-s-ge-s-di, i-gv-yi o-s-dv ni-s-dv-ne-he-s-di di-s-da-da-nv-tli; gi-la-no hi-lu-ge-s-di ha-li-s-go-lv-di-s-ge-s-di tsa-da-ne-di.

010525.english: Agree with thine adversary quickly, whiles thou art in the way with him; lest at any time the adversary deliver thee to the judge, and the judge deliver thee to the officer, and thou be cast into prison.
010525.cherokee: ᏄᎳᏉ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏂᏍᏛ ᏣᏱᎵᏙᎯ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎢᏍᏓᎢᏒᎢ, ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏍᎩᏱᎾᏏ ᏫᏱᏣᎧᎲᎦ ᏣᏱᎵᏙᎯ, ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏍᎩᏃ ᏗᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩᏱ ᏫᏱᏣᎧᎲᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᏱᏪᏣᏴᏓ.
010525.phonetic: Nu-la-quo o-s-dv ni-s-dv tsa-yi-li-do-hi, a-si-quo i-s-da-i-sv-i, di-gu-go-di-s-gi-yi-na-si wi-yi-tsa-ka-hv-ga tsa-yi-li-do-hi, di-gu-go-di-s-gi-no di-da-ni-yi-s-gi-yi wi-yi-tsa-ka-hv-ga, a-le di-da-s-du-di-yi yi-we-tsa-yv-da.

010526.english: Verily I say unto thee, Thou shalt by no means come out thence, till thou hast paid the uttermost farthing.
010526.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏪᏎᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᏛᎦᎯᏄᎪᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎠᏰᎵᎢᏯᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎭᎫᏴᎲᎭ.
010526.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-gv-we-se-ha, V-tla yv-dv-ga-hi-nu-go-i, gv-ni u-li-s-qua-lv-di a-ye-li-i-ya-da-nv-te-di ha-gu-yv-hv-ha.

010527.english: Ye have heard that it was said by them of old time, Thou shalt not commit adultery:
010527.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎢᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎨᏥᏪᏎᎴ ᎡᏘ ᏣᏁᎮᎢ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᏲᏁᎸᎩ.
010527.phonetic: I-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi i-gi hi-a tsi-ni-ge-tsi-we-se-le e-ti tsa-ne-he-i; Tle-s-di tsa-da-yo-ne-lv-gi.

010528.english: But I say unto you, That whosoever looketh on a woman to lust after her hath committed adultery with her already in his heart.
010528.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎩᎶ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏓᎧᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏂᏏᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎦᏳᎳ ᎤᏓᏲᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏧᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
010528.phonetic: A-se-no a-yv hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Gi-lo a-ge-yv da-ka-ni-s-ge-s-di tsu-na-ni-si-di-yi u-du-li-s-ge-s-di, ga-yu-la u-da-yo-ne-lv-hi ge-se-s-di tsu-da-nv-dv-i.

010529.english: And if thy right eye offend thee, pluck it out, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into hell.
010529.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎯᎦᏙᎵ ᎯᎦᏘᏏ ᏕᏦᏕᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎭᏓᎦᏖᏙᎢᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏕᎨᏍᏗ; ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏌᏉᏉ ᏣᎵᎬᎭᎸᏛ ᏱᏣᏲᎱᏎᎭ, ᎠᏃ ᎤᏃᏍᏛ ᎯᏰᎸ ᏨᏍᎩᏃ ᏫᏰᏣᏓᎢᏁᎭ.
010529.phonetic: I-yu-no hi-ga-do-li hi-ga-ti-si de-tso-de-s-di-s-ge-s-di, ha-da-ga-te-do-i-s-ge-s-di, a-le tsa-de-ge-s-di; o-si-yu-ye-no i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di sa-quo-quo tsa-li-gv-ha-lv-dv yi-tsa-yo-hu-se-ha, a-no u-no-s-dv hi-ye-lv tsv-s-gi-no wi-ye-tsa-da-i-ne-ha.

010530.english: And if thy right hand offend thee, cut if off, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into hell.
010530.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏦᏰᏂ ᎯᎦᏘᏏ ᏕᏦᏕᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎯᏍᏆᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏕᎨᏍᏗ; ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏌᏉᏉ ᏣᎵᎬᎭᎸᏛ ᏱᏣᏲᎱᏎᎭ, ᎠᏃ ᎤᏃᏍᏛ ᎯᏰᎸ ᏨᏍᎩᏃ ᏫᏰᏣᏓᎢᏁᎭ.
010530.phonetic: I-yu-no tso-ye-ni hi-ga-ti-si de-tso-de-s-di-s-ge-s-di, hi-s-qua-li-s-ge-s-di, a-le tsa-de-ge-s-di; o-si-yu-ye-no i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di sa-quo-quo tsa-li-gv-ha-lv-dv yi-tsa-yo-hu-se-ha, a-no u-no-s-dv hi-ye-lv tsv-s-gi-no wi-ye-tsa-da-i-ne-ha.

010531.english: It hath been said, Whosoever shall put away his wife, let him give her a writing of divorcement:
010531.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᎢᎩ; ᎩᎶ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎢᎦᎧᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎦᏅᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎾᎦᎴᏅᎲᎢ.
010531.phonetic: Hi-a i-ga-we-dv i-gi; Gi-lo u-da-li-i i-ga-ka-hv-s-ge-s-di, ga-nv-ne-he-s-di go-we-li na-s-gi du-na-ga-le-nv-hv-i.

010532.english: But I say unto you, That whosoever shall put away his wife, saving for the cause of fornication, causeth her to commit adultery: and whosoever shall marry her that is divorced committeth adultery.
010532.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎩᎶ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎢᎦᎧᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏧᏂᏏᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏓᏲᏁᏗᏱᏉ ᏂᎬᏂᏌᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᏥᎧᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏰᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏲᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
010532.phonetic: A-se-no a-yv hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Gi-lo u-da-li-i i-ga-ka-hv-s-ge-s-di, tsu-ni-si-nv-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv i-ge-se-s-di, u-da-yo-ne-di-yi-quo ni-gv-ni-sa-ne-he-s-di; gi-lo-no a-tsi-ka-nv-hi a-da-ye-ge-s-di a-da-yo-ne-he-s-di.

010533.english: Again, ye have heard that it hath been said by them of old time, Thou shalt not forswear thyself, but shalt perform unto the Lord thine oaths:
010533.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎢᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎨᏥᏪᏎᎴ ᎡᏘ ᏣᏁᎮᎢ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏲᏍᏔᏅ ᏣᏎᎵᏔᏅᎢ, ᏱᎰᏩᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏯᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏣᏁᏨᎢ.
010533.phonetic: A-le i-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi i-gi hi-a tsi-ni-ge-tsi-we-se-le e-ti tsa-ne-he-i; Tle-s-di tsa-yo-s-ta-nv tsa-se-li-ta-nv-i, yi-ho-wa-s-gi-ni ni-ya-dv-ne-he-s-di nu-s-dv tsa-ne-tsv-i.

010534.english: But I say unto you, Swear not at all; neither by heaven; for it is God's throne:
010534.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏎᎵᏔᏁᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏁᎢᏍᏔᏁᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏱᏣᏁᎢᏍᏔᏁᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ;
010534.phonetic: A-se-no a-yv hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Tle-s-di yi-tsa-se-li-ta-ne-s-di yi-tsa-ne-i-s-ta-ne-s-di go-hu-s-di, tle-s-di ga-lv-la-di yi-tsa-ne-i-s-ta-ne-s-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-we-di-yi na-s-gi;

010535.english: Nor by the earth; for it is his footstool: neither by Jerusalem; for it is the city of the great King.
010535.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᏧᎳᏏᏗᏱᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ;
010535.phonetic: Tle-s-di a-le e-lo-hi, tsu-la-si-di-yi-ye-no na-s-gi; a-le Tsi-lu-si-li-mi, na-s-gi-ye-no a-tsi-lv-quo-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li ga-du-hv-i;

010536.english: Neither shalt thou swear by thy head, because thou canst not make one hair white or black.
010536.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎯᏍᎪᎵ ᏱᏣᏁᎢᏍᏔᏁᏍᏗ, ᏝᏰᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏌᏉ ᎩᏢ ᎤᏁᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎬᎿᎭᎨ ᏱᏅᎦᎲᎦ.
010536.phonetic: Tle-s-di a-le hi-s-go-li yi-tsa-ne-i-s-ta-ne-s-di, tla-ye-no ye-li sa-quo gi-tlv u-ne-gv a-le gv-hna-ge yi-nv-ga-hv-ga.

010537.english: But let your communication be, Yea, yea; Nay, nay: for whatsoever is more than these cometh of evil.
010537.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏁᎬᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎥᎥ, ᎥᎥ; ᎥᏝ, ᎥᏝ; ᎤᏟᏰᏃ ᏥᏂᎦᎣ ᎤᏲᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎪᎢ.
010537.phonetic: I-tsi-ne-gv-s-gi-ni hi-a nu-s-de-s-di, V-v, V-v; V-tla, V-tla; u-tli-ye-no tsi-ni-ga-o u-yo-quo ge-sv di-da-le-ni-s-go-i.

010538.english: Ye have heard that it hath been said, An eye for an eye, and a tooth for a tooth:
010538.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎢᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎦᏔ ᎠᎦᏔᏉ ᏓᎬᏩᎸᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎧᏳᎦᏃ ᎧᏳᎦᏉ ᏓᎬᏩᎸᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
010538.phonetic: I-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi i-gi hi-a i-ga-we-dv ge-sv-i, A-ga-ta a-ga-ta-quo da-gv-wa-lv-s-ge-s-di, ka-yu-ga-no ka-yu-ga-quo da-gv-wa-lv-s-ge-s-di.

010539.english: But I say unto you, That ye resist not evil: but whosoever shall smite thee on thy right cheek, turn to him the other also.
010539.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏣᏪᏎᎭ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏞᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏐᏅ ᏁᏨᏁᎸᎢ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎦᏘᏏ ᏣᎪᏇᎷᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏐᎢ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᏯᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
010539.phonetic: A-se-no a-yv hi-a ni-tsa-we-se-ha; Tle-s-di yi-tsa-tle-ge-s-di u-so-nv ne-tsv-ne-lv-i; gi-lo-s-gi-ni hi-ga-ti-si tsa-go-que-lu-hv-s-ge-s-di, so-i na-s-quo hi-ya-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-he-s-di.

010540.english: And if any man will sue thee at the law, and take away thy coat, let him have thy cloke also.
010540.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏣᏱᎵᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᎾᎡᏗᏱ ᎭᏫᏂ ᏣᏄᏬ, ᎤᏛᏃᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᏅᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
010540.phonetic: Gi-lo-no u-du-li-s-ge-s-di tsa-yi-li-da-s-di-yi, a-le tsa-na-e-di-yi ha-wi-ni tsa-nu-wo, u-dv-no-hi na-s-quo hi-nv-ne-he-s-di.

010541.english: And whosoever shall compel thee to go a mile, go with him twain.
010541.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᏑᏟᎶᏛ ᎢᏍᏕᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᏨᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᏔᎵ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎢᏍᏕᎨᏍᏗ.
010541.phonetic: Gi-lo-no su-tli-lo-dv i-s-de-nv-s-di-yi ni-tsv-ne-he-s-di, ta-li i-yu-tli-lo-dv i-s-de-ge-s-di.

010542.english: Give to him that asketh thee, and from him that would borrow of thee turn not thou away.
010542.cherokee: ᏣᏔᏲᏎᎯ ᎯᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᏣᏙᎸᎡᏗᏱᏃ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎩ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎯᏯᏛᏁᎸᎩ.
010542.phonetic: Tsa-ta-yo-se-hi hi-ne-he-s-di, tsa-do-lv-e-di-yi-no u-du-li-s-gi tle-s-di i-yv-dv i-hi-ya-dv-ne-lv-gi.

010543.english: Ye have heard that it hath been said, Thou shalt love thy neighbour, and hate thine enemy.
010543.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎢᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎯᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏓᎳ, ᎯᏍᎦᎨᏍᏗᏃ ᏣᏍᎦᎩ.
010543.phonetic: I-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi i-gi hi-a i-ga-we-dv ge-sv-i; Hi-ge-yu-se-s-di na-v i-di-s-da-da-la, hi-s-ga-ge-s-di-no tsa-s-ga-gi.

010544.english: But I say unto you, Love your enemies, bless them that curse you, do good to them that hate you, and pray for them which despitefully use you, and persecute you;
010544.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᏕᏥᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎨᏥᏍᎦᎩ; ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᏥᏁᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎨᏥᏍᎩᏅᏗᏍᎩ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᏂᏕᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎨᏥᏂᏆᏘᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎨᏥᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎢᎨᏨᏁᎯ.
010544.phonetic: A-se-no a-yv hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; De-tsi-ge-yu-se-s-di ge-tsi-s-ga-gi; o-s-dv de-tsi-ne-tse-he-s-di ge-tsi-s-gi-nv-di-s-gi, o-s-dv ni-de-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di ge-tsi-ni-qua-ti-hi, a-le o-s-dv i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di-yi i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di ga-ye-go-gi ge-tsi-no-he-s-gi a-le u-yo i-ge-tsv-ne-hi.

010545.english: That ye may be the children of your Father which is in heaven: for he maketh his sun to rise on the evil and on the good, and sendeth rain on the just and on the unjust.
010545.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏅᏙ ᏕᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎰ ᎤᏂᏲ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏃᏍᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎦᏅᏓᏁᎰ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁᎫᏥᏛ.
010545.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ga-lv-la-di e-hi I-tsi-do-da tsu-we-tsi ni-tsa-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di; na-s-gi-ye-no u-tse-li nv-do de-ga-na-nu-go-wi-se-ho u-ni-yo a-le a-no-s-dv, a-le da-ga-nv-da-ne-ho u-na-da-nv-ti a-le u-ni-ne-gu-tsi-dv.

010546.english: For if ye love them which love you, what reward have ye? do not even the publicans the same?
010546.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏱᏗᏥᎨᏳᎭ ᎨᏥᎨᏳᎯ, ᎦᏙ ᏰᏣᎫᏴᏓᏏ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎾᎾᏛᏁᎰ ᎠᏰᎵ-ᎠᏕᎸ ᎠᏂᎩᏏᏙᎯ?
010546.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no yi-di-tsi-ge-yu-ha ge-tsi-ge-yu-hi, ga-do ye-tsa-gu-yv-da-si?  Tla-s-go na-s-gi yi-na-na-dv-ne-ho a-ye-li--a-de-lv a-ni-gi-si-do-hi?

010547.english: And if ye salute your brethren only, what do ye more than others? do not even the publicans so?
010547.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏟᏉ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏱᏗᏥᏲᎵᎭ, ᎦᏙ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᎲ ᏕᏥᎪᎾᏛᏗ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎾᎾᏛᏁᎰ ᎠᏰᎵ-ᎠᏕᎸ ᎠᏂᎩᏏᏙᎯ?
010547.phonetic: I-yu a-le i-tsa-da-nv-tli-quo u-nv-sv yi-di-tsi-yo-li-ha, ga-do i-tsa-dv-ne-hv de-tsi-go-na-dv-di a-ni-so-i?  Tla-s-go na-s-gi yi-na-na-dv-ne-ho a-ye-li--a-de-lv a-ni-gi-si-do-hi?

010548.english: Be ye therefore perfect, even as your Father which is in heaven is perfect.
010548.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᏥᎩ.
010548.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni ni-tsi-s-ga-nv-na ge-se-s-di na-s-gi-ya I-tsi-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi na-s-ga-nv-na tsi-gi.

010601.english: Take heed that ye do not your alms before men, to be seen of them: otherwise ye have no reward of your Father which is in heaven.
010601.cherokee: ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏥᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱᏉ ᏱᏥᏰᎸᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎨᏣᎫᏴᏏ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ.
010601.phonetic: I-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di tle-s-di yi-tsa-da-ne-he-s-di a-ni-ga-ta-hv yv-wi ge-tsi-go-wa-dv-di-yi-quo yi-tsi-ye-lv-s-ge-s-di, i-yu-ye-no na-s-gi-quo yi-nu-s-di v-tla yv-ge-tsa-gu-yv-si I-tsi-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi.

010602.english: Therefore when thou doest thine alms, do not sound a trumpet before thee, as the hypocrites do in the synagogues and in the streets, that they may have glory of men. Verily I say unto you, They have their reward.
010602.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎭᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏤᎷᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏫᏱᏃᏴᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎾᎾᏛᏁᎰ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏧᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎾᎢᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᏕᎦᎳᏅᏛᎢ, ᏴᏫᏉ ᎬᏩᏂᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᏂᏰᎸᏐᎢ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎨᎦᎫᏴᎡᎸ.
010602.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no ha-da-ne-he-s-di tle-s-di a-tse-lu-gi i-gv-yi wi-yi-no-yv-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi tsi-na-na-dv-ne-ho u-na-tlo-na-s-di tsu-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-le e-na-i-da-s-di-yi de-ga-la-nv-dv-i, yv-wi-quo gv-wa-ni-lv-quo-do-di-yi tsu-ni-ye-lv-so-i; u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsv-yo-se-ha, ge-ga-gu-yv-e-lv.

010603.english: But when thou doest alms, let not thy left hand know what thy right hand doeth:
010603.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎭᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏦᏰᏂ ᎯᎦᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎯᎦᏘᏏ ᏦᏰᏂ ᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ.
010603.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni ha-da-ne-he-s-di tle-s-di tso-ye-ni hi-ga-s-ga-ni u-do-le-ho-sv hi-ga-ti-si tso-ye-ni na-dv-ne-hv-i.

010604.english: That thine alms may be in secret: and thy Father which seeth in secret himself shall reward thee openly.
010604.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎭᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏕᎵᏒ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏣᏙᏓᏃ ᎤᏕᎵᏒ ᎠᎪᏩᏘᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏎ ᏣᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢ.
010604.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ha-da-ne-hv u-de-li-sv ge-se-s-di, Tsa-do-da-no u-de-li-sv a-go-wa-ti-s-gi u-wa-sv a-se tsa-gu-yv-e-di ge-se-s-di gv-ni-ge-sv-i.

010605.english: And when thou prayest, thou shalt not be as the hypocrites are: for they love to pray standing in the synagogues and in the corners of the streets, that they may be seen of men. Verily I say unto you, They have their reward.
010605.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎭᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎭ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏱᏂᏣᏍᏕᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎣᏐ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏐ ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᎴᏗᏱ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏅᏏᏯᏅ ᏕᎦᎳᏅᏛ ᎡᎾᎢᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᏴᏫᏉ ᎬᏩᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎪᎢ.  ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎨᎦᎫᏴᎡᎸ.
010605.phonetic: I-yu a-le ha-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di, a-ha tle-s-di nu-na-s-dv u-na-tlo-na-s-di yi-ni-tsa-s-de-s-di; na-s-gi-ye-no o-so u-ni-ye-lv-so u-na-da-do-li-s-do-di-yi u-na-le-di-yi di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-le du-nv-si-ya-nv de-ga-la-nv-dv e-na-i-da-s-di-yi, yv-wi-quo gv-wa-ni-go-wa-dv-di-yi u-na-du-li-s-go-i.  U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsv-yo-se-ha, ge-ga-gu-yv-e-lv.

010606.english: But thou, when thou prayest, enter into thy closet, and when thou hast shut thy door, pray to thy Father which is in secret; and thy Father which seeth in secret shall reward thee openly.
010606.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏔᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏂᏎᏍᏗ ᏫᏴᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎧᏅᏑᎸᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏣᏍᏚᏁᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎯᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏣᏙᏓ ᎤᏕᎵᏒ ᎡᎯ, ᏣᏙᎵᏃ ᎤᏕᎵᏒ ᎠᎪᏩᏘᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᏣᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢ.
010606.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni i-yu-no ta-da-do-li-s-ta-ni-se-s-di wi-yv-hi-he-s-di ka-nv-su-lv-i, hna-quo-no tsa-s-du-ne-s-di ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi, hi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-he-s-di tsa-do-da u-de-li-sv e-hi, tsa-do-li-no u-de-li-sv a-go-wa-ti-s-gi a-se tsa-gu-yv-e-di ge-se-s-di gv-ni-ge-sv-i.

010607.english: But when ye pray, use not vain repetitions, as the heathen do: for they think that they shall be heard for their much speaking.
010607.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏱᏨᎫᏘᎶᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎾᎾᏛᏁᎰ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ; ᎤᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᎣᏥᏁᎬ ᎤᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏔᏂ ᏓᏲᎦᏛᎦᏁᎵ ᎠᏁᎵᏍᎪᎢ.
010607.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di tle-s-di a-se-quo yi-tsv-gu-ti-lo-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi tsi-na-na-dv-ne-ho tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi; u-tsa-ti-ye-no o-tsi-ne-gv u-da-ga-li-s-do-ta-ni da-yo-ga-dv-ga-ne-li a-ne-li-s-go-i.

010608.english: Be not ye therefore like unto them: for your Father knoweth what things ye have need of, before ye ask him.
010608.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᏱᏂᏣᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᏙᏓᏰᏃ ᎠᎦᏔᎰ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏂᎬᎬ ᎠᏏᏉ ᏁᏥᏔᏲᏎᎸᎾ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ.
010608.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni tle-s-di na-s-gi nu-na-s-dv yi-ni-tsa-s-de-s-di, I-tsi-do-da-ye-no a-ga-ta-ho i-yu-s-di i-tsi-ni-gv-gv a-si-quo ne-tsi-ta-yo-se-lv-na tsi-ge-so-i.

010609.english: After this manner therefore pray ye: Our Father which art in heaven, Hallowed be thy name.
010609.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ; ᎣᎩᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎨᎯ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏙᎥᎢ.
010609.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv hi-a nu-s-de-s-di; O-gi-do-da ga-lv-la-di ge-hi, ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di de-tsa-do-v-i.

010610.english: Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven.
010610.cherokee: ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏫᎦᎾᏄᎪᎢ.  ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᎭᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ.
010610.phonetic: Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv wi-ga-na-nu-go-i.  A-ni e-lo-hi wi-ni-ga-li-s-da ha-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-ya ga-lv-la-di tsi-ni-ga-li-s-di-ha.

010611.english: Give us this day our daily bread.

010612.english: And forgive us our debts, as we forgive our debtors.

010613.english: And lead us not into temptation, but deliver us from evil: For thine is the kingdom, and the power, and the glory, for ever. Amen.
010613.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᏫᏗᏍᎩᏯᏘᏅᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᏍᎩᏳᏓᎴᏍᎨᏍᏗᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᏣᏤᎵᎦᏰᏃ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᎵᏂᎩᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏣᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
010613.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di u-da-go-li-ye-di-yi ge-sv wi-di-s-gi-ya-ti-nv-s-ta-nv-gi, s-gi-yu-da-le-s-ge-s-di-quo-s-gi-ni u-tsi ge-sv-i.  Tsa-tse-li-ga-ye-no tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i, a-le tsa-li-ni-gi-di-yi ge-sv-i, a-le e-tsa-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv ni-go-hi-lv-i.  E-me-nv.

010614.english: For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you:
010614.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏥᏍᎦᏅᏤᎲ ᏱᏗᎨᏥᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎢᏥᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
010614.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no yv-wi ge-tsi-s-ga-nv-tse-hv yi-di-ge-tsi-ne-ha, na-s-quo i-tsi-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi i-tsi-do-li-s-di ge-se-s-di.

010615.english: But if ye forgive not men their trespasses, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses.
010615.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏗᎨᏥᏁᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏥᏍᎦᏅᏤᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏙᎨᏥᎲᏏ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
010615.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni ni-di-ge-tsi-ne-hv-na yi-gi yv-wi ge-tsi-s-ga-nv-tse-hv-i, na-s-quo I-tsi-do-da v-tla yi-do-ge-tsi-hv-si i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

010616.english: Moreover when ye fast, be not, as the hypocrites, of a sad countenance: for they disfigure their faces, that they may appear unto men to fast. Verily I say unto you, They have their reward.
010616.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎹᏟ ᎢᏨᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏅᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᏱᏂᏣᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᏥᎨᏐ ᏗᎧᏃᏗᏱ, ᏂᏓᏤᎸᎾᏰᏃ ᏂᏓᏅᏁᎰ ᏚᎾᎧᏛᎢ, ᏴᏫᏉ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎪ ᎠᎹᏟ ᎠᏅᏍᎬᎢ.  ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ ᎨᎦᎫᏴᎡᎸ.
010616.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo a-ma-tli i-tsv-s-ge-s-di, tle-s-di nv-na-tlo-na-s-di nu-na-s-dv yi-ni-tsa-s-de-s-di, u-na-da-do-li-s-di tsi-ge-so di-ka-no-di-yi, ni-da-tse-lv-na-ye-no ni-da-nv-ne-ho du-na-ka-dv-i, yv-wi-quo u-na-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi u-na-du-li-s-go a-ma-tli a-nv-s-gv-i.  U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya ni-tsv-we-se-ha ge-ga-gu-yv-e-lv.

010617.english: But thou, when thou fastest, anoint thine head, and wash thy face;
010617.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎹᏟ ᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎭᏠᏁᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎭᎬᏍᏉᏍᎨᏍᏗ,
010617.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni a-ma-tli hv-s-ge-s-di, ha-tlo-ne-s-ge-s-di, a-le ha-gv-s-quo-s-ge-s-di,

010618.english: That thou appear not unto men to fast, but unto thy Father which is in secret: and thy Father, which seeth in secret, shall reward thee openly.
010618.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎨᏣᏙᎴᎰᎯᏎᏗᏱ ᏱᏣᏰᎵᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎹᏟ ᏨᏒᎢ, ᏣᏙᏓᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏕᎵᏒ ᎡᎯ, ᏣᏙᏓᏃ ᎤᏕᎵᏒ ᎠᎪᏩᏘᏍᎩ, ᎠᏎ ᏣᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢ.
010618.phonetic: Na-s-gi tle-s-di yv-wi-quo ge-tsa-do-le-ho-hi-se-di-yi yi-tsa-ye-li-se-s-di a-ma-tli tsv-sv-i, Tsa-do-da-s-gi-ni u-de-li-sv e-hi, Tsa-do-da-no u-de-li-sv a-go-wa-ti-s-gi, a-se tsa-gu-yv-e-di gv-ni-ge-sv-i.

010619.english: Lay not up for yourselves treasures upon earth, where moth and rust doth corrupt, and where thieves break through and steal:
010619.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏱᏥᏟᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏥᏍᎪᏴ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏯᏍᏜᏓᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏲᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏃᏍᎩᏍᏗᏱ;
010619.phonetic: Tle-s-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di e-lo-hi yi-tsi-tli-si-s-ge-s-di, tsi-s-go-yv a-le a-ya-s-dla-di-s-gi u-ni-yo-s-do-di-yi a-le a-ni-no-s-gi-s-gi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi a-le u-ni-no-s-gi-s-di-yi;

010620.english: But lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven, where neither moth nor rust doth corrupt, and where thieves do not break through nor steal:
010620.cherokee: ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏫᏥᏟᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ, ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᏥᏍᎪᏴ ᎠᏯᏍᏜᏓᏗᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏂᏲᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏃᏍᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
010620.phonetic: Ga-lv-la-di-s-gi-ni wi-tsi-tli-si-s-ge-s-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di, na-hna-ni tsi-s-go-yv a-ya-s-dla-di-s-gi-no u-ni-yo-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-le a-ni-no-s-gi-s-gi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi a-le u-ni-no-s-gi-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

010621.english: For where your treasure is, there will your heart be also.
010621.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏰᏃ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏫᏥᎲᎢ ᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏫᏓᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ.
010621.phonetic: Na-hna-ye-no tsu-gv-wa-lo-di wi-tsi-hv-i a-se na-s-quo wi-da-he-s-di di-tsa-da-nv-do.

010622.english: The light of the body is the eye: if therefore thine eye be single, thy whole body shall be full of light.
010622.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏔ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏘᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎦᏙᎵ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏂᎬ ᎯᏰᎸᎢ ᎤᎧᎵᏦᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ.
010622.phonetic: A-ga-ta a-ye-lv i-ga ga-ti-s-di-s-gi, i-yu-s-gi-ni hi-ga-do-li go-hu-s-di nu-s-dv-na ge-se-s-di, ni-gv hi-ye-lv-i u-ka-li-tso-nv-hi ge-se-s-di i-ga-ga-ti.

010623.english: But if thine eye be evil, thy whole body shall be full of darkness. If therefore the light that is in thee be darkness, how great is that darkness!
010623.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎦᏙᎵ ᎤᏲ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏂᎬ ᎯᏰᎸᎢ ᎤᎧᎵᏦᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ.  ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂᏃ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ ᎭᏫᏂ ᏤᎲ ᎤᎵᏏᎩᏉ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ ᏂᎦ ᎡᏉᎯᏳ!
010623.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni hi-ga-do-li u-yo i-ge-se-s-di, ni-gv hi-ye-lv-i u-ka-li-tso-nv-hi ge-se-s-di u-li-si-gi.  I-yu-s-gi-ni-no i-ga-ga-ti ha-wi-ni tse-hv u-li-si-gi-quo i-ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi u-li-si-gi ni-ga e-quo-hi-yu!

010624.english: No man can serve two masters: for either he will hate the one, and love the other; or else he will hold to the one, and despise the other. Ye cannot serve God and mammon.
010624.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏰᎵ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎬᏩᎾᏝᎢ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏙᎬᏛᏂᏏ, ᏱᎠᏍᎦᎦᏰᏃ ᏌᏉ ᏱᏅᎨᏳᎭᏃ ᏐᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏙᎤᏂᏴᎭ ᏌᏉ ᏱᎦᏂᏆᏘᎭᏃ ᏐᎢ. ᏝᏍᎩᏂ ᏰᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎹᎹᏂ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏙᎨᏣᏛᏂᏏ.
010624.phonetic: V-tla gi-lo ye-li a-ni-ta-li gv-wa-na-tla-i go-hu-s-di yi-do-gv-dv-ni-si, yi-a-s-ga-ga-ye-no sa-quo yi-nv-ge-yu-ha-no so-i, a-le yi-do-u-ni-yv-ha sa-quo yi-ga-ni-qua-ti-ha-no so-i.  Tla-s-gi-ni ye-li U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le Ma-ma-ni go-hu-s-di-yi-do-ge-tsa-dv-ni-si.

010625.english: Therefore I say unto you, Take no thought for your life, what ye shall eat, or what ye shall drink; nor yet for your body, what ye shall put on. Is not the life more than meat, and the body than raiment?
010625.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏤᎵᎯᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᏨᏅᎢ, ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏗᏔᏍᏗᏱ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᏰᎸᎢ ᏱᏤᎵᎯᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏄᏬᏍᏗᏱ.  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎠᎬᏅ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᏱᎩ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ?  ᎠᎴ ᏝᏍᎪ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏗᏄᏬ?
010625.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Tle-s-di yi-tse-li-hi-s-ge-s-di de-tsv-nv-i, i-yu-s-di i-tsi-gi-s-di-yi a-le i-yu-s-di i-tsa-di-ta-s-di-yi, tle-s-di a-le di-tsi-ye-lv-i yi-tse-li-hi-s-ge-s-di i-yu-s-di di-tsa-nu-wo-s-di-yi.  Tla-s-go a-gv-nv u-tli-hi-yu yi-gi e-s-ga-quo a-li-s-da-yv-di?  A-le tla-s-go a-ye-lv-i e-s-ga-quo di-nu-wo?

010626.english: Behold the fowls of the air: for they sow not, neither do they reap, nor gather into barns; yet your heavenly Father feedeth them. Are ye not much better than they?
010626.cherokee: ᏗᏣᎧᏅᎦ ᏥᏍᏆ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᏝᏰᏃ ᏯᏂᏫᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ Ꮭ ᏯᏂᏁᏣᎢᏍᎪᎢ, Ꮭ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏓᏁᎸ ᏯᏂᏟᏏᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᏙᎨᎶᎰᎢ.  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏂᎯ ᎤᏟ ᏱᏁᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ?
010626.phonetic: Di-tsa-ka-nv-ga tsi-s-qua ga-lv-lo-i a-ne-hi, tla-ye-no ya-ni-wi-s-go-i, a-le tla ya-ni-ne-tsa-i-s-go-i, tla a-le da-da-ne-lv ya-ni-tli-si-s-go-i, a-se-no I-tsi-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi do-ge-lo-ho-i.  Tla-s-go ni-hi u-tli yi-ne-tsi-lv-quo-di e-s-ga-quo na-s-gi?

010627.english: Which of you by taking thought can add one cubit unto his stature?
010627.cherokee: ᎦᎪᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᎤᏓᏑᏯ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᎬᏉ ᏰᎵ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᏱᎧᏁᏉᏣ ᎬᏅᎢ?
010627.phonetic: Ga-go-no ni-hi tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv u-da-su-ya u-we-li-hi-s-gv-quo ye-li sa-quo i-yu-tli-lo-dv yi-ka-ne-quo-tsa gv-nv-i?

010628.english: And why take ye thought for raiment? Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow; they toil not, neither do they spin:
010628.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᏃ ᏗᏄᏬ ᏙᏤᎵᎯᏍᎪᎢ?  ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛᎵ ᏧᏥᎸᎯ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏤᎯ ᏓᏛᏍᎬᎢ.  ᎥᏝ ᏱᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏯᏂᏍᏙᎰᎢ.
010628.phonetic: A-le ga-do-no di-nu-wo do-tse-li-hi-s-go-i?  Di-tsa-da-nv-dv-li tsu-tsi-lv-hi tlo-ge-si tse-hi da-dv-s-gv-i.  V-tla yi-du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i, a-le v-tla ya-ni-s-do-ho-i.

010629.english: And yet I say unto you, That even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these.
010629.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᏐᎵᎹᏅ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏄᏬᏚᏒᎢ Ꮭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏕ ᏚᏄᏮᎢ ᏌᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ.
010629.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, na-s-quo so-li-ma-nv ni-ga-v nu-wo-du-sv-i tla na-s-gi yi-nu-s-de du-nu-wv-i sa-quo hi-a nu-s-dv-i.

010630.english: Wherefore, if God so clothe the grass of the field, which to day is, and to morrow is cast into the oven, shall he not much more clothe you, O ye of little faith?
010630.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᏱᎦᏄᏬᎭ ᎧᏁᏍᎦ ᏠᎨᏏ ᎡᎯ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏤᎭ, ᎤᎩᏨᏅᏃ ᏗᎦᏚᏗᏱ ᏭᎾᏗᏅᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᏱᏂᏙᎨᏥᏄᏬᏣ, ᎤᏍᏗ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎯ?
010630.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi yi-ni-gv-ne-ha yi-ga-nu-wo-ha ka-ne-s-ga tlo-ge-si e-hi, go-hi i-ga tse-ha, u-gi-tsv-nv-no di-ga-du-di-yi wu-na-di-nv-di tsi-gi, tla-s-go u-tli-hi-yu yi-ni-do-ge-tsi-nu-wo-tsa, u-s-di i-tso-hi-yu-hi?

010631.english: Therefore take no thought, saying, What shall we eat? or, What shall we drink? or, Wherewithal shall we be clothed?
010631.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏤᎵᎯᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᏥᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎦᏙ ᏓᏲᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᏓᏲᏣᏗᏔᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᏓᏲᏣᏄᏬᎢ?
010631.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di yi-tse-li-hi-s-ge-s-di hi-a yi-ni-tsi-we-s-ge-s-di; ga-do da-yo-tsi-gi, a-le ga-do da-yo-tsa-di-ta-hi, a-le ga-do da-yo-tsa-nu-wo-i?

010632.english: (For after all these things do the Gentiles seek:) for your heavenly Father knoweth that ye have need of all these things.
010632.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏂᏲᎰ ᏧᎾᏖᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ.  ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏰᏃ ᎡᎯ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎠᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᏥᏂᎬᏎᎲᎢ.
010632.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-ye-no na-s-gi hi-a u-ni-yo-ho Tsu-na-te-le-nv-dv yv-wi.  Ga-lv-la-di-ye-no e-hi I-tsi-do-da a-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv i-tsi-ni-gv-se-hv-i.

010633.english: But seek ye first the kingdom of God, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.
010633.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᏲᎦ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ, ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏓᏰᏥᏁᏉᎡᎵ.
010633.phonetic: I-gv-yi-s-gi-ni i-tsi-yo-ga ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv a-le u-tse-li du-yu-go-dv-i, hi-a-no ni-ga-di-yu da-ye-tsi-ne-quo-e-li.

010634.english: Take therefore no thought for the morrow: for the morrow shall take thought for the things of itself. Sufficient unto the day is the evil thereof.
010634.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᎩᏨᏅ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏱᏫᏤᎵᎯᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᎩᏨᏅᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏛᏕᎵᎯᏍᏔᏂ.  ᏰᎵᏉ ᎤᏲ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏪᎲᎢ.
010634.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di u-gi-tsv-nv i-yv-dv yi-wi-tse-li-hi-s-ge-s-di, u-gi-tsv-nv-ye-no u-wa-sv tsu-da-le-nv-dv dv-de-li-hi-s-ta-ni.  Ye-li-quo u-yo i-ga u-we-hv-i.

010701.english: Judge not, that ye be not judged.
010701.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏥᏣᏓᎳᏫᏎᎵ ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᎳᏫᏎᎸᎩ.
010701.phonetic: Tle-s-di tsi-tsa-da-la-wi-se-li na-s-gi-no ni-hi tle-s-di e-tsi-la-wi-se-lv-gi.

010702.english: For with what judgment ye judge, ye shall be judged: and with what measure ye mete, it shall be measured to you again.
010702.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᎳᏫᏎᎸ ᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏛᎡᏥᎳᏫᏎᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏟᎶᏒᎸ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏛᎡᏣᏟᎶᎡᎵ.
010702.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no nu-s-dv i-tsa-da-la-wi-se-lv a-se na-s-quo dv-e-tsi-la-wi-se-li, a-le nu-s-dv i-tsa-da-tli-lo-sv-lv na-s-quo dv-e-tsa-tli-lo-e-li.

010703.english: And why beholdest thou the mote that is in thy brother's eye, but considerest not the beam that is in thine own eye?
010703.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎯᎪᏩᏘᏍᎪ ᎤᏢᏓᎸᏛ ᎤᎦᏑᎲᎢ ᏗᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ, ᏁᎵᏍᎬᎾᏃ ᎢᎨᏐ ᎤᏃᏍᏛ ᎠᏓ ᏨᏒ ᏣᎦᏑᎲᎢ.
010703.phonetic: A-le ga-do-no i-hi-go-wa-ti-s-go u-tlv-da-lv-dv u-ga-su-hv-i di-s-da-da-nv-tli, ne-li-s-gv-na-no i-ge-so u-no-s-dv a-da tsv-sv tsa-ga-su-hv-i.

010704.english: Or how wilt thou say to thy brother, Let me pull out the mote out of thine eye; and, behold, a beam is in thine own eye?
010704.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᏪᏏ ᏗᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ, ᎬᎸᏏ ᎤᏢᏓᎸᏛ ᏣᎦᏑᎲᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎤᏃᏍᏛ ᎠᏓ ᏨᏒ ᏣᎦᏑᎭ.
010704.phonetic: A-le ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da hi-a yi-ni-we-si di-s-da-da-nv-tli, Gv-lv-si u-tlv-da-lv-dv tsa-ga-su-hv-i, gv-ni-yu-quo-no u-no-s-dv a-da tsv-sv tsa-ga-su-ha.

010705.english: Thou hypocrite, first cast out the beam out of thine own eye; and then shalt thou see clearly to cast out the mote out of thy brother's eye.
010705.cherokee: ᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᎢᎬᏱ ᎯᎸ ᎤᏃᏍᏛ ᎠᏓ ᏨᏒ ᏣᎦᏑᎲᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢᏳ ᏣᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎯᎸᎡᏗᏱ ᎤᏢᏓᎸᏛ ᏗᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ ᎤᎦᏑᎲᎢ.
010705.phonetic: Tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  i-gv-yi hi-lv u-no-s-dv a-da tsv-sv tsa-ga-su-hv-i, hna-quo-no gv-ni-ge-sv-i-yu tsa-go-wa-dv-di-yi ge-se-s-di hi-lv-e-di-yi u-tlv-da-lv-dv di-s-da-da-nv-tli u-ga-su-hv-i.

010706.english: Give not that which is holy unto the dogs, neither cast ye your pearls before swine, lest they trample them under their feet, and turn again and rend you.
010706.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎩᎵ ᏗᏥᏁᎸᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏓᎬᎾ-ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᏏᏆ ᏫᏗᏣᏗᏁᎸᎩ, ᏱᏓᎾᎳᏍᏓᎥᎵᏉᏰᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᏯᎾᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏴᎨᏥᏓᎦᎸᎥᎦ.
010706.phonetic: Tle-s-di go-hu-s-di ga-lv-quo-di gi-li di-tsi-ne-lv-gi, tle-s-di a-le da-gv-na--i-yu-na-s-di di-tsa-tse-li-ga si-qua wi-di-tsa-di-ne-lv-gi, yi-da-na-la-s-da-v-li-quo-ye-no, a-le ya-na-ga-ta-hv-na yv-ge-tsi-da-ga-lv-v-ga.

010707.english: Ask, and it shall be given you; seek, and ye shall find; knock, and it shall be opened unto you:
010707.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎭ, ᎠᏎ ᏓᏰᏥᏁᎵ; ᎢᏥᏲᎦ, ᎠᏎ ᏓᏥᏩᏛᎯ; ᎢᏨᏂᎦ, ᎠᏎ ᏓᏰᏥᏍᏚᎢᎡᎵ.
010707.phonetic: I-tsi-ta-yo-ha, a-se da-ye-tsi-ne-li; i-tsi-yo-ga, a-se da-tsi-wa-dv-hi; i-tsv-ni-ga, a-se da-ye-tsi-s-du-i-e-li.

010708.english: For every one that asketh receiveth; and he that seeketh findeth; and to him that knocketh it shall be opened.
010708.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᏣᏔᏲᎯᎰ ᎠᏥᏁᎰᎢ, ᎩᎶᏃ ᏧᏲᎰ ᎠᏩᏘᏍᎪᎢ, ᎩᎶᏃ ᏥᏫᎬᏂᎰ ᎠᏥᏍᏚᎢᎡᎰᎢ.
010708.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no tsa-ta-yo-hi-ho a-tsi-ne-ho-i, gi-lo-no tsu-yo-ho a-wa-ti-s-go-i, gi-lo-no tsi-wi-gv-ni-ho a-tsi-s-du-i-e-ho-i.

010709.english: Or what man is there of you, whom if his son ask bread, will he give him a stone?
010709.cherokee: ᎦᎪᎨ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᏚ ᏳᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᏅᏯᏉ ᏯᎲᏏ?
010709.phonetic: Ga-go-ge a-s-ga-ya hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv, i-yu-no u-we-tsi ga-du yu-ta-yo-se-ha, nv-ya-quo ya-hv-si?

010710.english: Or if he ask a fish, will he give him a serpent?
010710.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏣᏗ ᏯᏔᏲᎯᎭ, ᏥᎪ ᎢᎾᏛᏉ ᏴᎦᏅᎥᏏ?
010710.phonetic: A-le a-tsa-di ya-ta-yo-hi-ha, tsi-go i-na-dv-quo yv-ga-nv-v-si?

010711.english: If ye then, being evil, know how to give good gifts unto your children, how much more shall your Father which is in heaven give good things to them that ask him?
010711.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᏲᎢ ᏱᏥᏏᎾᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᏗᏤᏥ, ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᏔᏲᏎᎯ.
010711.phonetic: I-yu-no ni-hi i-tsi-yo-i yi-tsi-si-na-hi o-s-dv ge-sv di-tsi-ne-di-yi di-tse-tsi, u-tli-hi-yu u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya I-tsi-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi o-s-dv da-ne-he-s-di gv-wa-ta-yo-se-hi.

010712.english: Therefore all things whatsoever ye would that men should do to you, do ye even so to them: for this is the law and the prophets.
010712.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏴᏫ ᎢᎨᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᏕᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ
010712.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di i-tsa-du-li-s-gv yv-wi i-ge-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-de-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di; na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a nu-s-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi

010713.english: Enter ye in at the strait gate: for wide is the gate, and broad is the way, that leadeth to destruction, and many there be which go in thereat:
010713.cherokee: ᎠᏯᏙᎵ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏴᏍᏓ ᎠᏯᏖᏂᏰᏃ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏯᏖᏂ ᏅᏃᎯ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏫᎦᎾᏄᎪᎬᎢ, ᎤᏂ ᏣᏔᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏂᎶᏍᎦ.
010713.phonetic: A-ya-do-li ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi i-tsi-yv-s-da A-ya-te-ni-ye-no ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi a-le a-ya-te-ni nv-no-hi a-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi wi-ga-na-nu-go-gv-i, u-ni tsa-ta-no na-hna a-ni-lo-s-ga.

010714.english: Because strait is the gate, and narrow is the way, which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it.
010714.cherokee: ᎠᏯᏙᎵᏳᏰᏃ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏯᏙᎵᏳ ᏅᏃᎯ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏫᎦᎾᏄᎪᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎦᏲᎵᏳ ᎠᏂᏩᏘᎭ.
010714.phonetic: A-ya-do-li-yu-ye-no ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi a-le a-ya-do-li-yu nv-no-hi gv-ni-dv wi-ga-na-nu-go-gv-i, a-le a-ni-ga-yo-li-yu a-ni-wa-ti-ha.

010715.english: Beware of false prophets, which come to you in sheep's clothing, but inwardly they are ravening wolves.
010715.cherokee: ᏕᏤᏯᏙᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎠᏫ ᎤᏂᏃᏕᎾ ᎦᏁᎦ ᏧᎾᏄᏩᎢ ᏥᎨᏥᎷᏤᎰᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎭᏫᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏩᏯ ᎤᏂᎬᎥᏍᎩ ᎨᏐᎢ.
010715.phonetic: De-tse-ya-do-tse-he-s-di u-na-tlo-na-s-di a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, a-wi u-ni-no-de-na ga-ne-ga tsu-na-nu-wa-i tsi-ge-tsi-lu-tse-ho-i; a-se-no ha-wi-ni ge-sv wa-ya u-ni-gv-v-s-gi ge-so-i.

010716.english: Ye shall know them by their fruits. Do men gather grapes of thorns, or figs of thistles?
010716.cherokee: ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᎾᏓᏛᏍᎬᎢ ᏙᏓᏦᎵᏍᏔᏂ.   ᏥᎪ ᏴᏫ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᎾᏕᏍᎪ ᏥᏍᏚᏂᎩᏍᏗᎯ?  ᎠᎴ ᏒᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏥᎪᏥᏥᎯ ᏓᎾᏕᏍᎪᎢ?
010716.phonetic: Nu-s-dv a-na-da-dv-s-gv-i do-da-tso-li-s-ta-ni.   Tsi-go yv-wi te-lv-la-di da-na-de-s-go tsi-s-du-ni-gi-s-di-hi?  A-le sv-ga-ta--i-yu-na-s-di tsi-go-tsi-tsi-hi da-na-de-s-go-i?

010717.english: Even so every good tree bringeth forth good fruit; but a corrupt tree bringeth forth evil fruit.
010717.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᏄᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏡᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏛᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᏲᏃ ᏡᎬ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏓᏛᏍᎪᎢ.
010717.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni nu-s-di ni-ga-v o-s-dv tlu-gv o-s-dv a-da-dv-s-go-i, u-yo-no tlu-gv u-yo a-da-dv-s-go-i.

010718.english: A good tree cannot bring forth evil fruit, neither can a corrupt tree bring forth good fruit.
010718.cherokee: ᎣᏍᏛ ᏡᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎤᏲ ᏴᎬᏓᏛᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏡᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏴᎬᏓᏛᎦ.
010718.phonetic: O-s-dv tlu-gv v-tla ye-li u-yo yv-gv-da-dv-ga, a-le u-yo tlu-gv v-tla ye-li o-s-dv yv-gv-da-dv-ga.

010719.english: Every tree that bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire.
010719.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏍᎩᏂ ᏕᏡᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎾᎾᏓᏛᏍᎬᎾ, ᏗᎦᎴᏴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸᏱ ᏫᏓᏗᏅᏗ.
010719.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-s-gi-ni de-tlu-gv o-s-dv na-na-da-dv-s-gv-na, di-ga-le-yv-s-do-di ge-se-s-di, a-le a-tsi-lv-yi wi-da-di-nv-di.

010720.english: Wherefore by their fruits ye shall know them.

010721.english: Not every one that saith unto me, Lord, Lord, shall enter into the kingdom of heaven; but he that doeth the will of my Father which is in heaven.
010721.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎾᏂᎥ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎬᏉᏎᎯ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏭᏂᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ.
010721.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no na-ni-v, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, gv-quo-se-hi, ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv wu-ni-na-nu-go-i-s-di yi-gi, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na E-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi a-da-nv-te-s-gv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi.

010722.english: Many will say to me in that day, Lord, Lord, have we not prophesied in thy name? and in thy name have cast out devils? and in thy name done many wonderful works?
010722.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎬᎩᏪᎭᎵ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᏲᏨᏗᏍᎨ ᏲᏣᏙᎴᎰᏍᎨᎢ?  ᎠᎴ ᏝᏍᎪ ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᏲᏨᏗᏍᎨ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᏱᏙᏥᏄᎪᏫᏍᎨᎢ?  ᎠᎴ ᏝᏍᎪ ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᏲᏨᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏱᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᎢ?
010722.phonetic: Na-hi-yu i-ga ge-se-s-di u-ni-tsa-ti-s-di hi-a nv-da-gv-gi-we-ha-li; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, tla-s-go de-tsa-do-v yo-tsv-di-s-ge yo-tsa-do-le-ho-s-ge-i?  A-le tla-s-go de-tsa-do-v yo-tsv-di-s-ge a-ni-s-gi-na yi-do-tsi-nu-go-wi-s-ge-i?  A-le tla-s-go de-tsa-do-v yo-tsv-di-s-ge u-tsa-ti u-s-qua-ni-go-di yi-do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-i?

010723.english: And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work iniquity.
010723.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎦᏥᏪᏎᎵ; ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏱᏨᎦᏔᎮᎢ; ᎤᏟ ᏫᏥᎶᎯ ᎤᏲ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ.
010723.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-da-ga-tsi-we-se-li; v-tla i-lv-hi-yu yi-tsv-ga-ta-he-i; u-tli wi-tsi-lo-hi u-yo di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi.

010724.english: Therefore whosoever heareth these sayings of mine, and doeth them, I will liken him unto a wise man, which built his house upon a rock:
010724.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎩᎶ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏥᏪᎠ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏙᏓᎦᏥᏯᏟᎶᏍᏔᏂ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏲᎯ ᏧᏁᏍᎨᎮᎢ;
010724.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-ni-v gi-lo hi-a tsi-ni-tsi-we-a a-na-dv-gi-s-ge-s-di, a-le na-s-gi na-na-dv-ne-he-s-di, a-ga-ta-hna-i a-s-ga-ya do-da-ga-tsi-ya-tli-lo-s-ta-ni, na-s-gi nv-yo-hi tsu-ne-s-ge-he-i;

010725.english: And the rain descended, and the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat upon that house; and it fell not: for it was founded upon a rock.
010725.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏧᎦᎿᎭᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᏃᎱᎦᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏃᎸᏁᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏥᏚᏱᎶᎴᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏲᏤᎢ, ᏅᏥᎯᏰᏃ ᎦᎧᎮᎢ.
010725.phonetic: Hna-quo-no tsu-ga-hna-ne-i, a-le tsi-du-no-hu-ga-ne-i, a-le tsu-no-lv-ne-i, na-hna a-da-ne-lv tsi-du-yi-lo-le-i; a-se-no v-tla yu-yo-tse-i, nv-tsi-hi-ye-no ga-ka-he-i.

010726.english: And every one that heareth these sayings of mine, and doeth them not, shall be likened unto a foolish man, which built his house upon the sand:
010726.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏥᏪᎠ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎫ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏗᎨᎦᏟᎶᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏃᏳᎯ ᏧᏁᏍᎨᎮᎢ.
010726.phonetic: Na-ni-v-no gi-lo hi-a tsi-ni-tsi-we-a a-na-dv-gi-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi-no na-na-dv-ne-hv-na i-ge-se-s-di, u-ne-gu a-s-ga-ya di-ge-ga-tli-lo-s-do-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi no-yu-hi tsu-ne-s-ge-he-i.
