011818.english: Verily I say unto you, Whatsoever ye shall bind on earth shall be bound in heaven: and whatsoever ye shall loose on earth shall be loosed in heaven.
011818.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎸᎢᎮᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎦᎸᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ; ᏂᎦᎥᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎸᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎦᎸᎩᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ.
011818.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di i-tsa-lv-i-he-s-di e-lo-hi, ga-lv-s-di ge-se-s-di ga-lv-la-di; ni-ga-v-no go-hu-s-di i-tsa-lv-gi-s-ge-s-di e-lo-hi ga-lv-gi-s-di ge-se-s-di ga-lv-la-di.

011819.english: Again I say unto you, That if two of you shall agree on earth as touching any thing that they shall ask, it shall be done for them of my Father which is in heaven.
011819.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏤᏙᎭ ᎠᎾᎵᎪᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏔᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ.
011819.phonetic: A-le-wo hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; i-yu-no a-ni-ta-li ni-hi tsi-tse-do-ha a-na-li-go-hv-s-ge-s-di a-ni e-lo-hi ni-ga-v-quo go-hu-s-di a-ni-ta-yo-hi-he-s-di, na-s-gi i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-se-s-di E-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi.

011820.english: For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I in the midst of them.
011820.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏢᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏦᎢ ᏥᏓᏂᎳᏫᎣ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᏆᏓᏑᏲᎢ.
011820.phonetic: I-lv-hi-tlv-ye-no a-ni-ta-li a-le a-ni-tso-i tsi-da-ni-la-wi-o a-yv da-qua-do-v tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go-i, na-hna a-ye-li a-qua-da-su-yo-i.

011821.english: Then came Peter to him, and said, Lord, how oft shall my brother sin against me, and I forgive him? till seven times?
011821.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎤᎷᏤᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎢᎳᎪ ᎾᎩᏍᎦᏅᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏦᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎢᏥᏯᏙᎵᎨᏍᏗ?  ᎦᎵᏉᎩᏍᎪ?
011821.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qui-da u-lu-tse-lv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, i-la-go na-gi-s-ga-nv-tse-he-s-di tso-s-da-da-nv-tli, a-si-quo i-tsi-ya-do-li-ge-s-di?  Ga-li-quo-gi-s-go?

011822.english: Jesus saith unto him, I say not unto thee, Until seven times: but, Until seventy times seven.
011822.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎦᎵᏉᎩᏉ ᏱᎬᏲᏎᎭ, ᎦᎵᏆᏍᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎸᏉᎩ ᎢᏳᎶᏒᎯ.
011822.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla ga-li-quo-gi-quo yi-gv-yo-se-ha, ga-li-qua-s-go-hi-s-gi-ni ga-lv-quo-gi i-yu-lo-sv-hi.

011823.english: Therefore is the kingdom of heaven likened unto a certain king, which would take account of his servants.
011823.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᎩᎶ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᏓᏅᏖᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᏚᏚᎬ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ.
011823.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv na-s-gi-ya-quo gi-lo U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-da-nv-te-le o-s-dv i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi du-du-gv tsu-nv-si-da-s-di.

011824.english: And when he had begun to reckon, one was brought unto him, which owed him ten thousand talents.
011824.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎲ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏄᏅᏁᎸ, ᏌᏉ ᎠᎦᏘᏃᎮᎴ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏆᏗᏅᏛ ᎠᏕᎸ ᎤᏚᎩ.
011824.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-na-le-nv-hv o-s-dv nu-nv-ne-lv, sa-quo a-ga-ti-no-he-le a-s-go-hi i-yu-qua-di-nv-dv a-de-lv u-du-gi.

011825.english: But forasmuch as he had not to pay, his lord commanded him to be sold, and his wife, and children, and all that he had, and payment to be made.
011825.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏴᏙᏗ ᏄᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎤᎾᏝᎢ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎠᏥᎾᏗᏅᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎲᎢ, ᎠᏓᏴᏗᏱᏃ.
011825.phonetic: A-se-no go-hu-s-di u-da-yv-do-di nu-hv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di, u-na-tla-i u-ne-tse a-tsi-na-di-nv-di-yi a-le u-da-li-i a-le tsu-we-tsi a-le ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di u-hv-i, a-da-yv-di-yi-no.

011826.english: The servant therefore fell down, and worshipped him, saying, Lord, have patience with me, and I will pay thee all.
011826.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ, ᏍᎩᏙᎵᎩ ᏍᎩᎦᏘᏓ, ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏓᎬᏯᎫᏴᎡᎵ.
011826.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di e-la-di u-da-nv-ne-i, a-le u-da-do-li-s-da-ne-le-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; S-gi-na-tla-i, s-gi-do-li-gi s-gi-ga-ti-da, ni-ga-dv-no da-gv-ya-gu-yv-e-li.

011827.english: Then the lord of that servant was moved with compassion, and loosed him, and forgave him the debt.
011827.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏝᎢ ᎤᏪᏙᎵᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᎧᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎤᏪᎵᏎᎴᎢ.
011827.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di u-na-tla-i u-we-do-li-tse-i, a-le u-we-ka-ne-i, a-le u-du-gv u-ne-la-gi u-we-li-se-le-i.

011828.english: But the same servant went out, and found one of his fellowservants, which owed him an hundred pence: and he laid hands on him, and took him by the throat, saying, Pay me that thou owest.
011828.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏄᎪᏨ, ᎤᏩᏛᎮ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏨᎯ ᎤᎫᏴᎡᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᎠᎩᏏ ᏧᎾᎬᏩᎶᏗ; ᎤᏂᏴᎮᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏴᏍᎩᏴᎮᎢ; ᏍᏆᎫᏴᏏ ᏥᎬᏚᎦ, ᎤᏛᏁᎢ.
011828.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-gi na a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di u-nu-go-tsv, u-wa-dv-he a-si-yv-wi i-tsu-la-ha ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di na-s-gi u-ne-tsv-hi u-gu-yv-e-di-yi a-s-go-hi-tsu-qui a-gi-si tsu-na-gv-wa-lo-di; u-ni-yv-he-no, a-le u-yv-s-gi-yv-he-i; s-qua-gu-yv-si tsi-gv-du-ga, u-dv-ne-i.

011829.english: And his fellowservant fell down at his feet, and besought him, saying, Have patience with me, and I will pay thee all.
011829.cherokee: ᎢᏧᎳᎭᏃ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏚᎳᏍᎬ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏁ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏍᎩᏙᎵᎩ ᏍᎩᎦᏘᏓ, ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏓᎬᏯᎫᏴᎡᎵ.
011829.phonetic: I-tsu-la-ha-no ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di du-la-s-gv e-la-di u-da-nv-ne u-da-do-li-s-da-ne-le-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; S-gi-do-li-gi s-gi-ga-ti-da, ni-ga-dv-no da-gv-ya-gu-yv-e-li.

011830.english: And he would not: but went and cast him into prison, till he should pay the debt.
011830.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏬᎯᏳᏁᎢ, ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱᏉ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᏭᏴᏔᏁ ᎤᎫᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᏥᏚᎬ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ.
011830.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla yu-wo-hi-yu-ne-i, di-da-s-du-di-yi-quo wu-lo-se-i, a-le na-hna wu-yv-ta-ne u-gu-yv-di-yi a-tsi-du-gv i-go-hi-dv.

011831.english: So when his fellowservants saw what was done, they were very sorry, and came and told unto their lord all that was done.
011831.cherokee: ᎾᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏲ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎷᏤ ᎤᏂᏃᏁᎴ ᏧᏂᎾᏝᎢ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸᎢ.
011831.phonetic: Na-quo-no na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di u-na-do-le-ho-sv nu-li-s-ta-nv-i u-tsa-ti u-yo u-ni-ye-lv-ne-i, a-le u-ni-lu-tse u-ni-no-ne-le tsu-ni-na-tla-i ni-ga-dv nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv-i.

011832.english: Then his lord, after that he had called him, said unto him, O thou wicked servant, I forgave thee all that debt, because thou desiredst me:
011832.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎾᏝᎢ ᏭᏯᏅᎲ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏣᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎬᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎬᏰᎵᏎᎸᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏂᎯ ᏥᎬᏚᎬᎩ, ᏍᎩᏔᏲᏎᎸ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
011832.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-na-tla-i wu-ya-nv-hv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; tsa-ne-gu-tsi-dv gv-nv-si-da-s-di, u-ne-la-gi gv-ye-li-se-lv-gi ni-ga-dv ni-hi tsi-gv-du-gv-gi, s-gi-ta-yo-se-lv i-yu-s-di.

011833.english: Shouldest not thou also have had compassion on thy fellowservant, even as I had pity on thee?
011833.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎦᎯᏯᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎡᏍᏗᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎬᏯᏙᎵᏨᎢ?
011833.phonetic: Tla-s-go na-s-quo ni-hi ga-hi-ya-do-li-s-di yi-ge-se i-tsu-la-ha e-s-di-nv-si-da-s-di, na-s-gi-ya gv-ya-do-li-tsv-i?

011834.english: And his lord was wroth, and delivered him to the tormentors, till he should pay all that was due unto him.
011834.cherokee: ᎤᏔᎳᏭᏎᏃ ᎤᎾᏝᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏚᏲᎯᏎᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏍᏚᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᎫᏴᎰᎲᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏥᏚᎬ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ.
011834.phonetic: U-ta-la-wu-se-no u-na-tla-i, a-le wi-du-yo-hi-se-le di-na-da-s-du-hv-s-gi u-gu-yv-ho-hv-s-di-yi ni-ga-dv a-tsi-du-gv i-go-hi-dv.

011835.english: So likewise shall my heavenly Father do also unto you, if ye from your hearts forgive not every one his brother their trespasses.
011835.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏓᏨᏴᏁᎵ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏗᏥᏙᎵᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏟ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
011835.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo nv-da-tsv-yv-ne-li e-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi, i-yu-no di-tsa-da-nv-dv i-yv-dv i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv ni-di-tsi-do-li-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di i-tsa-da-nv-tli u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

011901.english: And it came to pass, that when Jesus had finished these sayings, he departed from Galilee, and came into the coasts of Judaea beyond Jordan;
011901.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᏥᏌ ᎤᏍᏆᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎢ, ᎨᎵᎵ ᎤᏓᏅᏒᎩ, ᏧᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᏛ ᏭᎷᏨᎩ ᏦᏓᏂ ᎠᏍᎪᏂᏗᏢ.
011901.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi, Tsi-sa u-s-qua-dv na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-we-s-gv-i, Ge-li-li u-da-nv-sv-gi, Tsu-di-yi a-s-dv wu-lu-tsv-gi Tso-da-ni a-s-go-ni-di-tlv.

011902.english: And great multitudes followed him; and he healed them there.

011903.english: The Pharisees also came unto him, tempting him, and saying unto him, Is it lawful for a man to put away his wife for every cause?
011903.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸ ᎬᏩᎪᎵᏰᏍᎬᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎲᎩ; ᏚᏳᎪᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏓᎢᏅᏗᏱ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏴᏗᎵᏰᎢᎸᏍᏗᎭ?
011903.phonetic: A-ni-qua-li-si na-s-quo gv-wa-lu-tse-lv gv-wa-go-li-ye-s-gv-gi, hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-hv-gi; Du-yu-go-di-s-go a-s-ga-ya u-da-i-nv-di-yi u-da-li-i ni-ga-v-quo go-hu-s-di yv-di-li-ye-i-lv-s-di-ha?

011904.english: And he answered and said unto them, Have ye not read, that he which made them at the beginning made them male and female,
011904.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎪᎵᏰᎣ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏧᏪᏢᏅᎯ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏚᏬᏢᏅᎢ?
011904.phonetic: U-ne-tsv-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Tla-s-go yi-tsi-go-li-ye-o, na-s-gi di-da-le-ni-s-gv tsu-we-tlv-nv-hi a-s-ga-ya a-le a-ge-yv du-wo-tlv-nv-i?

011905.english: And said, For this cause shall a man leave father and mother, and shall cleave to his wife: and they twain shall be one flesh?
011905.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏕᎬᏕᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏜᏓᏫᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎸᎢ?
011905.phonetic: A-le hi-a nu-we-sv-i; Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya de-gv-de-ge-s-di u-do-da a-le u-tsi, a-le a-dla-wi-s-di-s-ge-s-di u-da-li-i, a-le na-s-gi a-ni-ta-li sa-quo-quo u-ni-que-da-lv-i?

011906.english: Wherefore they are no more twain, but one flesh. What therefore God hath joined together, let not man put asunder.
011906.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏱᎩ; ᏌᏉᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎸᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏭᏓᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᏱᏚᎦᎴᏅᏔᏁᏍᏗ.
011906.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di v-tla hna-quo a-ni-ta-li yi-gi; sa-quo-quo-s-gi-ni u-ni-que-da-lv-i.  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-wu-da-ta-nv-hi ge-sv tle-s-di yv-wi yi-du-ga-le-nv-ta-ne-s-di.

011907.english: They say unto him, Why did Moses then command to give a writing of divorcement, and to put her away?
011907.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᏱᏏ ᏧᏁᏤ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎦᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᏗᎦᎴᏅᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᎯᏓᏍᏗᏱ?
011907.phonetic: Hi-a-no nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do-no Yi-si tsu-ne-tse go-we-li ga-nv-ne-di-yi di-ga-le-nv-do-di, a-le a-ge-hi-da-s-di-yi?

011908.english: He saith unto them, Moses because of the hardness of your hearts suffered you to put away your wives: but from the beginning it was not so.
011908.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏗᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ ᎼᏏ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᏓᏂᎨᏙᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏓᎵᎢ, ᎢᏤᎵᏎᎸᎩ; ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏕᎢ.
011908.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; di-s-da-yi-yu ge-sv i-yu-s-di di-tsi-na-wi Mo-si u-na-ne-la-gi da-ni-ge-do-hi-he-s-di tsu-na-da-li-i, i-tse-li-se-lv-gi; di-da-le-ni-s-gv-s-gi-ni v-tla na-s-gi yi-nu-s-de-i.

011909.english: And I say unto you, Whosoever shall put away his wife, except it be for fornication, and shall marry another, committeth adultery: and whoso marrieth her which is put away doth commit adultery.
011909.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎩᎶ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎢᎠᎨᎯᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏧᏂᏏᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎢᎠᏓᏰᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏓᏲᏁᎮᏍᏗ.  ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᏥᎨᎯᏙᎸᎯ ᎠᏓᏰᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏲᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
011909.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Gi-lo u-da-li-i i-a-ge-hi-do-he-s-di tsu-ni-si-nv-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv i-ge-se-s-di, nv-wa-da-le-no i-a-da-ye-ge-s-di, a-da-yo-ne-he-s-di.  Gi-lo-no a-tsi-ge-hi-do-lv-hi a-da-ye-ge-s-di a-da-yo-ne-he-s-di.

011910.english: His disciples say unto him, If the case of the man be so with his wife, it is not good to marry.
011910.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᏓᎾᏤᎲᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏕᏒᎲᏍᏗᏱ.
011910.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; I-yu-no na-s-gi yi-nu-s-di a-s-ga-ya u-da-li-i da-na-tse-hv-i, v-tla o-si-yu yi-gi a-de-sv-hv-s-di-yi.

011911.english: But he said unto them, All men cannot receive this saying, save they to whom it is given.
011911.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏥ Ꮻ ᏱᏙᎬᎾᏓᏂᎸᎩ, ᎨᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏅᏒ.
011911.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi, V-tla na-ni-v hi-a tsi-ni-tsi wi yi-do-gv-na-da-ni-lv-gi, ge-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi u-nv-sv.

011912.english: For there are some eunuchs, which were so born from their mother's womb: and there are some eunuchs, which were made eunuchs of men: and there be eunuchs, which have made themselves eunuchs for the kingdom of heaven's sake. He that is able to receive it, let him receive it.
011912.cherokee: ᎠᏁᎭᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᎾᎵ ᏅᏩᎾᏍᏙ ᏧᏂᏥ ᎬᏩᏂᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏁᎭ ᎠᏂᎾᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᏂᎾᎵᏛᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏁᎭ ᎠᏂᎾᎵ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏓᎾᎵᏛᎯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎵᏰᎢᎸᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.  ᎩᎶ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏓᏂᎸᎨᏍᏗ.
011912.phonetic: A-ne-ha-ye-no a-ni-na-li nv-wa-na-s-do tsu-ni-tsi gv-wa-ni-na-nu-go-wi-sv, a-le a-ne-ha a-ni-na-li yv-wi gv-wa-ni-na-li-dv-hi, a-le a-ne-ha a-ni-na-li u-nv-sv u-na-da-na-li-dv-hi ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv di-li-ye-i-lv-s-di-s-gv-i.  Gi-lo di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi da-da-ni-lv-ge-s-di.

011913.english: Then were there brought unto him little children, that he should put his hands on them, and pray: and the disciples rebuked them.
011913.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏓᎦᏘᏃᎮᎸᎩ ᏧᎾᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏏᏔᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᏚᏂᏅᏍᏓᏕᎸᎩ.
011913.phonetic: Hna-quo-no da-ga-ti-no-he-lv-gi tsu-na-s-di di-ni-yo-li na-s-gi tsu-si-ta-di-s-di-yi a-le u-da-do-li-s-do-di-yi; gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no du-ni-nv-s-da-de-lv-gi.

011914.english: But Jesus said, Suffer little children, and forbid them not, to come unto me: for of such is the kingdom of heaven.
011914.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᏗᏤᎵᏏ ᏧᎾᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏅᏍᏓᏕᎸᎩ ᎬᎩᎷᏤᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏄᎾᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ.
011914.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; U-na-ne-la-gi di-tse-li-si tsu-na-s-di di-ni-yo-li, a-le tle-s-di di-tsi-nv-s-da-de-lv-gi gv-gi-lu-tse-di-yi; na-s-gi-ye-no nu-na-s-di ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv.

011915.english: And he laid his hands on them, and departed thence.

011916.english: And, behold, one came and said unto him, Good Master, what good thing shall I do, that I may have eternal life?
011916.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᎷᏤᎸᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎰᏍᏛ ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏓᎦᏛᏁᎵ ᎠᎩᏩᏛᏙᏗ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ?
011916.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-no a-si-yv-wi u-lu-tse-lv-gi hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ho-s-dv Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ga-do u-s-di o-s-dv go-hu-s-di da-ga-dv-ne-li a-gi-wa-dv-do-di wi-na-s-dv-na gv-ni-dv?

011917.english: And he said unto him, Why callest thou me good? there is none good but one, that is, God: but if thou wilt enter into life, keep the commandments.
011917.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎰᏍᏛ ᎢᏍᏉᏎᎭ?  ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏱᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏫᏣᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏘᏍᏆᏂᎪᏓ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
011917.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do-no ho-s-dv i-s-quo-se-ha?  V-tla gi-lo o-s-dv yi-gi sa-quo u-wa-sv-hi-yu, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi.  A-se-no tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di gv-ni-dv di-ge-sv wi-tsa-na-nu-go-i-s-di-yi ti-s-qua-ni-go-da di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

011918.english: He saith unto him, Which? Jesus said, Thou shalt do no murder, Thou shalt not commit adultery, Thou shalt not steal, Thou shalt not bear false witness,
011918.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ?  ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᎡᎩ; ᎯᎠ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᎸᎩ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᏲᏁᎸᎩ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏃᏍᎩᏒᎩ; ᏓᎾᏓᏱᎵᏙᎲ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏣᏃᎮᎸᎩ;
011918.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do u-s-di?  Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-e-gi; Hi-a, Tle-s-di tsa-da-lv-gi; Tle-s-di tsa-da-yo-ne-lv-gi; Tle-s-di tsa-no-s-gi-sv-gi; da-na-da-yi-li-do-hv Tle-s-di ga-ye-go-gi tsa-no-he-lv-gi;

011919.english: Honour thy father and thy mother: and, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.
011919.cherokee: ᎯᎸᏉᏕᏍᏗ ᏣᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏥ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ; ᏨᏒ ᏂᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒ ᏂᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏓᎳ.
011919.phonetic: Hi-lv-quo-de-s-di tsa-do-da a-le tsa-tsi; a-le na-s-quo hi-a; Tsv-sv ni-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv ni-ge-yu-se-s-di na-v i-di-s-da-da-la.

011920.english: The young man saith unto him, All these things have I kept from my youth up: what lack I yet?
011920.cherokee: ᎠᏫᏅ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᎩᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᏅ ᏥᏧᏣ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎦᏙ ᎠᏏ ᎠᎩᎷᎳ?
011920.phonetic: A-wi-nv hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-dv da-gi-ka-hna-wa-de-nv tsi-tsu-tsa ge-sv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv, ga-do a-si a-gi-lu-la?

011921.english: Jesus said unto him, If thou wilt be perfect, go and sell that thou hast, and give to the poor, and thou shalt have treasure in heaven: and come and follow me.
011921.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏣᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎮᎾ, ᏫᎾᏚᎦ ᏣᎿᎭᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏘᎲᏏ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏃ ᏫᏣᎮᏍᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᏖᏒ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᏒᎭ.
011921.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; I-yu-no tsa-s-qua-di-s-di-yi tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di, he-na, wi-na-du-ga tsa-hna-v-i, a-le ti-hv-si u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi, ga-lv-la-di-no wi-tsa-he-s-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di; a-le te-sv s-gi-s-da-wa-de-sv-ha.

011922.english: But when the young man heard that saying, he went away sorrowful: for he had great possessions.
011922.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏫᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏓᏅᏒᎩ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏅᎩ, ᎤᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎩ.
011922.phonetic: A-se-no a-wi-nv na-s-gi u-dv-ga-nv u-da-nv-sv-gi u-yo-i-yu u-ye-lv-nv-gi, u-tsa-ti-ye-no u-we-hna-i-yu ge-sv-gi.

011923.english: Then said Jesus unto his disciples, Verily I say unto you, That a rich man shall hardly enter into the kingdom of heaven.
011923.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᏭᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
011923.phonetic: Hna-quo-no tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; u-we-hna-i yv-wi a-s-da-yi-yu wu-yv-s-di-yi ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

011924.english: And again I say unto you, It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle, than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of God.
011924.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎤᏟ ᎠᎯᏗᏳ ᎨᎻᎵ ᎤᎦᏛᎴᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏴᎩ ᎦᏏᏁᎾᏛᏗᏱ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢ ᏴᏫ ᏭᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
011924.phonetic: A-le-wo hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; u-tli a-hi-di-yu ge-mi-li u-ga-dv-le-hi-s-di-yi yv-gi ga-si-ne-na-dv-di-yi e-s-ga-quo u-we-hna-i yv-wi wu-yv-s-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

011925.english: When his disciples heard it, they were exceedingly amazed, saying, Who then can be saved?
011925.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏒᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ ᎦᎪᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏯᏥᏍᏕᎸ?
011925.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no u-na-dv-ga-nv u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-sv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi Ga-go-no ye-li ya-tsi-s-de-lv?

011926.english: But Jesus beheld them, and said unto them, With men this is impossible; but with God all things are possible.
011926.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏅ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏴᏫ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏅᎦᎵᏍᏓ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏉ.
011926.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no na-s-gi du-ka-hna-nv hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Yv-wi ge-sv v-tla na-s-gi yi-nv-ga-li-s-da, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-quo.

011927.english: Then answered Peter and said unto him, Behold, we have forsaken all, and followed thee; what shall we have therefore?
011927.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏙᎩᏲᏐᏅ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏍᏓᏩᏕᏅ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏲᏥᏩᏛᎯ?
011927.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qui-da u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Gv-ni-yu-quo a-yv ni-ga-di-yu do-gi-yo-so-nv a-le i-tsv-s-da-wa-de-nv; ga-do-no a-yv da-yo-tsi-wa-dv-hi?

011928.english: And Jesus said unto them, Verily I say unto you, That ye which have followed me, in the regeneration when the Son of man shall sit in the throne of his glory, ye also shall sit upon twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.
011928.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎠᏓᏁᏟᏴᏒᎢ, ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᏅᎭ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎤᏪᏍᎩᎸᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏁᏍᏗ ᏔᎳᏚ ᏕᎦᏍᎩᎸᎢ, ᏕᏧᎪᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎾᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᎢᏏᎵ.
011928.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; a-da-ne-tli-yv-sv-i, Yv-wi U-we-tsi ga-nv-ha ga-lv-quo-di-yu u-we-s-gi-lv-i, ni-hi s-gi-s-da-wa-dv-dv na-s-quo i-tsi-ne-s-di ta-la-du de-ga-s-gi-lv-i, de-tsu-go-da-ne-he-s-di ta-la-du na-ni-la-s-da-lv I-si-li.

011929.english: And every one that hath forsaken houses, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands, for my name's sake, shall receive an hundredfold, and shall inherit everlasting life.
011929.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎩᎶ ᏧᏅᏕᏨᎯ ᏓᏂᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏓᎵᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏁᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᎯ, ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᏂᏩᏛᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᎤᏁᏉᏨᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ.
011929.phonetic: A-le na-ni-v gi-lo tsu-nv-de-tsv-hi da-ni-ne-lv-i, a-le a-na-li-nv-tli a-le tsu-ni-do, a-le tsu-ni-do-da, a-le tsu-ni-tsi, a-le tsu-na-da-li-i, a-le tsu-ne-tsi, a-le ga-do-hi, da-qua-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di, u-ni-wa-dv-di ge-se-s-di a-s-go-hi-tsu-qui u-ne-quo-tsv-hi, a-le u-na-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-se-s-di gv-ni-dv wi-na-s-dv-na.

011930.english: But many that are first shall be last; and the last shall be first.
011930.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏔ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏥᎩ ᎣᏂᏱ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎣᏂᏱᏃ ᏥᎩ ᎢᎬᏱᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
011930.phonetic: A-se-no u-ni-tsa-ta i-gv-yi tsi-gi o-ni-yi ge-se-s-di; o-ni-yi-no tsi-gi i-gv-yi-i-ge-se-s-di.

012001.english: For the kingdom of heaven is like unto a man that is an householder, which went out early in the morning to hire labourers into his vineyard.
012001.cherokee: ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏰᏃ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᏁᎳ, ᏑᎾᎴᎢᏳ ᏧᏪᏅᏎ ᏥᏚᏅᏒᏎ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏛᏁᎯ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏚᏫᏒ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
012001.phonetic: Ga-lv-la-di-ye-no u-tse-li-go-hi na-s-gi-ya-quo a-s-ga-ya ga-ne-la, su-na-le-i-yu tsu-we-nv-se tsi-du-nv-sv-se go-hu-s-di a-na-dv-ne-hi te-lv-la-di du-wi-sv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi.

012002.english: And when he had agreed with the labourers for a penny a day, he sent them into his vineyard.
012002.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏛᏁᎯ ᏚᏄᎪᏔᏅ ᎠᎩᏏ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏧᎫᏴᎡᏗᏱ ᏏᎦ, ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏙᏧᏫᏒ ᏚᏅᏎᎢ.
012002.phonetic: Hna-quo-no na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya go-hu-s-di a-na-dv-ne-hi du-nu-go-ta-nv a-gi-si tsu-gv-wa-lo-di tsu-gu-yv-e-di-yi si-ga, te-lv-la-di do-tsu-wi-sv du-nv-se-i.

012003.english: And he went out about the third hour, and saw others standing idle in the marketplace,
012003.cherokee: ᎤᏪᏅᏎᏃ ᏐᎣᏁᎵᏁ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎪᎮ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎦᏃᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎡ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᎾᏛᎲᎾ,
012003.phonetic: U-we-nv-se-no so-o-ne-li-ne i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv-i, a-le du-go-he nv-wa-na-da-le ga-no-do-di-yi a-ni-do-na-e go-hu-s-di na-na-dv-hv-na,

012004.english: And said unto them; Go ye also into the vineyard, and whatsoever is right I will give you. And they went their way.
012004.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏤᎾ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏙᏗᏫᏒᎢ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏨᏯᎫᏴᎡᎵ.  ᎤᏁᏅᏎᏃ.
012004.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; I-tse-na na-s-quo ni-hi te-lv-la-di do-di-wi-sv-i, du-yu-go-dv-no ge-sv da-tsv-ya-gu-yv-e-li.  U-ne-nv-se-no.

012005.english: Again he went out about the sixth and ninth hour, and did likewise.
012005.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᎦ ᎢᎤᏪᏅᏎ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᎤᏒᎯᏰᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎤᏛᏁᎴᎢ.
012005.phonetic: Ta-li-ne i-ga i-u-we-nv-se a-le na-s-quo tso-i-ne i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv u-sv-hi-ye-yi, na-s-gi-ya ni-u-dv-ne-le-i.

012006.english: And about the eleventh hour he went out, and found others standing idle, and saith unto them, Why stand ye here all the day idle?
012006.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᏁᏃ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᎤᏪᏅᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏩᏛᎮ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎡ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎾ, ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏂ ᎢᏥᏙᎾᎠ ᎤᏙᏓᏆᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲᎾ?
012006.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-ne-no i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv ta-li-ne i-u-we-nv-se-i, a-le du-wa-dv-he nv-wa-na-da-le a-ni-do-na-e go-hu-s-di na-na-dv-ne-hv-na, hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i; Ga-do-no a-ni i-tsi-do-na-a u-do-da-qua-dv go-hu-s-di ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv-na?

012007.english: They say unto him, Because no man hath hired us. He saith unto them, Go ye also into the vineyard; and whatsoever is right, that shall ye receive.
012007.cherokee: ᏝᏰᎾ ᎩᎶ ᏲᎩᏅᏒ, ᎤᎾᏛᏁᎢ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏤᎾ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏙᏗᏫᏒᎢ; ᏚᏳᎪᏛᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏨᏯᎫᏴᎡᎵ.
012007.phonetic: Tla-ye-na gi-lo yo-gi-nv-sv, u-na-dv-ne-i.  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i; Ni-hi na-s-quo i-tse-na te-lv-la-di do-di-wi-sv-i; du-yu-go-dv-no ge-sv da-tsv-ya-gu-yv-e-li.

012008.english: So when even was come, the lord of the vineyard saith unto his steward, Call the labourers, and give them their hire, beginning from the last unto the first.
012008.cherokee: ᎤᏒᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ ᎤᎦᏘᏕᎯ, ᏫᏘᏯᏅ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏛᏁᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏔᎫᏴᏏ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎣᏂᏱ ᎨᏥᏅᏒᎯ ᏔᎴᏅᏓ ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏃ ᎨᏥᏅᏒᎯ ᏘᏍᏆᎸᏓ
012008.phonetic: U-sv-no nu-li-s-ta-nv, te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv u-tse-li-ga hi-a nu-we-se-le a-de-lv u-ga-ti-de-hi, Wi-ti-ya-nv go-hu-s-di a-na-dv-ne-hi a-le ta-gu-yv-si du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i, o-ni-yi ge-tsi-nv-sv-hi ta-le-nv-da i-gv-yi-yi-no ge-tsi-nv-sv-hi ti-s-qua-lv-da

012009.english: And when they came that were hired about the eleventh hour, they received every man a penny.
012009.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᏁᏃ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᎨᏥᏅᏒᎯ ᎤᏂᎷᏨ, ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎠᎩᏏ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎨᎦᎫᏴᎡᎴᎢ.
012009.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-ne-no i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv ge-tsi-nv-sv-hi u-ni-lu-tsv, a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha a-gi-si tsu-gv-wa-lo-di ge-ga-gu-yv-e-le-i.

012010.english: But when the first came, they supposed that they should have received more; and they likewise received every man a penny.
012010.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏃ ᎨᏥᏅᏒᎯ ᎤᏂᎷᏨ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏓᏲᎦᎫᏴᎡᎵ ᎤᏁᎵᏎᎢ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎩᏏᏉ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎢᎨᎦᎫᏴᎡᎴᎢ.
012010.phonetic: I-gv-yi-yi-no ge-tsi-nv-sv-hi u-ni-lu-tsv u-tli i-ga-i da-yo-ga-gu-yv-e-li u-ne-li-se-i.  A-se-no na-s-quo a-gi-si-quo tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha i-ge-ga-gu-yv-e-le-i.

012011.english: And when they had received it, they murmured against the goodman of the house,

012012.english: Saying, These last have wrought but one hour, and thou hast made them equal unto us, which have borne the burden and heat of the day.
012012.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᎣᏂᏱ ᎤᏂᎷᏨᎯ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ, ᎢᏧᎳᎭᏉᏃ ᏅᏍᎩᏴᎦ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏗᎴᎬ ᎢᎦ ᏦᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ.
012012.phonetic: Hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Hi-a o-ni-yi u-ni-lu-tsv-hi sa-quo-quo i-yu-tli-lo-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-si, i-tsu-la-ha-quo-no nv-s-gi-yv-ga a-yv na-s-gi ga-ge-sv a-le u-di-le-gv i-ga tso-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi.

012013.english: But he answered one of them, and said, Friend, I do thee no wrong: didst not thou agree with me for a penny?
012013.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᏁᏤᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎩᎾᎵᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏱᏂᎬᏴᏁᎭ.  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎣᏏ ᏱᏣᏰᎸᏁ ᎠᎩᏏ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎬᏯᎫᏴᎡᏗᏱ?
012013.phonetic: A-se-no a-si-yv-wi u-ne-tse-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Gi-na-li-i, v-tla u-tsa-ti-ni yi-ni-gv-yv-ne-ha.  Tla-s-go o-si yi-tsa-ye-lv-ne a-gi-si tsu-gv-wa-lo-di gv-ya-gu-yv-e-di-yi?

012014.english: Take that thine is, and go thy way: I will give unto this last, even as unto thee.
012014.cherokee: ᎯᎩ ᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᎴ ᏥᎮᎾ.  ᎣᏏ ᎠᎩᏰᎸ ᏥᏯᎫᏴᎡᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎣᏂᏱ ᎤᎷᏨᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎬᏯᎫᏴᎡᎸ ᎢᎦᎢ.
012014.phonetic: Hi-gi tsa-tse-li-ga a-le tsi-he-na.  O-si a-gi-ye-lv tsi-ya-gu-yv-e-di-yi hi-a o-ni-yi u-lu-tsv-hi ni-hi gv-ya-gu-yv-e-lv i-ga-i.

012015.english: Is it not lawful for me to do what I will with mine own? Is thine eye evil, because I am good?
012015.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏱᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎢᏯᏋᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᏥᏌ ᎯᎦᏙᎵ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ?
012015.phonetic: Tla-s-go du-yu-go-dv yi-gi nu-s-dv ga-da-nv-te-s-gv i-ya-quv-ne-di-yi a-qua-tse-li ge-sv-i?  Tsi-sa hi-ga-do-li u-yo-i-yu i-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di a-yv a-qua-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv-i?

012016.english: So the last shall be first, and the first last: for many be called, but few chosen.
012016.cherokee: ᎰᏩᏃ ᎣᏂᏱ ᏥᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᎬᏱᏃ ᏥᎩ ᎣᏂᏱ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.  ᎤᏂᏣᏔᏰᏃ ᎨᏥᏯᏅᎲ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏂᎦᏲᎵᏳ ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏒ.
012016.phonetic: Ho-wa-no o-ni-yi tsi-gi i-gv-yi ge-se-s-di, i-gv-yi-no tsi-gi o-ni-yi ge-se-s-di.  U-ni-tsa-ta-ye-no ge-tsi-ya-nv-hv, a-se-no a-ni-ga-yo-li-yu ge-ga-su-ye-sv.

012017.english: And Jesus going up to Jerusalem took the twelve disciples apart in the way, and said unto them,
012017.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏩᎦᏛᎢ, ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᎾᏓᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏫᏚᏘᏅᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ;
012017.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wa-ga-dv-i, ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv a-na-da-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-na-ne-la-gi i-yv-dv wi-du-ti-nv-s-ta-nv-gi, a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi;

012018.english: Behold, we go up to Jerusalem; and the Son of man shall be betrayed unto the chief priests and unto the scribes, and they shall condemn him to death,
012018.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏫᏗᎦᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏙᏓᏰᏥᏲᏏ ᏙᏓᎨᏦᏲᎯᏎᎵ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏙᏛᏄᎪᎳᏂ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ,
012018.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wi-di-ga-ti, a-le yv-wi U-we-tsi do-da-ye-tsi-yo-si do-da-ge-tso-yo-hi-se-li nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi, na-s-gi-no do-dv-nu-go-la-ni u-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi,

012019.english: And shall deliver him to the Gentiles to mock, and to scourge, and to crucify him: and the third day he shall rise again.
012019.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎫᎾᏏᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏙᏛᏂᏲᎯᏎᎵ ᎤᏂᏪᏢᎾᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎵᎥᏂᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏛᏗᏱ ᏧᏓᎿᎭᏩᏛ ᎨᏛᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎢᎦ ᏙᏛᎠᎴᏂ.
012019.phonetic: A-le gu-na-si-le-nv-dv yv-wi do-dv-ni-yo-hi-se-li u-ni-we-tlv-na-ne-di-yi, a-le u-ni-li-v-ni-s-di-yi, a-le u-na-dv-di-yi tsu-da-hna-wa-dv ge-dv-i; a-le tso-i-ne i-ga do-dv-a-le-ni.

012020.english: Then came to him the mother of Zebedee's children with her sons, worshipping him, and desiring a certain thing of him.
012020.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎷᏤᎸᎩ ᏤᏈᏘ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎤᏂᏥ, ᏓᏘᏁᎲᎩ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᏂᏫᏅ, ᎡᎳᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏔᏲᏎᎲᎩ.
012020.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-lu-tse-lv-gi Tse-qui-ti tsu-we-tsi u-ni-tsi, da-ti-ne-hv-gi tsu-we-tsi a-ni-wi-nv, e-la-di u-da-nv-nv-gi, a-le a-hu-s-di u-ta-yo-se-hv-gi.

012021.english: And he said unto her, What wilt thou? She saith unto him, Grant that these my two sons may sit, the one on thy right hand, and the other on the left, in thy kingdom.
012021.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᏣᏚᎵᎭ?  ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᏳᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎭᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏗᏇᏥ ᏧᏂᏗᏱ ᏣᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏌᏉ ᎯᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎯᎦᏍᎦᏂ.
012021.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do tsa-du-li-ha?  Hi-a nv-da-yu-we-se-lv-gi; Ha-li-s-go-lv-da hi-a a-ni-ta-li di-que-tsi tsu-ni-di-yi tsa-tse-li-go-hi ge-sv-i, sa-quo hi-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv, so-i-no hi-ga-s-ga-ni.

012022.english: But Jesus answered and said, Ye know not what ye ask. Are ye able to drink of the cup that I shall drink of, and to be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with? They say unto him, We are able.
012022.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; Ꮭ ᏱᏥ ᎦᏔᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎯᎲᎢ. ᏥᎪ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎨᏣᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎠᏟᏍᏛ ᎠᏴ ᏨᏓᎦᏗᏔᎯ, ᎠᎴᏍᎪ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏱᏕᏣᏬᏍᏓ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏨᏓᏴᏆᏬᏍᏔᏂ? ᏰᎵᏉ, ᎤᎾᏛᏅᎩ.
012022.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha nu-s-dv i-tsi-ta-yo-hi-hv-i.  Tsi-go ye-li-quo ge-tsa-di-ta-s-di u-li-s-qui-di a-tli-s-dv a-yv tsv-da-ga-di-ta-hi, a-le-s-go ye-li-quo yi-de-tsa-wo-s-da a-yv na-s-gi tsv-da-yv-qua-wo-s-ta-ni?  Ye-li-quo, u-na-dv-nv-gi.

012023.english: And he saith unto them, Ye shall drink indeed of my cup, and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with: but to sit on my right hand, and on my left, is not mine to give, but it shall be given to them for whom it is prepared of my Father.
012023.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎠᏟᏍᏛ ᏓᏣᏗᏔᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏆᏬᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏙᏓᏰᏣᏬᏍᏔᏂ.  ᏥᎦᏘᏏᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᏍᎦᏂ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏪᏗᏱ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏓᏁᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎨᏥᏁᏗᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏧᏓᏁᎳᏁᎸᎯ.
012023.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi a-qua-tse-li u-li-s-qui-di a-tli-s-dv da-tsa-di-ta-hi, a-le a-yv v-qua-wo-s-do-di ge-sv do-da-ye-tsa-wo-s-ta-ni.  Tsi-ga-ti-si-s-gi-ni a-le tsi-ga-s-ga-ni gi-lo u-we-di-yi v-tla a-yv a-qua-da-ne-di yi-gi, ge-tsi-ne-di-s-gi-ni-no-nv ge-se-s-di na-s-gi E-do-da tsu-da-ne-la-ne-lv-hi.

012024.english: And when the ten heard it, they were moved with indignation against the two brethren.
012024.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏃ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏂᏔᎳᏬᏒᎩ ᏚᏂᏂᏆᏘᎸ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ.
012024.phonetic: A-s-go-hi-no i-ya-ni-dv u-na-dv-ga-nv u-tsa-ti u-ni-ta-la-wo-sv-gi du-ni-ni-qua-ti-lv a-ni-ta-li di-na-da-nv-tli.

012025.english: But Jesus called them unto him, and said, Ye know that the princes of the Gentiles exercise dominion over them, and they that are great exercise authority upon them.
012025.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎲ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏕᎪᏢᏩᏗᏒ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎠᏂᏁᎪ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᎵᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᏂᏁᏥᏙᎲ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎰᎢ.
012025.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no wi-du-ya-nv-hv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; I-tsi-ga-ta-ha a-ye-li de-go-tlv-wa-di-sv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi a-ni-ne-go i-yu-na-dv-ne-li-da-s-di-yi yv-wi, a-le ge-tsi-lv-quo-di a-ni-ne-tsi-do-hv na-na-dv-ne-ho-i.

012026.english: But it shall not be so among you: but whosoever will be great among you, let him be your minister;
012026.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᏨᏁᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012026.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni tle-s-di na-s-gi yi-ni-tsv-ne-s-di; gi-lo-s-gi-ni a-tsi-lv-quo-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-du-li-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi e-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di ge-se-s-di.

012027.english: And whosoever will be chief among you, let him be your servant:
012027.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012027.phonetic: A-le gi-lo u-gv-wi-yu-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-du-li-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi e-tsi-na-tla-i ge-se-s-di.

012028.english: Even as the Son of man came not to be ministered unto, but to minister, and to give his life a ransom for many.
012028.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏓᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᏄᏲᎵᎸᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗᏱᏉᏍᎩᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏅᎢ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏗᎫᏴᏙᏗ.
012028.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-quo yv-wi U-we-tsi u-da-nv-si-da-s-di-yi nu-yo-li-lv-na tsi-gi, a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di-yi-quo-s-gi-ni, a-le gv-nv-i u-li-s-go-lv-do-di-yi u-ni-tsa-ti di-gu-yv-do-di.

012029.english: And as they departed from Jericho, a great multitude followed him.

012030.english: And, behold, two blind men sitting by the way side, when they heard that Jesus passed by, cried out, saying, Have mercy on us, O Lord, thou Son of David.
012030.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏗᏂᎨᏫ ᎤᏃᎱᎶᏗ ᏚᏃᎸᎩ, ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎶᏒᎢ ᎤᏁᎷᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏍᎩᏂᏙᎵᎩ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ.
012030.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-no a-ni-ta-li di-ni-ge-wi u-no-hu-lo-di du-no-lv-gi, u-na-dv-ga-nv-no tsi-sa u-lo-sv-i u-ne-lu-nv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; S-gi-ni-do-li-gi, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi De-wi u-we-tsi.

012031.english: And the multitude rebuked them, because they should hold their peace: but they cried the more, saying, Have mercy on us, O Lord, thou Son of David.
012031.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᏚᏂᏁᏤᎸᎩ ᎡᎳᏪᏱ ᎤᏅᏗᏱ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏟᏉ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏁᎷᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ, ᏍᎩᏂᏙᎵᎩ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ.
012031.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti-no du-ni-ne-tse-lv-gi e-la-we-yi u-nv-di-yi.  A-se-no u-tli-quo i-ga-i u-ne-lu-nv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi, S-gi-ni-do-li-gi, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi De-wi u-we-tsi.

012032.english: And Jesus stood still, and called them, and said, What will ye that I shall do unto you?
012032.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎴᏫᏍᏔᏅ ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᎢᏍᏓᏚᎵ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏍᏛᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ?
012032.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-le-wi-s-ta-nv wi-du-ya-nv-hv-gi, a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do i-s-da-du-li a-yv i-s-dv-ya-dv-ne-di-yi?

012033.english: They say unto him, Lord, that our eyes may be opened.
012033.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ:  ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏦᏍᏗᎦᏙᎵ ᏧᎵᏍᏚᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎣᎩᎾᏚᎵᎭ.
012033.phonetic: Hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi:  Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, tso-s-di-ga-do-li tsu-li-s-du-i-s-di-yi o-gi-na-du-li-ha.

012034.english: So Jesus had compassion on them, and touched their eyes: and immediately their eyes received sight, and they followed him.
012034.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏚᏪᏙᎵᏨ ᏗᏂᎦᏙᎵ ᏚᏒᏁᎸᎩ, ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏒᎩ.
012034.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no du-we-do-li-tsv di-ni-ga-do-li du-sv-ne-lv-gi, gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv gv-wa-ni-go-wa-dv-di nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi; a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-sv-gi.

012101.english: And when they drew nigh unto Jerusalem, and were come to Bethphage, unto the mount of Olives, then sent Jesus two disciples,
012101.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎾᎥ ᎤᏂᎷᏨ, ᏒᎦᏙᎯ, ᎣᎵᏩ ᎤᏌᎯᎸᎢ ᎢᏴᏛ, ᏥᏌ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏚᏅᏒᎩ,
012101.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-lu-si-li-mi na-v u-ni-lu-tsv, Sv-ga-do-hi, O-li-wa u-sa-hi-lv-i i-yv-dv, Tsi-sa a-ni-ta-li gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi du-nv-sv-gi,

012102.english: Saying unto them, Go into the village over against you, and straightway ye shall find an ass tied, and a colt with her: loose them, and bring them unto me.
012102.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏍᏕᎾ ᎢᏢ Ꮎ ᏨᏗᎦᏚᎭ, ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏓᏰᏍᏗᏩᏛᎯ ᏐᏈᎵ-ᏗᎦᎵᎠᏅᎯᏛ ᎨᎵᏌᏕᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎾ ᎠᏘᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᏕᏍᏕᎵᏌᏕᏒᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏍᎩᎾᏘᏃᎮᎸᎭ.
012102.phonetic: Hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; i-s-de-na i-tlv na tsv-di-ga-du-ha, gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv da-ye-s-di-wa-dv-hi so-qui-li--di-ga-li-a-nv-hi-dv ge-li-sa-de-s-di, a-le a-gi-na a-ti-ne-he-s-di, de-s-de-li-sa-de-sv-ha, a-le de-s-gi-na-ti-no-he-lv-ha.

012103.english: And if any man say ought unto you, ye shall say, The Lord hath need of them; and straightway he will send them.
012103.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏍᏙᏎᎸᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᏁᏍᏗᏪᏎᎸᎭ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏚᏚᎵᎭ; ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏙᏓᏳᏲᏏ.
012103.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo go-hu-s-di i-s-do-se-lv-ha, hi-a ne-s-di-we-se-lv-ha; U-gv-wi-yu-hi du-du-li-ha; gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv do-da-yu-yo-si.

012104.english: All this was done, that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the prophet, saying,
012104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎸᏒᎢ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎢ;
012104.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi, u-do-hi-yu-di-yi a-ye-lv-sv-i a-do-le-ho-s-gi tsu-ne-tse-i, hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-i;

012105.english: Tell ye the daughter of Sion, Behold, thy King cometh unto thee, meek, and sitting upon an ass, and a colt the foal of an ass.
012105.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏁᏥᏪᏏ ᏌᏯᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎨᏴ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏣᏤᎵ ᏓᏯᎢ, ᏓᏣᎷᏤᎵ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏳ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎩᎸᏕᏍᏗ ᏐᏈᎵ-ᏗᎦᎵᎠᏅᎯᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏛᏁᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎩᎾ.
012105.phonetic: Hi-a ne-tsi-we-si Sa-ya-ni u-we-tsi a-ge-yv; Gv-ni-yu-quo U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsa-tse-li da-ya-i, da-tsa-lu-tse-li u-da-do-li-s-di-yu, a-le u-gi-lv-de-s-di so-qui-li--di-ga-li-a-nv-hi-dv go-hu-s-di a-dv-ne-hi u-we-tsi a-gi-na.

012106.english: And the disciples went, and did as Jesus commanded them,
012106.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᏁᏅᏒᎩ, ᏥᏌ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎸ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏫᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎩ;
012106.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no u-ne-nv-sv-gi, Tsi-sa nu-ni-we-se-lv na-s-gi-ya wi-nu-na-dv-ne-lv-gi;

012107.english: And brought the ass, and the colt, and put on them their clothes, and they set him thereon.
012107.cherokee: ᏐᏈᎵ-ᏗᎦᎵᎠᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎾ ᏚᎾᏘᏃᎸᎩ; ᏗᏂᏐᎯᏱᏃ ᏧᎾᏄᏬ ᏚᏂᏢᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎤᎾᎩᎸᏔᏅᎩ.
012107.phonetic: So-qui-li--di-ga-li-a-nv-hi-dv a-le a-gi-na du-na-ti-no-lv-gi; di-ni-so-hi-yi-no tsu-na-nu-wo du-ni-tlv-nv-gi, a-le na-hna u-na-gi-lv-ta-nv-gi.

012108.english: And a very great multitude spread their garments in the way; others cut down branches from the trees, and strawed them in the way.
012108.cherokee: ᎤᏟᏃ ᎢᏯᏂᎢ ᏴᏫ ᏧᎾᏄᏬ ᏚᏂᏰᏍᏛᏅᎩ ᏅᏃᎯ, ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᏚᏅᏂᎦᎸᎲᎩ ᏧᏪᏲᏔ ᏕᏡᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏃᎯ ᏚᏂᏲᏔᏅᏅᎩ.
012108.phonetic: U-tli-no i-ya-ni-i yv-wi tsu-na-nu-wo du-ni-ye-s-dv-nv-gi nv-no-hi, i-ga-dv-no du-nv-ni-ga-lv-hv-gi tsu-we-yo-ta de-tlu-gv-i, a-le nv-no-hi du-ni-yo-ta-nv-nv-gi.

012109.english: And the multitudes that went before, and that followed, cried, saying, Hosanna to the Son of David: Blessed is he that cometh in the name of the Lord; Hosanna in the highest.
012109.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎠᏁᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏂ ᎠᏁᎩ ᎤᏁᎷᎬᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎩ; ᎰᏌᎾ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ!  ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᏥᎦᎷᎯᏍᏗᎭ!  ᎰᏌᎾ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ!
012109.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti-no i-gv-yi a-ne-gi, a-le o-ni a-ne-gi u-ne-lu-gv-gi, hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-gi; Ho-sa-na De-wi U-we-tsi!  a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di Yi-ho-wa de-u-do-v tsi-ga-lu-hi-s-di-ha!  Ho-sa-na wa-s-dv ga-lv-la-di-yu!

012110.english: And when he was come into Jerusalem, all the city was moved, saying, Who is this?
012110.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏃ ᎤᎷᏨ ᏂᎬ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎤᎾᎵᏖᎸᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎩ; ᎦᎪ ᎯᎠ?
012110.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-no u-lu-tsv ni-gv ga-du-hv u-na-li-te-lv-nv-gi, hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-gi; Ga-go hi-a?

012111.english: And the multitude said, This is Jesus the prophet of Nazareth of Galilee.
012111.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ.
012111.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti-no hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Hi-a Tsi-sa a-do-le-ho-s-gi, Na-se-li-di e-hi Ge-li-li ga-du-hv-i.

012112.english: And Jesus went into the temple of God, and cast out all them that sold and bought in the temple, and overthrew the tables of the moneychangers, and the seats of them that sold doves,
012112.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏭᏴᎸᎩ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏄᎪᏫᏒᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᎾᏕᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏩᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎷᏆᏗᏅᏒᎩ ᏚᏂᏍᎩᎸ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏗᏂᏁᏟᏴᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎫᎴ ᏗᏂᏍᎪᏂᎯ ᏗᏂᎾᏕᎩ ᎤᎾᏅᏗᏱ.
012112.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no wu-yv-lv-gi u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, a-le du-nu-go-wi-sv-gi ni-ga-dv a-ni-na-de-gi a-le u-ni-wa-s-gi na-hna di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le du-lu-qua-di-nv-sv-gi du-ni-s-gi-lv a-de-lv di-ni-ne-tli-yv-s-gi, a-le gu-le di-ni-s-go-ni-hi di-ni-na-de-gi u-na-nv-di-yi.

012113.english: And said unto them, It is written, My house shall be called the house of prayer; but ye have made it a den of thieves.
012113.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ; ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎦᎵᏦᏕ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎦᎵᏦᏕ ᏚᏙᎡᏍᏗ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᏨᏁᎸ.
012113.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Hi-a ni-gv-nv-go-we-la; A-qua-tse-li ga-li-tso-de a-da-do-li-s-do-di-yi ga-li-tso-de du-do-e-s-di; a-se-no hi-a a-ni-no-s-gi-s-gi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi ni-tsv-ne-lv.

012114.english: And the blind and the lame came to him in the temple; and he healed them.
012114.cherokee: ᏗᏂᎨᏫᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏲᎤᎵ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸᎩ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏅᏩᏅᎩ.
012114.phonetic: Di-ni-ge-wi-no a-le di-ni-yo-u-li gv-wa-lu-tse-lv-gi di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le du-nv-wa-nv-gi.

012115.english: And when the chief priests and scribes saw the wonderful things that he did, and the children crying in the temple, and saying, Hosanna to the Son of David; they were sore displeased,
012115.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᎤᏁᎷᎬ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎢ, ᎰᏌᎾ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ!  ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏂᏐᏅᏤᎸᎩ;
012115.phonetic: Hna-quo-no nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi u-na-do-le-ho-sv u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, a-le di-ni-yo-li u-ne-lu-gv u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-i, Ho-sa-na De-wi U-we-tsi!  u-tsa-ti u-ni-so-nv-tse-lv-gi;

012116.english: And said unto him, Hearest thou what these say? And Jesus saith unto them, Yea; have ye never read, Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings thou hast perfected praise?
012116.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎭᏛᎩᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏥᎾᏂᏪᎭ?  ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᎥ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎯᎸᎯᏳ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏥᎪᎵᏰᎣᎢ; ᏧᎾᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏍᏓᎢ ᎠᏂᎰᎵ ᎤᏄᎪᏨᎯ ᏣᏩᏛᏙᏔᏅ ᎡᏣᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ?
012116.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ha-dv-gi-s-go hi-a tsi-na-ni-we-ha?  Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; V-v, Tla-s-go hi-lv-hi-yu hi-a yi-tsi-go-li-ye-o-i; Tsu-na-s-di di-ni-yo-li a-le di-ni-s-da-i a-ni-ho-li u-nu-go-tsv-hi tsa-wa-dv-do-ta-nv e-tsa-lv-quo-do-di-yi?

012117.english: And he left them, and went out of the city into Bethany; and he lodged there.
012117.cherokee: ᏚᏓᏅᎡᎸᎩᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎤᏄᎪᏨᎩ, ᏇᏗᏂᏱ ᏭᎷᏨᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏒᎸᎩ.
012117.phonetic: Du-da-nv-e-lv-gi-no, a-le ga-du-hv u-nu-go-tsv-gi, Que-di-ni-yi wu-lu-tsv-gi, a-le na-hna u-sv-lv-gi.

012118.english: Now in the morning as he returned into the city, he hungered.

012119.english: And when he saw a fig tree in the way, he came to it, and found nothing thereon, but leaves only, and said unto it, Let no fruit grow on thee henceforward for ever. And presently the fig tree withered away.
012119.cherokee: ᎤᎪᎲᏃ ᏒᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬ ᏅᏃᎱᎶᏗ, ᎾᎿᎭᏭᎷᏨᎩ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏳᏩᏛᎮᎢ, ᎤᎳᏍᏚᏒ ᎤᏩᏒ; ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏱᏣᏓᏔᏁᏍᏗ.  ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏒᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬ ᎤᏩᏴᏒᎩ.
012119.phonetic: U-go-hv-no sv-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di tlu-gv nv-no-hu-lo-di, na-hna wu-lu-tsv-gi; a-se-no v-tla go-hu-s-di yu-wa-dv-he-i, u-la-s-du-sv u-wa-sv; hi-a-no nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tle-s-di i-lv-hi-yu go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv yi-tsa-da-ta-ne-s-di.  Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv sv-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di tlu-gv u-wa-yv-sv-gi.

012120.english: And when the disciples saw it, they marvelled, saying, How soon is the fig tree withered away!
012120.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᏂᎪᎲ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏒᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎾᏞᎬᏉ ᎬᏴᎯ ᏒᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬᎢ!
012120.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no u-ni-go-hv u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-sv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Na-tle-gv-quo gv-yv-hi sv-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di tlu-gv-i!

012121.english: Jesus answered and said unto them, Verily I say unto you, If ye have faith, and doubt not, ye shall not only do this which is done to the fig tree, but also if ye shall say unto this mountain, Be thou removed, and be thou cast into the sea; it shall be done.
012121.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏦᎯᏳᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏣᏜᏓᏏᏛᎡᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎯᎠᏉ ᏒᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬ ᏥᎾᎬᎦ ᏱᏅᎨᏣᏛᎦ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᏥᏪᏎᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏦᏓᎸ, ᎭᏓᏅᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᏪᏣᏚᎦ, ᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ.
012121.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; i-yu-no yi-tso-hi-yu-ha, a-le ni-tsa-dla-si-dv-e-hv-na yi-gi, v-tla hi-a-quo sv-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di tlu-gv tsi-na-gv-ga yi-nv-ge-tsa-dv-ga, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni hi-a yi-ni-tsi-we-se-lv hi-a tso-da-lv, Ha-da-nv-na, a-le a-me-quo-hi we-tsa-du-ga, a-se na-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di.

012122.english: And all things, whatsoever ye shall ask in prayer, believing, ye shall receive.
012122.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
012122.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-no go-hu-s-di i-tsi-ta-yo-hi-he-s-di, i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-i, i-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di, i-tsi-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di.

012123.english: And when he was come into the temple, the chief priests and the elders of the people came unto him as he was teaching, and said, By what authority doest thou these things? and who gave thee this authority?
012123.cherokee: ᎤᏛᎾᏃ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎷᏨ, ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏛᏐᏅᎯ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸᎩ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᏣᏁᏤᎸᎯ?
012123.phonetic: U-dv-na-no di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi u-lu-tsv, nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le tsu-na-dv-so-nv-hi yv-wi a-ne-hv gv-wa-lu-tse-lv-gi da-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ga-do tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-di hi-a na-s-gi tsi-de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha?  A-le ga-go tsa-ne-tse-lv-hi?

012124.english: And Jesus answered and said unto them, I also will ask you one thing, which if ye tell me, I in like wise will tell you by what authority I do these things.
012124.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏑᏓᎴᎩ ᏓᏨᏯᏛᏛᏂ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏍᎩᏃᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏨᏃᏁᎵ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ.
012124.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; a-yv na-s-gi su-da-le-gi da-tsv-ya-dv-dv-ni, i-yu-no na-s-gi i-s-gi-no-ne-lv na-s-gi a-yv da-tsv-no-ne-li i-yu-s-di a-qua-li-s-ga-s-do-dv-i, hi-a na-s-gi tsi-da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha.

012125.english: The baptism of John, whence was it? from heaven, or of men? And they reasoned with themselves, saying, If we shall say, From heaven; he will say unto us, Why did ye not then believe him?
012125.cherokee: ᏣᏂ ᏥᏓᏓᏬᏍᎬᎩ ᎭᏢ ᏧᏓᎴᏁᎢ? ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏍᎪ, ᏴᏫᏉᎨ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏧᏓᎴᏁᎢ?  ᎡᎳᏪᏱᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ, ᏲᎦᏛᏅ, ᎦᏙᏃ Ꮭ ᏱᎡᏦᎢᏳᏁᎢ?  ᏲᎪᏏ.
012125.phonetic: Tsa-ni tsi-da-da-wo-s-gv-gi ha-tlv tsu-da-le-ne-i? Ga-lv-la-di-s-go, yv-wi-quo-ge a-ne-hv tsu-da-le-ne-i?  E-la-we-yi-no u-na-da-nv-te-lv-gi, hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-gi; i-yu-no ga-lv-la-di, yo-ga-dv-nv, Ga-do-no tla yi-e-tso-i-yu-ne-i?  Yo-go-si.

012126.english: But if we shall say, Of men; we fear the people; for all hold John as a prophet.
012126.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏧᏓᎴᏁᎢ ᏲᎦᏛᏅ, ᏙᏥᏍᎦᎢᎭᏉ ᏴᏫ; ᏂᎦᏛᏰᏃ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᎭ ᏣᏂ.
012126.phonetic: I-yu-no yv-wi-quo a-ne-hv tsu-da-le-ne-i yo-ga-dv-nv, do-tsi-s-ga-i-ha-quo yv-wi; ni-ga-dv-ye-no a-do-le-ho-s-gi u-ni-ye-lv-ha Tsa-ni.

012127.english: And they answered Jesus, and said, We cannot tell. And he said unto them, Neither tell I you by what authority I do these things.
012127.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸ ᏥᏌ; ᎥᏝ ᏲᏥᎦᏔᎭ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏴᎨᏨᏃᎲᏏ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛᎢ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ.
012127.phonetic: U-ni-ne-tsv-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv Tsi-sa; V-tla yo-tsi-ga-ta-ha.  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla na-s-quo a-yv yv-ge-tsv-no-hv-si i-yu-s-di a-qua-li-s-ga-s-do-dv-i hi-a na-s-gi tsi-da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha.

012128.english: But what think ye? A certain man had two sons; and he came to the first, and said, Son, go work to day in my vineyard.
012128.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᏙ ᎢᏤᎵᎭ?  ᎩᎶ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏁᎮᎢ; ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏭᎷᏤᎸ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏇᏥ, ᎮᎾ ᎪᎯ ᏫᏗᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᎩᏫᏒᎢ.
012128.phonetic: A-se-no ga-do i-tse-li-ha?  Gi-lo a-s-ga-ya a-ni-ta-li tsu-we-tsi a-ni-s-ga-ya a-ne-he-i; a-si-yv-wi-no i-gv-yi wu-lu-tse-lv, hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; A-que-tsi, he-na go-hi wi-di-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-si te-lv-la-di da-gi-wi-sv-i.

012129.english: He answered and said, I will not: but afterward he repented, and went.
012129.cherokee: ᏧᏁᏨᏃ, ᎥᏝ, ᎤᏛᏁᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎣᏂ ᎤᏁᏟᏴᏎ ᎤᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏅᏎᎢ.
012129.phonetic: Tsu-ne-tsv-no, v-tla, u-dv-ne-i; a-se-no o-ni u-ne-tli-yv-se u-da-nv-dv-i, a-le u-we-nv-se-i.

012130.english: And he came to the second, and said likewise. And he answered and said, I go, sir: and went not.
012130.cherokee: ᏐᎢᏃ ᏭᎷᏤᎸ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ.  ᏧᏁᏨᏃ, ᏓᎨᏏ, ᎤᏛᏁᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏄᏪᏅᏒᎾᏉ ᎢᎨᏎᎢ.
012130.phonetic: So-i-no wu-lu-tse-lv na-s-gi-ya nu-we-se-le-i.  Tsu-ne-tsv-no, da-ge-si, u-dv-ne-i; a-se-no nu-we-nv-sv-na-quo i-ge-se-i.

012131.english: Whether of them twain did the will of his father? They say unto him, The first. Jesus saith unto them, Verily I say unto you, That the publicans and the harlots go into the kingdom of God before you.
012131.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎤᏁᏨ ᏄᏛᏁᎴᎢ?  ᎢᎬᏱ ᏭᎷᏤᎸᎯ, ᎥᎬᏬᏎᎸᎩ.  ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎠᏕᎸ ᎠᏂᎩᏏᏙᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏤᏌᏘ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏩᏂᏴᎯᎭ ᏕᎨᏥᎪᏂᎭ.
012131.phonetic: Ga-go hi-a a-ni-ta-li u-do-da u-ne-tsv nu-dv-ne-le-i?  I-gv-yi wu-lu-tse-lv-hi, v-gv-wo-se-lv-gi.  Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, a-de-lv a-ni-gi-si-do-hi a-le tsu-na-tse-sa-ti a-ni-ge-yv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv wa-ni-yv-hi-ha de-ge-tsi-go-ni-ha.

012132.english: For John came unto you in the way of righteousness, and ye believed him not: but the publicans and the harlots believed him: and ye, when ye had seen it, repented not afterward, that ye might believe him.
012132.cherokee: ᏣᏂᏰᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏰᏦᎢᏳᏁᎢ, ᎠᏕᎸᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏂᎩᏏᏙᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᏧᎾᏤᏌᏘ ᏥᎬᏬᎯᏳᏅᎩ; ᏂᎯᏃ ᎢᏣᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎣᏂ ᏱᏗᏥᏁᏟᏴᏎ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏗᏱ.
012132.phonetic: Tsa-ni-ye-no du-yu-go-dv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv i-tsi-lu-tse-lv-gi, a-le v-tla ye-tso-i-yu-ne-i, a-de-lv-s-gi-ni a-ni-gi-si-do-hi a-le a-ni-ge-yv tsu-na-tse-sa-ti tsi-gv-wo-hi-yu-nv-gi; ni-hi-no i-tsa-do-le-ho-sv v-tla o-ni yi-di-tsi-ne-tli-yv-se de-tsa-da-nv-dv e-tso-i-yu-di-yi.

012133.english: Hear another parable: There was a certain householder, which planted a vineyard, and hedged it round about, and digged a winepress in it, and built a tower, and let it out to husbandmen, and went into a far country:
012133.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏓᏟᎶᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏛᎬᎦ; ᎡᎮ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᏁᎳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏚᏫᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏐᏲᎴ ᎬᏩᏚᏫᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᎪᏎ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎪᏢᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᏍᎨᎮ ᎢᏅ ᎢᎦᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏙᎳᏍᏔᏁ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎢᏅᏃ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ.
012133.phonetic: Nv-wa-da-le da-tli-lo-s-dv i-tsa-dv-gv-ga; E-he gi-lo a-s-ga-ya ga-ne-la, na-s-gi te-lv-la-di du-wi-se-i, a-le u-so-yo-le gv-wa-du-wi-dv, a-le u-s-go-se gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di go-tlv-di-yi, a-le u-ne-s-ge-he i-nv i-ga-ti, a-le du-do-la-s-ta-ne tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, i-nv-no wu-lo-se-i.

012134.english: And when the time of the fruit drew near, he sent his servants to the husbandmen, that they might receive the fruits of it.
012134.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᎨᏎ ᎤᏅᏂᏍᏗᏱ ᏚᏅᏎ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏗᏁᎲᎢ, ᏚᏂᏁᏒᏎ ᎤᎾᏓᏛᏅᎯ.
012134.phonetic: Hna-quo-no na-v-ni-yu ge-se u-nv-ni-s-di-yi du-nv-se tsu-nv-si-da-s-di tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi di-ne-hv-i, du-ni-ne-sv-se u-na-da-dv-nv-hi.

012135.english: And the husbandmen took his servants, and beat one, and killed another, and stoned another.
012135.cherokee: ᏠᎨᏏᏃ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏚᏂᏂᏴᎮ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᎸᏂᎴᎢ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎤᏂᎴᎢ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᏅᏯ ᏚᏅᏂᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
012135.phonetic: Tlo-ge-si-no tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi du-ni-ni-yv-he tsu-nv-si-da-s-di, a-si-yv-wi u-ni-lv-ni-le-i, so-i-no u-ni-le-i, so-i-no nv-ya du-nv-ni-s-ta-ne-i.

012136.english: Again, he sent other servants more than the first: and they did unto them likewise.
012136.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᏚᏅᏎ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏂᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉᏃ ᏂᏚᏅᏁᎴᎢ.
012136.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no du-nv-se nv-wa-na-da-le tsu-nv-si-da-s-di u-tli i-ya-ni-i; na-s-gi-ya-quo-no ni-du-nv-ne-le-i.

012137.english: But last of all he sent unto them his son, saying, They will reverence my son.
012137.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏱᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏅᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᏎ ᏛᏂᎸᏉᏔᏂ ᎠᏇᏥ.
012137.phonetic: O-ni-yi-no u-we-tsi u-nv-se-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; A-se dv-ni-lv-quo-ta-ni a-que-tsi.

012138.english: But when the husbandmen saw the son, they said among themselves, This is the heir; come, let us kill him, and let us seize on his inheritance.
012138.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎤᏂᎪᎲ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ; Ꭷ ᎡᏗᎷᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏗᏬᏅ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ.
012138.phonetic: A-se-no tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi u-ni-go-hv u-we-tsi hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-le-i; Na-s-gi hi-a u-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di; ka e-di-lu-ga, a-le e-di-wo-nv u-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di tsi-gi.

012139.english: And they caught him, and cast him out of the vineyard, and slew him.
012139.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏂᏴᎮᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏄᎪᏫᏎ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎴᎢ.
012139.phonetic: U-ni-ni-yv-he-no, a-le u-ni-nu-go-wi-se te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv-i, a-le u-ni-le-i.

012140.english: When the lord therefore of the vineyard cometh, what will he do unto those husbandmen?
012140.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ, ᎦᏙ ᏙᏓᎬᏁᎵ Ꮎ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ?
012140.phonetic: Hna-quo-no na-s-gi te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv u-tse-li-ga ga-lu-tsv-ha, ga-do do-da-gv-ne-li na tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi?

012141.english: They say unto him, He will miserably destroy those wicked men, and will let out his vineyard unto other husbandmen, which shall render him the fruits in their seasons.
012141.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᏂᏙᏓᎬᏁᎵ ᏙᏛᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏂᏲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏙᏛᏙᎳᏍᏔᏂ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏩᎾᎫᏴᏗ ᎾᏅᎾᏏᏒᎢ.
012141.phonetic: Hi-a-no nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; u-yo-i-yu ni-do-da-gv-ne-li do-dv-li na-s-gi na u-ni-yo-i, a-le nv-wa-na-da-le tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi do-dv-do-la-s-ta-ni, na-s-gi ye-li gv-wa-na-gu-yv-di na-nv-na-si-sv-i.

012142.english: Jesus saith unto them, Did ye never read in the scriptures, The stone which the builders rejected, the same is become the head of the corner: this is the Lord's doing, and it is marvellous in our eyes?
012142.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏱᏥᎪᎵᏰᎣ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ?  ᎠᎾᏁᏍᎨᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏲᎢᏎᎸᎯ ᏅᏯ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎤᏅᏏᏴ ᎠᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏄᏛᏁᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᏕᏓᎧᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
012142.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; tla-s-go i-lv-hi-yu yi-tsi-go-li-ye-o hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la?  A-na-ne-s-ge-s-gi u-ni-yo-i-se-lv-hi nv-ya nu-gv-wi-yu-sv u-nv-si-yv a-di nu-li-s-ta-nv; na-s-gi hi-a Yi-ho-wa nu-dv-ne-lv, a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu de-da-ka-ni-s-gv-i.

012143.english: Therefore say I unto you, The kingdom of God shall be taken from you, and given to a nation bringing forth the fruits thereof.
012143.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᏓᏰᏥᎩᏒᎵ, ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴᏃ ᏓᎨᏥᏁᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏩᏂᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏔᏅᎯ.
012143.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-go-hi da-ye-tsi-gi-sv-li, nv-wa-na-da-le-no da-ge-tsi-ne-li, na-s-gi ye-li gv-wa-ni-na-nu-go-wi-s-di u-da-ta-nv-hi.

012144.english: And whosoever shall fall on this stone shall be broken: but on whomsoever it shall fall, it will grind him to powder.
012144.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᏂ ᏅᏲᎯ ᎠᏢᏨᎭ ᏓᏳᏐᏅᏂ, ᎩᎶᏃ ᎤᏐᏅᎭ ᏓᏳᏪᏓᏬᏔᏂ.
012144.phonetic: Gi-lo-no a-ni nv-yo-hi a-tlv-tsv-ha da-yu-so-nv-ni, gi-lo-no u-so-nv-ha da-yu-we-da-wo-ta-ni.

012145.english: And when the chief priests and Pharisees had heard his parables, they perceived that he spake of them.
012145.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᏓᏟᎶᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒᎩ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏥᏛᎬᎢ.
012145.phonetic: Hna-quo-no nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le A-ni-qua-li-si u-na-dv-ga-nv da-tli-lo-s-di-s-gv-i, u-na-do-le-ho-sv-gi u-nv-sv ge-tsi-dv-gv-i.

012146.english: But when they sought to lay hands on him, they feared the multitude, because they took him for a prophet.
012146.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏂᏴᏗᏱᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᎸ, ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ ᏚᏂᏍᎦᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏰᎸᏒᎩ.
012146.phonetic: U-ni-ni-yv-di-yi-no u-na-da-nv-te-lv, u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi du-ni-s-ga-lv-gi, na-s-gi-ye-no a-do-le-ho-s-gi gv-wa-ye-lv-sv-gi.

012201.english: And Jesus answered and spake unto them again by parables, and said,
012201.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏓᏁᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ;
012201.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv ta-li-ne du-tli-lo-s-da-ne-lv-gi, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi;

012202.english: The kingdom of heaven is like unto a certain king, which made a marriage for his son,
012202.cherokee: ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᎩᎶ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏁ ᏣᎦᏨᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏫᏅ,
012202.phonetic: Ga-lv-la-di u-tse-li-go-hi na-s-gi-ya-quo gi-lo u-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-dv-nv-i-s-ta-ne tsa-ga-tsv-s-do-di-yi u-we-tsi a-wi-nv,

012203.english: And sent forth his servants to call them that were bidden to the wedding: and they would not come.
012203.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᏅᏎ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏧᏂᏯᏅᎲᏍᏗᏱ ᏫᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᏕᎨᎦᏨᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏗᎤᏂᏳᎸᏁᏉ ᏅᏓᏳᏁᏅᏍᏗᏱ.
012203.phonetic: A-le tsi-du-nv-se tsu-nv-si-da-s-di tsu-ni-ya-nv-hv-s-di-yi wi-ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv de-ge-ga-tsv-s-di-s-gv u-ni-lu-hi-s-di-yi; a-se-no di-u-ni-yu-lv-ne-quo nv-da-yu-ne-nv-s-di-yi.

012204.english: Again, he sent forth other servants, saying, Tell them which are bidden, Behold, I have prepared my dinner: my oxen and my fatlings are killed, and all things are ready: come unto the marriage.
012204.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏚᏅᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᏫᏂᏗᏥᏪᏏ ᏫᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏆᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ, ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏩᎦ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᎵᏦᏔᏅᎯ ᏚᏂᎸ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏃ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏃᏅᎯ; ᏕᎨᎦᏨᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᏥᎷᎩ.
012204.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no nv-wa-na-da-le tsu-nv-si-da-s-di du-nv-se-i, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; Hi-a wi-ni-di-tsi-we-si wi-ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv; Gv-ni-yu-quo a-qua-dv-nv-i-s-di a-li-s-da-yv-di, di-qua-tse-li wa-ga a-le di-ga-li-tso-ta-nv-hi du-ni-lv, ni-ga-di-yu-no a-dv-nv-i-s-ta-no-nv-hi; de-ge-ga-tsv-s-di-s-gv i-tsi-lu-gi.

012205.english: But they made light of it, and went their ways, one to his farm, another to his merchandise:
012205.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏅᎵᏌᎵᏉ ᏗᎤᏂᏰᎸᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘᏂᏉ ᏭᏂᎶᏎᎢ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏧᎶᎨᏒᎢ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎤᏃᏙᏗᏱ.
012205.phonetic: A-se-no nv-li-sa-li-quo di-u-ni-ye-lv-ne-i, a-le u-tsa-ti-ni-quo wu-ni-lo-se-i, a-si-yv-wi tsu-lo-ge-sv-i, so-i-no u-no-do-di-yi.

012206.english: And the remnant took his servants, and entreated them spitefully, and slew them.
012206.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏃ ᏚᏂᏂᏴᎮ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏐᏢᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᎴᎢ.
012206.phonetic: A-ni-so-i-no du-ni-ni-yv-he tsu-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le di-gv-wa-ni-so-tlv-ta-ne-i, a-le du-ni-le-i.

012207.english: But when the king heard thereof, he was wroth: and he sent forth his armies, and destroyed those murderers, and burned up their city.
012207.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏅᏎ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏚᏂᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᎾᎪᎲᏍᏔᏁ ᎤᏂᏚᎲᎢ.
012207.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-gv-wi-yu-hi u-dv-ga-nv u-ta-la-wo-se-i, a-le du-nv-se tsu-tse-li a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi, a-le wi-du-ni-le na-s-gi tsu-na-da-lv-hi, a-le wu-na-go-hv-s-ta-ne u-ni-du-hv-i.

012208.english: Then saith he to his servants, The wedding is ready, but they which were bidden were not worthy.
012208.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ; ᏗᎨᎦᏨᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏫᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏱᎾᏃᏎ ᎤᏂᎷᎯᏍᏱ.
012208.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le tsu-nv-si-da-s-di; di-ge-ga-tsv-s-do-di-yi a-dv-nv-i-s-di, a-se-no wi-ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv v-tla ye-li yi-na-no-se u-ni-lu-hi-s-yi.

012209.english: Go ye therefore into the highways, and as many as ye shall find, bid to the marriage.
012209.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏕᎦᏅᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒ ᏫᏥᎶᎯ, ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᏕᏥᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᏁᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏂ ᏙᏗᎨᎦᏨᏍᏔᏂᏒᎢ.
012209.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-yu-s-di de-ga-nv-hna-wa-di-sv wi-tsi-lo-hi, na-ni-v-no de-tsi-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di de-tsi-ne-tse-he-s-di u-ni-lu-hi-s-di-yi a-ni do-di-ge-ga-tsv-s-ta-ni-sv-i.

012210.english: So those servants went out into the highways, and gathered together all as many as they found, both bad and good: and the wedding was furnished with guests.
012210.cherokee: ᎰᏩᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏕᎦᏅᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒ ᏭᏂᎶᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏟᏌᏁ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏚᏂᏩᏛᎲ ᎤᏂᏲ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏃᏍᏛ; ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏙᏗᎨᎦᏨᏍᏔᏂᏒ ᏰᎵ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎩ.
012210.phonetic: Ho-wa-no na-s-gi tsu-nv-si-da-s-di de-ga-nv-hna-wa-di-sv wu-ni-lo-se-i, a-le u-ni-tli-sa-ne na-ni-v du-ni-wa-dv-hv u-ni-yo a-le a-no-s-dv; hna-quo-no do-di-ge-ga-tsv-s-ta-ni-sv ye-li nu-li-s-ta-ni-le a-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gi.

012211.english: And when the king came in to see the guests, he saw there a man which had not on a wedding garment:
012211.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏴᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏚᎦᏔᏂᎸ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎩ, ᎤᎪᎮ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏄᏄᏩᎥᎾ ᎨᏎ ᏕᎨᎦᏨᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᏄᏬᏍᏗ.
012211.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-yv-lv u-gv-wi-yu-hi du-ga-ta-ni-lv a-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gi, u-go-he na-hna a-si-yv-wi nu-nu-wa-v-na ge-se de-ge-ga-tsv-s-di-s-gv a-nu-wo-s-di.

012212.english: And he saith unto him, Friend, how camest thou in hither not having a wedding garment? And he was speechless.
012212.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎩᎾᎵᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏂ ᎥᎯᏴᎵᎦ ᏂᏣᏄᏩᎥᎾ ᎢᎩ ᏕᎨᎦᏨᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᏄᏬᏍᏗ?  ᎡᎳᏪᏱᏉᏃ ᎨᏎᎢ.
012212.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le-i; Gi-na-li-i, ga-do-no a-ni v-hi-yv-li-ga ni-tsa-nu-wa-v-na i-gi de-ge-ga-tsv-s-di-s-gv a-nu-wo-s-di?  E-la-we-yi-quo-no ge-se-i.

012213.english: Then said the king to the servants, Bind him hand and foot, and take him away, and cast him into outer darkness; there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
012213.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ; ᎡᏣᎸᏣ ᏧᏬᏰᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎳᏏᏕᏂ; ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᎾᏫᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏙᏱᏗᏢ ᏧᎵᏏᎬ ᏪᏣᏓᎤᎦ.  ᎾᎿᎭᏓᏂᏴᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᎸᏓᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏓᏂᏄᏙᎬᎢ.
012213.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-gv-wi-yu-hi hi-a ni-du-we-se-le ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di; E-tsa-lv-tsa tsu-wo-ye-ni a-le tsu-la-si-de-ni; a-le e-tsi-na-wi-dv, a-le v-do-yi-di-tlv tsu-li-si-gv we-tsa-da-u-ga.  Na-hna da-ni-yv-ge-s-di a-le da-ni-lv-da-gi-s-ge-s-di da-ni-nu-do-gv-i.

012214.english: For many are called, but few are chosen.

012215.english: Then went the Pharisees, and took counsel how they might entangle him in his talk.
012215.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᏁᏅᏒᎩ ᏭᏂᏃᎮᎸᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏌᏛᏗᏱ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
012215.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-qua-li-si u-ne-nv-sv-gi wu-ni-no-he-lv-gi i-yu-na-dv-ne-di-yi u-ni-sa-dv-di-yi ga-wo-ni-s-gv-i.

012216.english: And they sent out unto him their disciples with the Herodians, saying, Master, we know that thou art true, and teachest the way of God in truth, neither carest thou for any man: for thou regardest not the person of men.
012216.cherokee: ᏚᏂᏅᏒᎩᏃ ᏤᏙᎲ ᎬᏩᏂᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎬᏩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎩᏯ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏕᎭᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᏱᏘᎾᏰᏍᎦ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏄᎾᏍᏛᏉ ᏴᏫ ᏱᏘᎸᏉᏙᎢ.
012216.phonetic: Du-ni-nv-sv-gi-no tse-do-hv gv-wa-ni-s-da-wa-di-do-hi a-le E-lo-dv gv-wa-s-de-li-s-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, o-tsi-ga-ta-ha u-do-hi-yu-gi-ya ge-sv ni-hi, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga du-yu-go-dv de-ha-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i, v-tla a-le yv-wi yi-ti-na-ye-s-ga, v-tla-ye-no nu-na-s-dv-quo yv-wi yi-ti-lv-quo-do-i.

012217.english: Tell us therefore, What thinkest thou? Is it lawful to give tribute unto Caesar, or not?
012217.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ, ᎦᏙ ᎮᎵᎭ?  ᏥᏌ ᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᏏᏌ ᎠᎫᏴᎡᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᎫᏴᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏝᎨ?
012217.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di s-gi-no-hv-si, Ga-do he-li-ha?  Tsi-sa du-yu-go-di Si-sa a-gu-yv-e-di-yi a-ye-li a-gu-yv-di ge-sv-i; tla-ge?

012218.english: But Jesus perceived their wickedness, and said, Why tempt ye me, ye hypocrites?
012218.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒᎩ ᎤᏲᏉ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏍᎩᏌᏛᎥᏍᎦ, ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ?
012218.phonetic: A-se-no Tsi-sa u-do-le-ho-sv-gi u-yo-quo a-na-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do-no i-s-gi-sa-dv-v-s-ga, i-tsa-tlo-na-s-di?

012219.english: Shew me the tribute money. And they brought unto him a penny.
012219.cherokee: ᏥᎪᏩᏛ ᎠᏕᎸ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ.  ᎠᎩᏏᏃ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎬᏩᏲᎮᎸᎩ.
012219.phonetic: Tsi-go-wa-dv a-de-lv a-ye-li a-gu-yv-do-di.  A-gi-si-no tsu-gv-wa-lo-di gv-wa-yo-he-lv-gi.

012220.english: And he saith unto them, Whose is this image and superscription?
012220.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᎭᎸᎩ; ᎦᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏓᎦᏟᎶᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᎭ ᎯᎠ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ?
012220.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-ha-lv-gi; Ga-go hi-a da-ga-tli-lo-s-di, a-le Ga-go a-tsi-no-he-ha hi-a tsi-go-we-la?

012221.english: They say unto him, Caesar's. Then saith he unto them, Render therefore unto Caesar the things which are Caesar's; and unto God the things that are God's.
012221.cherokee: ᏏᏌ, ᎤᎾᏛᏅᎩ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏏᏌ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎡᏥᎲᏏ ᏏᏌ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
012221.phonetic: Si-sa, u-na-dv-nv-gi.  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Si-sa a-di-na e-tsi-hv-si Si-sa u-tse-li-ga, U-ne-la-nv-hi-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.

012222.english: When they had heard these words, they marvelled, and left him, and went their way.

012223.english: The same day came to him the Sadducees, which say that there is no resurrection, and asked him,
012223.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎠᏂᏌᏚᏏ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏜᏓᏏᏛᎡᎯ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏅᎩ,
012223.phonetic: Na-hi-yu i-ga A-ni-sa-du-si di-le-hi-so-di ge-sv u-na-dla-si-dv-e-hi gv-wa-lu-tse-lv-gi, a-le gv-wa-dv-dv-nv-gi,

012224.english: Saying, Master, Moses said, If a man die, having no children, his brother shall marry his wife, and raise up seed unto his brother.
012224.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎼᏏ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎾᏁᎲᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎠᏓᏰᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏴᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏓᏛᎯᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ.
012224.phonetic: Hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, Mo-si u-ne-tse hi-a nu-we-se-i; I-yu-no a-s-ga-ya a-yo-hu-s-ge-s-di tsu-we-tsi na-ne-hv-na ge-se-s-di, di-na-da-nv-tli a-da-ye-ge-s-di u-da-yv-dv, na-s-gi-no da-dv-hi-s-da-ne-he-s-di di-ni-yo-li di-na-da-nv-tli.

012225.english: Now there were with us seven brethren: and the first, when he had married a wife, deceased, and, having no issue, left his wife unto his brother:
012225.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏤᎲ ᎠᏁᎲᎩ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏟ; ᎤᏓᏂᎵᎨᏃ ᎤᏕᏒᏅ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᏉ, ᏧᏪᏥᏃ ᎾᏁᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎤᏪᎪᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏅᏟ.
012225.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-yv o-tse-hv a-ne-hv-gi ga-li-quo-gi i-ya-ni-dv a-na-da-nv-tli; u-da-ni-li-ge-no u-de-sv-nv u-yo-hu-sv-quo, tsu-we-tsi-no na-ne-hv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di u-da-li-i u-we-go-da-ne-lv u-nv-tli.

012226.english: Likewise the second also, and the third, unto the seventh.
012226.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏔᎵᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢᏁᎢ, ᎦᎵᏉᎩᏁ ᏫᎬᏗᏍᎩ.
012226.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ta-li-ne-i, a-le tso-i-ne-i, ga-li-quo-gi-ne wi-gv-di-s-gi.

012227.english: And last of all the woman died also.

012228.english: Therefore in the resurrection whose wife shall she be of the seven? for they all had her.
012228.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏓᎾᎴᎯᏌᏅᎭ, ᎦᎪ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ?
012228.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hna-quo tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi da-na-le-hi-sa-nv-ha, ga-go u-da-li-i ge-se-s-di na-s-gi ga-li-quo-gi i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv-i?

012229.english: Jesus answered and said unto them, Ye do err, not knowing the scriptures, nor the power of God.
012229.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏥᎵᏓᏍᏗᎭ ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
012229.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; I-tsi-li-da-s-di-ha ni-tsi-ga-ta-v-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di nu-s-dv go-we-lv-i, a-le nu-li-ni-gv-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi.

012230.english: For in the resurrection they neither marry, nor are given in marriage, but are as the angels of God in heaven.
012230.cherokee: ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯᏰᏃ ᏓᎾᎴᎯᏌᏅᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏓᎾᏕᏒᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏱᏗᎨᏥᏰᎪᎢ; ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏐᎢ.
012230.phonetic: Tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi-ye-no da-na-le-hi-sa-nv-ha, v-tla yi-da-na-de-sv-hv-s-go-i, v-tla a-le yi-di-ge-tsi-ye-go-i; di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-s-gi-ni ga-lv-la-di a-ne-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li na-s-gi-ya ge-so-i.

012231.english: But as touching the resurrection of the dead, have ye not read that which was spoken unto you by God, saying,
012231.cherokee: ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎤᎾᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᎭ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎪᎵᏰᎣ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏥᏁᏤᎸᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᎭ?
012231.phonetic: Tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv u-na-le-hi-so-di ge-sv tsi-tsi-ne-i-s-di-ha, tla-s-go yi-tsi-go-li-ye-o U-ne-la-nv-hi i-tsi-ne-tse-lv-hi, hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-ha?

012232.english: I am the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob? God is not the God of the dead, but of the living.
012232.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏏᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.  ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᏱᎩ, ᏗᏅᏃᏛᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏅᏒ.
012232.phonetic: A-yv U-ne-la-nv-hi E-qua-ha-mi u-tse-li-ga, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi E-si-gi u-tse-li-ga, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi Tse-ga-qui u-tse-li-ga.  V-tla U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi u-na-tse-li yi-gi, di-nv-no-dv-quo-s-gi-ni u-nv-sv.

012233.english: And when the multitude heard this, they were astonished at his doctrine.

012234.english: But when the Pharisees had heard that he had put the Sadducees to silence, they were gathered together.
012234.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᎡᎳᏪᏱ ᏚᏩᏅ ᎠᏂᏌᏚᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏂᎳᏫᏨᎩ.
012234.phonetic: A-ni-qua-li-si-s-gi-ni u-na-dv-ga-nv e-la-we-yi du-wa-nv A-ni-sa-du-si, na-s-gi du-ni-la-wi-tsv-gi.

012235.english: Then one of them, which was a lawyer, asked him a question, tempting him, and saying,
012235.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏓᏑᏴᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᎪᏏᏏᏍᎩ, ᎤᏛᏛᏅᎩ ᎤᏌᏛᎥᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ;
012235.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no na-hna u-da-su-yv-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-go-si-si-s-gi, u-dv-dv-nv-gi u-sa-dv-v-s-gv-i, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi;

012236.english: Master, which is the great commandment in the law?
012236.cherokee: ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ?
012236.phonetic: Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ga-do u-s-di u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu u-li-ne-tsv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di?

012237.english: Jesus said unto him, Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind.
012237.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏱᎰᏩ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎯᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏣᎾᏫ ᎲᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏣᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏣᏓᏅᏖᏗᏱ.
012237.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Yi-ho-wa Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi hi-ge-yu-se-s-di ni-ga-v tsa-na-wi hv-di-s-ge-s-di, a-le ni-ga-v tsa-da-nv-do, a-le ni-ga-v tsa-da-nv-te-di-yi.

012238.english: This is the first and great commandment.
012238.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
012238.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a i-gv-yi-yi a-le u-tsa-ti ga-lv-quo-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

012239.english: And the second is like unto it, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.
012239.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ; ᏨᏒ ᏥᏂᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒ ᏂᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏓᎳ.
012239.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no na-s-gi-ya-quo na-s-quo; tsv-sv tsi-ni-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv ni-ge-yu-se-s-di na-v i-di-s-da-da-la.

012240.english: On these two commandments hang all the law and the prophets.
012240.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎵᏁᏨ ᏚᎵᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒᎢ.
012240.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a ta-li nu-li-ne-tsv du-li-s-da-yi-di-s-di ni-ga-di-yu di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-le u-na-do-le-ho-sv-i.

012241.english: While the Pharisees were gathered together, Jesus asked them,

012242.english: Saying, What think ye of Christ? whose son is he? They say unto him, The Son of David.
012242.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᎢᏤᎵ ᎡᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎦᎪ ᎤᏪᏥ?  ᏕᏫ, ᎥᎬᏬᏎᎸᎩ.
012242.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Ga-do i-tse-li e-tsa-da-nv-te-s-gv Ga-lo-ne-dv, Ga-go u-we-tsi?  De-wi, v-gv-wo-se-lv-gi.

012243.english: He saith unto them, How then doth David in spirit call him Lord, saying,
012243.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᏕᏫ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏪᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏥᎪᏎᎭ?  ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᎭ;
012243.phonetic: Hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do-no di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, De-wi a-da-nv-do u-we-yo-hv-s-gv-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, tsi-go-se-ha?  Hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-ha;

012244.english: The LORD said unto my Lord, Sit thou on my right hand, till I make thine enemies thy footstool?
012244.cherokee: ᏱᎰᏩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ; ᏥᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏦᎴᏍᏗ, ᎬᏂ ᎨᏣᏍᎦᎩ ᏗᏣᎳᏏᏗᏱ ᎦᏍᎩᎶ ᏂᎦᏥᏴᏁᎸᎭ;
012244.phonetic: Yi-ho-wa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-qua-tse-li-ga; Tsi-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv tso-le-s-di, gv-ni ge-tsa-s-ga-gi di-tsa-la-si-di-yi ga-s-gi-lo ni-ga-tsi-yv-ne-lv-ha;

012245.english: If David then call him Lord, how is he his son?
012245.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏕᏫ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏱᎪᏎᎭ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏱᎩ?
012245.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no De-wi, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, yi-go-se-ha, Ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da u-we-tsi yi-gi?

012246.english: And no man was able to answer him a word, neither durst any man from that day forth ask him any more questions.
012246.cherokee: Ꮭ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏰᎵ ᎩᎶ ᏍᎦᏁᏨᎯ ᎬᏩᏁᏤᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ; Ꮭ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏰᎵ ᎦᎬᏩᏛᏛᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
012246.phonetic: Tla hna-quo ye-li gi-lo s-ga-ne-tsv-hi gv-wa-ne-tse-di yi-ge-se-i; tla a-le gi-lo na-hi-yu i-yu-da-le-nv-dv ye-li ga-gv-wa-dv-dv-di yi-ge-se-i.

012301.english: Then spake Jesus to the multitude, and to his disciples,
012301.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᏚᏬᏁᏔᏅᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ,
012301.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa du-wo-ne-ta-nv-gi u-ni-tsa-ti a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi,

012302.english: Saying, The scribes and the Pharisees sit in Moses' seat:
012302.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎼᏏ ᎤᏪᏍᎩᎸ ᎠᏂᎾ;
012302.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; di-no-we-li-s-gi a-le A-ni-qua-li-si Mo-si u-we-s-gi-lv a-ni-na;

012303.english: All therefore whatsoever they bid you observe, that observe and do; but do not ye after their works: for they say, and do not.
012303.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏚᎦ ᎨᏦᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᏂᏁᎪᏰᏃ ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎾᎾᏛᏁᎰᎢ.
012303.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-yu-s-di ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di di-tsi-ka-hna-wa-du-ga ge-tso-se-he-s-di de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-de-ge-s-di a-le na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di; a-se-no na-s-gi na-na-dv-ne-hv-i tle-s-di yi-ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di; a-ni-ne-go-ye-no a-se-no v-tla na-s-gi yi-na-na-dv-ne-ho-i.

012304.english: For they bind heavy burdens and grievous to be borne, and lay them on men's shoulders; but they themselves will not move them with one of their fingers.
012304.cherokee: ᏓᎾᏓᎵᏢᏍᎪᏰᏃ ᏗᎦᎨᏛ ᏗᎵᏒᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᏗᎵᏒᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏂᏃᎭᏝᎲᏍᎪᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏂᏰᏌᏛ ᏴᎬᏅᏓ ᏱᏙᎬᏂᏖᎸᎲᎦ.
012304.phonetic: Da-na-da-li-tlv-s-go-ye-no di-ga-ge-dv di-li-sv-s-di a-le u-de-ya-do-di di-li-sv-s-di-yi, na-s-gi-no yv-wi da-ni-no-ha-tla-hv-s-go-i; a-se-no u-nv-sv v-tla sa-quo a-ni-ye-sa-dv yv-gv-nv-da yi-do-gv-ni-te-lv-hv-ga.

012305.english: But all their works they do for to be seen of men: they make broad their phylacteries, and enlarge the borders of their garments,
012305.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎬᏩᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏐᎢ.  ᏗᏯᏖᎾ ᏂᏓᏅᏁᎰ ᏧᎾᎬᏓᏃᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᏯᏛᎥᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᏕᎦᏓᎷᏯᏛ ᏧᎾᏄᏬ;
012305.phonetic: Ni-ga-di-yu-s-gi-ni du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv yv-wi-quo gv-wa-ni-go-wa-dv-di-yi u-ni-ye-lv-so-i.  Di-ya-te-na ni-da-nv-ne-ho tsu-na-gv-da-no-s-di, a-le da-ni-ya-dv-v-s-di-s-go de-ga-da-lu-ya-dv tsu-na-nu-wo;

012306.english: And love the uppermost rooms at feasts, and the chief seats in the synagogues,
012306.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎸᏉᏙ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏧᎾᏂᏢᏗᏱ ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏕᎦᏍᎩᎸ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ,
012306.phonetic: A-le u-ni-lv-quo-do nu-gv-wi-yu-sv tsu-na-ni-tlv-di-yi da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i, a-le nu-gv-wi-yu-sv de-ga-s-gi-lv di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi,

012307.english: And greetings in the markets, and to be called of men, Rabbi, Rabbi.
012307.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᏲᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᎦᏃᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎬᏩᏃᏎᏗᏱ ᏴᏫ.
012307.phonetic: A-le ge-tsi-yo-li-s-di-yi di-ga-no-do-di-yi, a-le Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, gv-wa-no-se-di-yi yv-wi.

012308.english: But be not ye called Rabbi: for one is your Master, even Christ; and all ye are brethren.
012308.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᏰᏦᏎᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᏗᏤᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ; ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟᏉ.
012308.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni tle-s-di Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ye-tso-se-he-s-di; a-si-yv-wi-ye-no Di-tse-yo-hv-s-gi, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv; ni-ga-dv-no ni-hi i-tsa-li-nv-tli-quo.

012309.english: And call no man your father upon the earth: for one is your Father, which is in heaven.
012309.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎡᏦᏎᎸᎩ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ; ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏉᏰᏃ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏨᏤᎭ.
012309.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di gi-lo e-do-da e-tso-se-lv-gi a-ni e-lo-hi; a-si-yv-wi-quo-ye-no I-tsi-do-da, na-s-gi ga-lv-la-di tsv-tse-ha.

012310.english: Neither be ye called masters: for one is your Master, even Christ.
012310.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏍᏆᏘᏂᏙᎯ ᏰᏦᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏉᏰᏃ ᏗᏣᏘᏂᏙᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
012310.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di S-qua-ti-ni-do-hi ye-tso-se-he-s-di ni-hi, a-si-yv-wi-quo-ye-no Di-tsa-ti-ni-do-hi, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv.

012311.english: But he that is greatest among you shall be your servant.
012311.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏟ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012311.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni u-tli a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di ni-hi i-tse-hv-i, na-s-gi e-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di ge-se-s-di.

012312.english: And whosoever shall exalt himself shall be abased; and he that shall humble himself shall be exalted.
012312.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎢᎠᏓᏌᎳᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎾᏓᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᏌᎳᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012312.phonetic: Gi-lo-no u-wa-sv-quo i-a-da-sa-la-di-s-ge-s-di e-la-di i-ya-gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di; gi-lo-no u-wa-sv-quo e-la-di na-da-dv-ne-he-s-di a-tsi-sa-la-do-di ge-se-s-di.

012313.english: But woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye shut up the kingdom of heaven against men: for ye neither go in yourselves, neither suffer ye them that are entering to go in.
012313.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏦᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᏕᏥᏍᏚᏁᎰᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎢᏨᏒ ᏱᏥᏴᎯᎰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᏩᏂᏴᎭ ᏱᏗᏤᎵᏎᎰ ᏩᏂᏴᎯᎯ.
012313.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni u-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di di-tso-we-li-s-gi a-le I-tsi-qua-li-si i-tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  de-tsi-s-du-ne-ho-ye-no yv-wi ga-lv-la-di u-tse-li-go-hi; v-tla-ye-no i-tsv-sv yi-tsi-yv-hi-ho-i, a-le v-tla u-na-ne-la-gi wa-ni-yv-ha yi-di-tse-li-se-ho wa-ni-yv-hi-hi.

012314.english: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye devour widows' houses, and for a pretence make long prayer: therefore ye shall receive the greater damnation.
012314.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏦᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᏕᏥᏒᏁᎰᏰᏃ ᏧᏃᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᏓᏂᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏛ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012314.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di di-tso-we-li-s-gi a-le I-tsi-qua-li-si i-tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  de-tsi-sv-ne-ho-ye-no tsu-no-su-lo-tsv-hi da-ni-ne-lv-i, a-le i-tsa-tlo-na-s-dv go-hi-di-yu i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-go-i.  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-tli-hi-yu i-ga-i i-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-se-s-di.

012315.english: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye compass sea and land to make one proselyte, and when he is made, ye make him twofold more the child of hell than yourselves.
012315.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏦᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᏕᏣᏕᏲᎰᏰᏃ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᎯ ᎡᏥᏲᎰ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎢᏰᏨᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏁᏨᎦ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏳᏩᎫᏗ ᎤᏟ ᏨᏍᎩᏃᎢ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏁᏨᏁᎰ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᏨᏒ.
012315.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di di-tso-we-li-s-gi a-le I-tsi-qua-li-si i-tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  de-tsa-de-yo-ho-ye-no a-me-quo-hi a-le ga-do-hi e-tsi-yo-ho a-si-yv-wi nu-s-dv i-tso-hi-yu-sv go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi i-ye-tsv-ne-di-yi, a-le na-s-gi ne-tsv-ga ta-li i-yu-wa-gu-di u-tli tsv-s-gi-no-i u-we-tsi ne-tsv-ne-ho e-s-ga-quo i-tsv-sv.

012316.english: Woe unto you, ye blind guides, which say, Whosoever shall swear by the temple, it is nothing; but whosoever shall swear by the gold of the temple, he is a debtor!
012316.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ, ᏗᏥᎨᏫ ᏗᏣᏓᏘᏂᏙᎯ!  ᎯᎠ ᎢᏥᏪᏍᎩ; ᎩᎶ ᎢᎠᏎᎵᏛᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎤᏚᏓᎳ.
012316.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di, di-tsi-ge-wi di-tsa-da-ti-ni-do-hi!  hi-a i-tsi-we-s-gi; Gi-lo i-a-se-li-dv-s-ge-s-di i-ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-se-quo-quo na-s-gi; gi-lo-s-gi-ni i-ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di a-de-lv da-lo-ni-ge u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-hv-i, na-s-gi a-s-da-yi-yu u-du-da-la.

012317.english: Ye fools and blind: for whether is greater, the gold, or the temple that sanctifieth the gold?
012317.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏁᎫ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᎨᏫ!  ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ, ᎠᏕᎸᏍᎪ ᏓᎶᏂᎨᎢ, ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏥᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏓᎶᏂᎨᎢ?
012317.phonetic: I-tsi-ne-gu a-le di-tsi-ge-wi!  ga-do u-s-di u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu, a-de-lv-s-go da-lo-ni-ge-i, u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi-ge na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu tsi-ni-gv-ne-ha a-de-lv da-lo-ni-ge-i?

012318.english: And, Whosoever shall swear by the altar, it is nothing; but whosoever sweareth by the gift that is upon it, he is guilty.
012318.cherokee: ᎠᎴ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎤᏚᏓᎳ.
012318.phonetic: A-le, gi-lo i-ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di a-tsi-lv--ge-la-s-di-yi, a-se-quo-quo na-s-gi; gi-lo-s-gi-ni i-ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi na-hna a-hv-i, na-s-gi a-s-da-yi-yu u-du-da-la.

012319.english: Ye fools and blind: for whether is greater, the gift, or the altar that sanctifieth the gift?
012319.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏁᎫ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᎨᏫ!  ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ, ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯᏍᎪ, ᎠᏥᎸᎨ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏥᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ?
012319.phonetic: I-tsi-ne-gu a-le di-tsi-ge-wi!  ga-do u-s-di u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu, a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi-s-go, a-tsi-lv-ge--ge-la-s-di-yi, na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu tsi-ni-gv-ne-ha a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi?

012320.english: Whoso therefore shall swear by the altar, sweareth by it, and by all things thereon.
012320.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎢᎠᏎᎵᏛᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ, ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎲᎢ.
012320.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gi-lo i-a-se-li-dv-s-ge-s-di i-ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di a-tsi-lv-ge-la-s-di-yi, ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi a-le ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di na-hna a-hv-i.

012321.english: And whoso shall swear by the temple, sweareth by it, and by him that dwelleth therein.
012321.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎢᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᏁᎳ.
012321.phonetic: A-le gi-lo i-ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi a-le na-hna ga-ne-la.

012322.english: And he that shall swear by heaven, sweareth by the throne of God, and by him that sitteth thereon.
012322.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎢᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ, ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏬᎵ.
012322.phonetic: A-le gi-lo i-ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di ga-lv-la-di, ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-we-di-yi a-le na-hna u-wo-li.

012323.english: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye pay tithe of mint and anise and cummin, and have omitted the weightier matters of the law, judgment, mercy, and faith: these ought ye to have done, and not to leave the other undone.
012323.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏦᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁᏰᏃ ᎢᏣᎫᏱᏍᎪ ᏒᏟ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎻᏂ; ᏕᏥᏃᎯᏯᏍᎪᏃ ᎤᏟ ᎤᎵᏍᎨᏛᏯ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏱ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᏣᏛᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏐᎢ ᏂᏥᏃᎯᏴᎾᏉ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
012323.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di di-tso-we-li-s-gi a-le I-tsi-qua-li-si i-tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  a-s-go-hi-ne-ye-no i-tsa-gu-yi-s-go sv-tli a-le e-sv a-le ga-mi-ni; de-tsi-no-hi-ya-s-go-no u-tli u-li-s-ge-dv-ya ge-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i, a-le a-da-do-li-s-di-yi, a-le go-hi-yu-di-yi.  Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni hi-a yi-ni-tsa-dv-ne-le-i, a-le so-i ni-tsi-no-hi-yv-na-quo yi-ge-se-i.

012324.english: Ye blind guides, which strain at a gnat, and swallow a camel.
012324.cherokee: ᏗᏥᎨᏫ ᏗᏣᏓᏘᏂᏙᎯ!  ᏙᏒ ᎢᏥᎿᎭᏐᎸᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᎻᎵᏃ ᎢᏥᎩᏍᎩ.
012324.phonetic: Di-tsi-ge-wi di-tsa-da-ti-ni-do-hi!  do-sv i-tsi-hna-so-lv-s-di-s-gi ge-mi-li-no i-tsi-gi-s-gi.

012325.english: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye make clean the outside of the cup and of the platter, but within they are full of extortion and excess.
012325.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏦᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᎢᏦᏑᎴᏍᎪᏰᏃ ᎦᏚᎢᏗᏢ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏐ ᎠᏎᏉ ᎠᏓᎩᎡᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
