012325.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di di-tso-we-li-s-gi a-le I-tsi-qua-li-si i-tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  i-tso-su-le-s-go-ye-no ga-du-i-di-tlv u-li-s-qui-di a-le a-te-li-do, a-se-no a-wi-ni-di-tlv u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-so a-se-quo a-da-gi-e-di ge-sv-i a-le du-yu-go-dv ni-ge-sv-na.

012326.english: Thou blind Pharisee, cleanse first that which is within the cup and platter, that the outside of them may be clean also.
012326.cherokee: ᎯᏆᎵᏏ ᏘᎨᏫ!  ᎢᎬᏱ ᎯᏅᎦᎸ ᎠᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ, ᎦᏚᎢᏗᏢᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᏓᏅᎦᎸᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012326.phonetic: Hi-qua-li-si ti-ge-wi!  i-gv-yi hi-nv-ga-lv a-wi-ni-di-tlv u-li-s-qui-di a-le a-te-li-do, ga-du-i-di-tlv-no na-s-quo tsu-da-nv-ga-lv-dv ge-se-s-di.

012327.english: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye are like unto whited sepulchres, which indeed appear beautiful outward, but are within full of dead men's bones, and of all uncleanness.
012327.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏦᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉᏰᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏧᏁᎬ ᎢᏗᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏓᏤᎵᏍᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏚᎢᏗᏢ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏧᏬᏚᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏧᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᏥᎨᏐ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏧᏂᎪᎳ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ
012327.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di di-tso-we-li-s-gi a-le I-tsi-qua-li-si i-tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  na-s-gi-ya-quo-ye-no ni-hi tsu-ne-gv i-di-gv-ne-lv-hi da-tse-li-s-dv-i, na-s-gi ga-du-i-di-tlv u-do-hi-yu-hi tsu-wo-du-hi-yu tsi-ge-so-i, a-se-no a-wi-ni-di-tlv tsu-ka-li-tsv-hi tsi-ge-so tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi tsu-ni-go-la a-le ni-ga-v ga-da-ha ge-sv-i

012328.english: Even so ye also outwardly appear righteous unto men, but within ye are full of hypocrisy and iniquity.
012328.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎦᏚᎢᏗᏢ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᏅᏩᏍᏙᎢ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎨᏣᎧᏃᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏐ ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏛᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎢ.
012328.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-quo-s-gi-ni na-s-quo ni-hi ga-du-i-di-tlv i-tsa-da-nv-ti-yu nv-wa-s-do-i yv-wi di-ge-tsa-ka-no-di-yi, a-se-no a-wi-ni-di-tlv i-tsi-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-so i-tsa-tlo-na-s-dv-i a-le u-yo-i.

012329.english: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! because ye build the tombs of the prophets, and garnish the sepulchres of the righteous,
012329.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏦᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᏕᏦᏢᎯᏏᏍᎪᏰᏃ ᏕᎦᏂᏌᎲ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏦᏚᎢᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᏓᏤᎵᏍᏛ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ;
012329.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di di-tso-we-li-s-gi a-le I-tsi-qua-li-si i-tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  de-tso-tlv-hi-si-s-go-ye-no de-ga-ni-sa-hv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, a-le de-tso-du-i-s-di-s-go da-tse-li-s-dv u-na-da-nv-ti;

012330.english: And say, If we had been in the days of our fathers, we would not have been partakers with them in the blood of the prophets.
012330.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏥᏪᏍᎪᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏲᏤᎮ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏦᎩᏙᏓ ᏣᏁᎮᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏙᎦᏲᏣᎵᎪᏁᎴ ᎩᎬ ᏚᎾᏤᏪᎸ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ.
012330.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-tsi-we-s-go-i; I-yu-no a-yv yo-tse-he na-hi-yu tso-gi-do-da tsa-ne-he-i, v-tla yi-do-ga-yo-tsa-li-go-ne-le gi-gv du-na-tse-we-lv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi.

012331.english: Wherefore ye be witnesses unto yourselves, that ye are the children of them which killed the prophets.
012331.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏣᏓᏛᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏥᏙᏓ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᎸᎯ.
012331.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsv-sv gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsa-da-dv-ne na-s-gi di-tsi-do-da ge-sv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi tsu-ni-lv-hi.

012332.english: Fill ye up then the measure of your fathers.

012333.english: Ye serpents, ye generation of vipers, how can ye escape the damnation of hell?
012333.cherokee: ᎢᎾᏛ ᏂᎯ!  ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏎᏗ ᎢᎾᏛ ᏧᏁᏥ ᏂᎯ!  ᎦᏙᏃ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏰᏣᏗᏫᏏ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏨᏍᎩᏃᎢ?
012333.phonetic: I-na-dv ni-hi!  u-ni-s-ga-se-di i-na-dv tsu-ne-tsi ni-hi!  ga-do-no yi-ga-li-s-do-da ye-tsa-di-wi-si a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di di-ge-sv tsv-s-gi-no-i?

012334.english: Wherefore, behold, I send unto you prophets, and wise men, and scribes: and some of them ye shall kill and crucify; and some of them shall ye scourge in your synagogues, and persecute them from city to city:
012334.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏕᏥᏅᎵ ᎾᎿᎭᏗᏤᎲ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ; ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᏙᏓᏥᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᏣᏛᏂ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛᎢ, ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᏙᏓᏥᎵᎥᏂᎵ ᏗᏥᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏂᏙᏓᏨᏁᎵ ᏕᎦᏚᎿᎭᎥᎢ;
012334.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gv-ni-yu-quo de-tsi-nv-li na-hna di-tse-hv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi a-le a-ni-ga-ta-hna-i a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi; i-ga-dv-no do-da-tsi-li a-le do-da-tsa-dv-ni da-da-hna-wa-s-dv-i, i-ga-dv-no do-da-tsi-li-v-ni-li di-tsi-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le u-yo ni-do-da-tsv-ne-li de-ga-du-hna-v-i;

012335.english: That upon you may come all the righteous blood shed upon the earth, from the blood of righteous Abel unto the blood of Zacharias son of Barachias, whom ye slew between the temple and the altar.
012335.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎩᎬ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏤᏬᏨᎯ, ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎡᏈᎵ ᎤᎩᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᏤᎦᎳᏯ ᎤᎩᎬ ᏇᎵᎦᏯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏅᏛᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏥᎸ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏛ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏥᎸᏃ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ.
012335.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsi-lu-tse-di-yi ni-ga-dv o-s-dv gi-gv e-lo-hi u-tse-wo-tsv-hi, u-da-nv-ti E-qui-li u-gi-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv, Tse-ga-la-ya u-gi-gv Que-li-ga-ya u-we-tsi nv-dv-s-di, na-s-gi tse-tsi-lv u-dla-nv-dv u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-tsi-lv-no--ge-la-s-di-yi.

012336.english: Verily I say unto you, All these things shall come upon this generation.
012336.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᏳᎾᎵᏱᎶᎮᎵ ᎯᎠ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ.
012336.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-dv da-yu-na-li-yi-lo-he-li hi-a go-hi tsa-ne-ha.

012337.english: O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, thou that killest the prophets, and stonest them which are sent unto thee, how often would I have gathered thy children together, even as a hen gathereth her chickens under her wings, and ye would not!
012337.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ!  ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ!  ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏘᎯᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏣᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᎨᏥᏅᏒᎯ ᏅᏯ ᏛᏂᏍᏗᏍᎩ!  ᏯᏃᎩᏳ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎦᏥᏯᏟᏐᏗᏱ ᏗᏤᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏣᏔᎦ ᏥᏕᎦᏟᏏᏍᎪ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᏂᏛ ᏗᎧᏃᎨᏂ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᎢ.
012337.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi!  Tsi-lu-si-li-mi!  a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi ti-hi-hi, a-le ge-tsa-lu-tse-di-yi ge-tsi-nv-sv-hi nv-ya dv-ni-s-di-s-gi!  ya-no-gi-yu a-qua-du-li-s-gv ga-tsi-ya-tli-so-di-yi di-tse-tsi, na-s-gi-ya tsa-ta-ga tsi-de-ga-tli-si-s-go tsu-we-tsi a-ni-dv di-ka-no-ge-ni ha-wi-ni-di-tlv; a-se-no v-tla yi-tsa-du-li-s-ge-i.

012338.english: Behold, your house is left unto you desolate.

012339.english: For I say unto you, Ye shall not see me henceforth, till ye shall say, Blessed is he that cometh in the name of the Lord.
012339.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎥᏝ ᏴᎨᏍᎩᎪᏩᏛ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎬᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏒᎭ; ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᏥᎦᎷᎯᏍᏗᎭ.
012339.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-tsv-we-se-ha; v-tla yv-ge-s-gi-go-wa-dv go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv, gv-ni hi-a ni-tsi-we-sv-ha; A-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu na-s-gi Yi-ho-wa de-u-do-v tsi-ga-lu-hi-s-di-ha.

012401.english: And Jesus went out, and departed from the temple: and his disciples came to him for to shew him the buildings of the temple.
012401.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏄᎪᏨᎩ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏓᏅᏒᎩ, ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸ ᎬᏩᏃᏁᎸᎩ ᏂᏚᏍᏛ ᏓᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏛᎾᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
012401.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-nu-go-tsv-gi di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi u-da-nv-sv-gi, gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no gv-wa-lu-tse-lv gv-wa-no-ne-lv-gi ni-du-s-dv da-da-ne-lv u-dv-na-di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi.

012402.english: And Jesus said unto them, See ye not all these things? verily I say unto you, There shall not be left here one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
012402.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏗᏥᎪᏩᏘᎭ?  ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉᎤᏅ ᏅᏯ ᎠᏂ ᏱᏚᏓᏌᏝᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎪᎲᏔᏅᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012402.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Tla-s-go ni-ga-dv hi-a yi-di-tsi-go-wa-ti-ha?  U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; v-tla sa-quo-u-nv nv-ya a-ni yi-du-da-sa-tla-he-s-di na-s-gi ni-go-hv-ta-nv-na yi-ge-se-s-di.

012403.english: And as he sat upon the mount of Olives, the disciples came unto him privately, saying, Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign of thy coming, and of the end of the world?
012403.cherokee: ᎣᎵᏩᏲᏃ ᎤᏌᎯᎸ ᎤᏬᎸᎢ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ ᎯᎳᎪ ᎢᏳ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ; ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏣᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ?
012403.phonetic: O-li-wa-yo-no u-sa-hi-lv u-wo-lv-i gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-nv-sv ge-sv gv-wa-lu-tse-lv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; S-gi-no-hv-si hi-la-go i-yu hi-a na-s-gi nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni; a-le ga-do u-s-di u-ye-lv-dv ge-se-s-di tsa-lu-hi-s-di-yi, a-le go-hi ge-sv u-li-s-qua-di-s-di-yi?

012404.english: And Jesus answered and said unto them, Take heed that no man deceive you.
012404.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏥᏥᎶᏄᎮᎵ;
012404.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; I-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di tle-s-di gi-lo tsi-tsi-lo-nu-he-li;

012405.english: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.
012405.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᎠᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏓᏍᏗ ᏓᏂᎶᏄᎮᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
012405.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-te-s-di-ye-no a-yv da-qua-do-v a-ni-lu-hi-s-di-s-ge-s-di, a-yv Ga-lo-ne-dv, a-na-di-s-ge-s-di; a-le u-ni-tsa-da-s-di da-ni-lo-nu-he-s-ge-s-di.

012406.english: And ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars: see that ye be not troubled: for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.
012406.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏛᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏓᎿᎭᏩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᎵᏙᎲ ᏓᎿᎭᏯ; ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᏂᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎴᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012406.phonetic: A-le i-tsa-dv-gi-s-ge-s-di da-hna-wa a-le a-ni-no-he-li-do-hv da-hna-ya; i-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di tle-s-di u-we-li-hi-s-di yi-ni-tsa-li-s-da-ne-le-s-di; na-s-gi-ye-no ni-ga-di-yu a-se i-yu-li-s-do-di, a-se-no u-li-s-qua-di-s-di-yi ge-sv a-si ge-se-s-di.

012407.english: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be famines, and pestilences, and earthquakes, in divers places.
012407.cherokee: ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏙᏛᎾᎴᏂ ᏙᏛᎾᏓᏡᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏚᏃᏢᏩᏗᏒ ᏙᏛᎾᏓᏡᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎪᏄᎶᏏᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏳᎩᎯᏳ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᎯ ᏓᎵᏖᎸᏂᏙᎮᏍᏗ.
012407.phonetic: Tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv-ye-no yv-wi do-dv-na-le-ni do-dv-na-da-tlu-ta-ni, a-le a-ye-li du-no-tlv-wa-di-sv do-dv-na-da-tlu-ta-ni, a-le da-go-nu-lo-si-do-he-s-di, a-le v-yu-gi-hi-yu ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-do-he-s-di, a-le ga-do-hi da-li-te-lv-ni-do-he-s-di.

012408.english: All these are the beginning of sorrows.
012408.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
012408.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv a-le-ni-s-gv ge-sv a-gi-li-ya ge-sv-i.

012409.english: Then shall they deliver you up to be afflicted, and shall kill you: and ye shall be hated of all nations for my name's sake.
012409.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏫᏙᏓᎨᏥᏲᏏ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᎨᏥᎵ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏄᎾᏓᎴᏒ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏥᏍᎦᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
012409.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ni-hi wi-do-da-ge-tsi-yo-si i-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-yi, a-le do-da-ge-tsi-li; a-le ni-ga-di-yu nu-na-da-le-sv yv-wi ge-tsi-s-ga-ge-s-di a-yv da-qua-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di.

012410.english: And then shall many be offended, and shall betray one another, and shall hate one another.
012410.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᏗ ᏚᏃᏕᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏓᏡᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏓᏍᎦᎨᏍᏗ.
012410.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-ni-tsa-te-s-di du-no-de-hi-he-s-di, a-le da-na-da-tlu-di-s-ge-s-di a-le da-na-da-s-ga-ge-s-di.

012411.english: And many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many.
012411.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᎾᏄᎪᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᏗ ᏓᏂᎶᏄᎮᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
012411.phonetic: A-le u-ni-tsa-te-s-di u-na-tlo-na-s-di a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi a-ni-na-nu-go-ge-s-di, a-le u-ni-tsa-te-s-di da-ni-lo-nu-he-s-ge-s-di.

012412.english: And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.
012412.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎲ ᏛᏴᏜᏓᏗ.
012412.phonetic: A-le u-tsa-dv a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv e-hv na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-ni-tsa-te-s-di a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv u-ne-hv dv-yv-dla-di.

012413.english: But he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.
012413.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎬᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᏟᏂᎬᏁᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012413.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-gi na gv-li-s-qua-di-s-gi a-tli-ni-gv-ne-hi na-s-gi a-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di.

012414.english: And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations; and then shall the end come.
012414.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎡᎳᏂᎬ ᎤᎾᎵᏥᏙᏂᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎩᎳᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏛᎵᏍᏆᏗᎵ.
012414.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv ga-lv-la-di u-tse-li-go-hi e-la-ni-gv u-na-li-tsi-do-ni-ni-da-s-di ge-se-s-di u-na-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi na-ni-v tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, gi-la-no hna-quo dv-li-s-qua-di-li.

012415.english: When ye therefore shall see the abomination of desolation, spoken of by Daniel the prophet, stand in the holy place, (whoso readeth, let him understand:)
012415.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏥᎪᎲᎭ ᎤᏍᎦᎢᏍᏗᏳ ᎬᏃᏌᏛᎯ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏂᎵ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᎢᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎦᏙᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, (ᎩᎶ ᎠᎪᎵᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎪᎵᎨᏍᏗ,)
012415.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hna-quo i-tsi-go-hv-ha u-s-ga-i-s-di-yu gv-no-sa-dv-hi i-gv-ne-hi, na-s-gi De-ni-li a-do-le-ho-s-gi tsu-ne-i-s-ta-ne-i, ga-do-ge-s-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i, (gi-lo a-go-li-ye-s-ge-s-di go-li-ge-s-di,)

012416.english: Then let them which be in Judaea flee into the mountains:
012416.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᏧᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏂ ᎠᎾᎵᏒᎭ ᏙᏦᏓᎸ ᏩᏂᎶᏒᎭ.
012416.phonetic: Hna-quo Tsu-di-yi a-ni-ni a-na-li-sv-ha do-tso-da-lv wa-ni-lo-sv-ha.

012417.english: Let him which is on the housetop not come down to take any thing out of his house:
012417.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎦᏌᎾᎵ ᎤᎩᎴᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏴᏗᎤᏠᎠᏎᏍᏗ ᏳᎩᏐᎴᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎲ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ;
012417.phonetic: Gi-lo-no ga-sa-na-li u-gi-le-s-di tle-s-di yv-di-u-tlo-a-se-s-di yu-gi-so-le-s-di go-hu-s-di u-hv ga-ne-lv-i;

012418.english: Neither let him which is in the field return back to take his clothes.
012418.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏪᏙᎯ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏴᏗᎤᏨᏎᏍᏗ ᏧᏄᏬ ᏱᏚᏁᏐᎴᏍᏗ.
012418.phonetic: A-le gi-lo tlo-ge-si we-do-hi tle-s-di yv-di-u-tsv-se-s-di tsu-nu-wo yi-du-ne-so-le-s-di.

012419.english: And woe unto them that are with child, and to them that give suck in those days!
012419.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏂᏁᎵᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏍᏓᎢ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
012419.phonetic: A-le u-yo-i-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di di-ni-ne-li-dv a-le tsu-ni-s-da-i na-hi-yu ge-sv-i.

012420.english: But pray ye that your flight be not in the winter, neither on the sabbath day:
012420.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎪᎳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
012420.phonetic: A-le i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di i-tsi-ta-yo-hi-he-s-di go-la a-le u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-tsa-li-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

012421.english: For then shall be great tribulation, such as was not since the beginning of the world to this time, no, nor ever shall be.
012421.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏣᏖᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏱᏄᎵᏍᏔᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᏙᏢᏅ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏍᏘ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012421.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-ye-no u-tsa-te-s-di a-gi-li-ya, na-s-gi i-ga-i v-tla i-lv-hi-yu yi-nu-li-s-ta-no e-lo-hi tsu-do-tlv-nv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv go-hi i-ya-s-ti, v-tla a-le i-lv-hi-yu na-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

012422.english: And except those days should be shortened, there should no flesh be saved: but for the elect's sake those days shall be shortened.
012422.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏂᏓᏍᏆᎳᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎦᏰᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᏱᎦᎩ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏗᏍᏆᎶᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ
012422.phonetic: A-le na-hi-yu i-ga ni-da-s-qua-la-nv-na yi-gi, v-tla u-que-da-li ga-ye-tsi-s-de-lv-di yi-ga-gi; a-se-no ge-ga-su-ye-dv ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di na-hi-yu i-ga di-s-qua-lo-di ge-se-s-di

012423.english: Then if any man shall say unto you, Lo, here is Christ, or there; believe it not.
012423.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎡᏙᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏥᏦᎯᏳᏂ
012423.phonetic: Na-hi-yu ge-sv i-yu-no gi-lo hi-a ni-tsi-we-se-he-s-di, Gv-ni-yu-quo a-ni Ga-lo-ne-dv e-do-ha; a-le a-ni; tle-s-di tsi-tso-hi-yu-ni

012424.english: For there shall arise false Christs, and false prophets, and shall shew great signs and wonders; insomuch that, if it were possible, they shall deceive the very elect.
012424.cherokee: ᏛᏂᎾᏄᎪᏥᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ ᏱᏓᏂᎶᏄᎲᎵ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛ.
012424.phonetic: Dv-ni-na-nu-go-tsi-ye-no u-na-tlo-na-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv a-le u-na-tlo-na-s-di a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, a-le a-ni-na-nu-go-wi-s-ge-s-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu u-ye-lv-dv a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no ye-li i-gv-wa-li-s-do-di yi-gi yi-da-ni-lo-nu-hv-li na-s-quo ge-ga-su-ye-dv.

012425.english: Behold, I have told you before.

012426.english: Wherefore if they shall say unto you, Behold, he is in the desert; go not forth: behold, he is in the secret chambers; believe it not.
012426.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎨᏥᏪᏎᎸᎭ; ᎢᎾᎨ ᎡᏙᎭ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᏫᏥᎶᏒᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎤᏕᎵᏒ ᎧᏅᏑᎸ ᎠᏯᎠ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏥᏦᎯᏳᏂ.
012426.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no hi-a ni-ge-tsi-we-se-lv-ha; I-na-ge e-do-ha; tle-s-di na-hna wi-tsi-lo-sv-gi; gv-ni-yu-quo u-de-li-sv ka-nv-su-lv a-ya-a; tle-s-di tsi-tso-hi-yu-ni.

012427.english: For as the lightning cometh out of the east, and shineth even unto the west; so shall also the coming of the Son of man be.
012427.cherokee: ᎠᎾᎦᎵᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎸᎬ ᏨᏗᎦᎾᏄᎪᎪᎢ, ᏭᏕᎵᎬᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏥᏫᏗᎦᎸᏌᏓᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᎷᏥᎸᎭ.
012427.phonetic: A-na-ga-li-s-gi-ye-no di-ka-lv-gv tsv-di-ga-na-nu-go-go-i, wu-de-li-gv-no i-yv-dv tsi-wi-di-ga-lv-sa-da-di-s-go-i, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo nu-s-de-s-di yv-wi U-we-tsi ga-lu-tsi-lv-ha.

012428.english: For wheresoever the carcase is, there will the eagles be gathered together.
012428.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏢᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏬᏨᎯ ᏥᎦᏃᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏬᎭᎵ ᎠᎾᏓᏟᏏᏍᎪᎢ.
012428.phonetic: I-lv-hi-tlv-ye-no go-hu-s-di u-li-wo-tsv-hi tsi-ga-no-i, na-hna a-wo-ha-li a-na-da-tli-si-s-go-i.

012429.english: Immediately after the tribulation of those days shall the sun be darkened, and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens shall be shaken:
012429.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏪᏅᏓᏉ ᎣᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᎦᎶᏐᏅᎭ, ᏅᏙ ᎢᎦ ᎡᎯ ᏛᎵᏏᎲᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏙ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎦ ᏳᏘᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏃᏈᏏ ᏛᏂᏅᎪᎠᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏣᏂᎧᎳ ᏛᎾᎵᏖᎸᏂ.
012429.phonetic: I-gv-we-nv-da-quo o-ni na-s-gi na-hi-yu a-gi-li-ya ga-lo-so-nv-ha, nv-do i-ga e-hi dv-li-si-hv-si, a-le nv-do sv-no-yi e-hi v-tla i-ga yu-ti-s-de-s-di, a-le no-qui-si dv-ni-nv-go-a-si, a-le u-ni-tsa-ti ga-lv-lo-i tsa-ni-ka-la dv-na-li-te-lv-ni.

012430.english: And then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all the tribes of the earth mourn, and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
012430.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏓᎦᎾᏄᎪᏥ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏙᏛᏂᏴᎳᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏛᏂᎪᎯ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏣᎢᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎶᎩᎸ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏄᏬᏍᏕᏍᏗ.
012430.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ga-lv-lo-i da-ga-na-nu-go-tsi yv-wi u-we-tsi u-tse-li u-ye-lv-dv-i, a-le hna-quo ni-ga-dv da-ni-la-s-da-lv e-lo-hi do-dv-ni-yv-la-si, a-le dv-ni-go-hi yv-wi U-we-tsi tsa-i-se-s-di u-lo-gi-lv ga-lv-lo-i, u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv a-le u-tsa-ti ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv u-nu-wo-s-de-s-di.

012431.english: And he shall send his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
012431.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏙᏓᎦᏅᏏ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᏛᏂᏤᎷᎯᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏛᏂᏟᏌᏂ ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛ ᏅᎩ ᏂᏙᏗᎦᎶᏍᎬ ᎤᏃᎴ, ᎦᎸᎶ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏫᏚᎵᏍᏘᏂᎸ.
012431.phonetic: Hna-quo-no do-da-ga-nv-si tsu-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le a-s-da-yi-yu dv-ni-tse-lu-hi-si, a-le do-dv-ni-tli-sa-ni ge-ga-su-ye-dv nv-gi ni-do-di-ga-lo-s-gv u-no-le, ga-lv-lo i-yv-dv wi-du-li-s-ti-ni-lv.

012432.english: Now learn a parable of the fig tree; When his branch is yet tender, and putteth forth leaves, ye know that summer is nigh:
012432.cherokee: Ꭷ, ᎢᏣᏕᎶᏆ ᏓᏟᎶᏍᏛ ᏒᎦᏔᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬᎢ; ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏚᏩᏂᎦᎸ ᏗᏓᎨ ᏂᏕᎦᎵᏍᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎳᎢ ᏥᎦᎳᏍᏚᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎰ ᎪᎩ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
012432.phonetic: Ka, i-tsa-de-lo-qua da-tli-lo-s-dv sv-ga-ta-i-yu-s-di tlu-gv-i; I-yu-ye-no du-wa-ni-ga-lv di-da-ge ni-de-ga-li-s-da, a-le gi-la-i tsi-ga-la-s-du-hv-s-go-i, i-tsi-ga-ta-ho go-gi na-v-ni-yu ge-sv-i.

012433.english: So likewise ye, when ye shall see all these things, know that it is near, even at the doors.
012433.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏥᎪᎲᎭ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎡᏍᎦᏂᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱᏉ ᎨᏒᎢ.
012433.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-s-gi-ni na-s-quo ni-hi, i-yu-no hna-quo hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv i-tsi-go-hv-ha, i-tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di e-s-ga-ni-yu ge-sv-i, ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi-quo ge-sv-i.

012434.english: Verily I say unto you, This generation shall not pass, till all these things be fulfilled.
012434.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎯᎠ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏛᏂᎶᏐᏂ, ᎬᏂ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏅᎭ.
012434.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Hi-a go-hi tsa-ne-ha v-tla yv-dv-ni-lo-so-ni, gv-ni ni-ga-dv hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv ni-ga-li-s-ta-nv-ha.

012435.english: Heaven and earth shall pass away, but my words shall not pass away.
012435.cherokee: ᎦᎸᎶ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏙᏓᎦᎶᏐᏂ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎩᏁᏨᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏓᎦᎶᏐᏂ.
012435.phonetic: Ga-lv-lo a-le e-lo-hi do-da-ga-lo-so-ni, a-yv-s-gi-ni a-gi-ne-tsv-i v-tla yv-da-ga-lo-so-ni.

012436.english: But of that day and hour knoweth no man, no, not the angels of heaven, but my Father only.
012436.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏯᎦᏔᎭ, Ꮭ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎡᏙᏓᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ.
012436.phonetic: A-se-no na-hi-yu i-ga ge-sv a-le i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv v-tla gi-lo ya-ga-ta-ha, tla na-s-quo di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ga-lv-la-di a-ne-hi, E-do-da-s-gi-ni u-wa-sv-hi-yu.

012437.english: But as the days of Noe were, so shall also the coming of the Son of man be.
012437.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏕ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏃᏯ ᏤᎮᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ.
012437.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no tsi-nu-s-de na-hi-yu No-ya tse-he-i, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-de-s-di yv-wi U-we-tsi ga-lu-tsv-ha.

012438.english: For as in the days that were before the flood they were eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage, until the day that Noe entered into the ark,
012438.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᎡᏃ ᎠᏏ ᏂᎦᏃᎱᎩᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏗᏔᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏕᏒᎲᏍᎨᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏕᎨᏥᏰᎨᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏃᏯ ᎤᏣᏅ ᏥᏳᎯ,
012438.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-e-no a-si ni-ga-no-hu-gi-s-gv-na tsi-ge-se-i, da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-i, a-le da-na-di-ta-s-ge-i, a-le da-na-de-sv-hv-s-ge-i a-le de-ge-tsi-ye-ge-i, gv-ni na-hi-yu i-ga No-ya u-tsa-nv tsi-yu-hi,

012439.english: And knew not until the flood came, and took them all away; so shall also the coming of the Son of man be.
012439.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏁᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᎤᏃᎱᎦᏂᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏚᏂᎬᏨ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ.
012439.phonetic: A-le na-ne-li-s-gv-na tsi-ge-se-i, gv-ni u-no-hu-ga-ni-lv, a-le ni-ga-dv du-ni-gv-tsv, na-s-gi-ya-quo-s-gi-ni na-s-quo nu-s-de-s-di yv-wi U-we-tsi ga-lu-tsv-ha.

012440.english: Then shall two be in the field; the one shall be taken, and the other left.
012440.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏠᎨᏏ ᎠᏁᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏥᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏐᎢᏃ ᎠᏥᎧᎯᏯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ;
012440.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-ni-ta-li tlo-ge-si a-ne-do-he-s-di, a-si-yv-wi a-tsi-ya-nv-di ge-se-s-di so-i-no a-tsi-ka-hi-ya-s-di ge-se-s-di;

012441.english: Two women shall be grinding at the mill; the one shall be taken, and the other left.
012441.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎠᏂᏍᏙᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᏙᏍᎩᏱ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏥᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏐᎢᏃ ᎠᏥᎧᎯᏯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012441.phonetic: A-ni-ta-li a-ni-ge-yv a-ni-s-do-s-ge-s-di a-s-do-s-gi-yi, a-si-yv-wi a-tsi-ya-nv-di ge-se-s-di so-i-no a-tsi-ka-hi-ya-s-di ge-se-s-di.

012442.english: Watch therefore: for ye know not what hour your Lord doth come.
012442.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏳᏉ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
012442.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di, v-tla-ye-no yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha i-yu-quo u-lu-hi-s-di-yi i-tsa-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

012443.english: But know this, that if the goodman of the house had known in what watch the thief would come, he would have watched, and would not have suffered his house to be broken up.
012443.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎢᏣᏅᏖᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᏁᎳ ᏱᎠᎦᏔᎮ ᎢᏳᏉ ᎦᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏳᏯᏫᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏩᎩᏴᏏ ᎦᎵᏦᏕ ᏱᎬᏪᎵᏎᎢ.
012443.phonetic: Hi-a-no i-tsa-nv-te-s-di, i-yu-no a-s-ga-ya ga-ne-la yi-a-ga-ta-he i-yu-quo ga-no-s-gi-s-gi u-lu-hi-s-di-yi, yu-ya-wi-se-i, a-le v-tla u-ne-la-gi wa-gi-yv-si ga-li-tso-de yi-gv-we-li-se-i.

012444.english: Therefore be ye also ready: for in such an hour as ye think not the Son of man cometh.
012444.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᏂᏤᎵᏍᎬᎾᏉᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏓᎦᎷᏥ.
012444.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-hi na-s-quo i-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-de-s-di, ni-tse-li-s-gv-na-quo-ye-no ge-sv i-yu yv-wi u-we-tsi da-ga-lu-tsi.

012445.english: Who then is a faithful and wise servant, whom his lord hath made ruler over his household, to give them meat in due season?
012445.cherokee: ᎦᎪᎨᏃ ᎠᎦᎵᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏏᎾᏌᏂ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎸᎯ ᎦᏁᎸ ᏚᏓᏘᎿᎭᎥᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᏧᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏒᎢ?
012445.phonetic: Ga-go-ge-no a-ga-li-ya a-le a-si-na-sa-ni a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di, na-s-gi u-nv-si-do-hi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv i-yu-wa-ne-lv-hi ga-ne-lv du-da-ti-hna-v-i, na-s-gi u-na-li-s-da-yv-di tsu-ne-di-yi u-na-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-sv-i?

012446.english: Blessed is that servant, whom his lord when he cometh shall find so doing.
012446.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ ᎤᏩᏛᎲᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ.
012446.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi na a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di u-nv-si-do-hi ga-lu-tsv-ha u-wa-dv-hv-ha na-s-gi na-dv-ne-hv-i.

012447.english: Verily I say unto you, That he shall make him ruler over all his goods.
012447.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎿᎭᎥᎢ ᏛᎦᏘᏗᏍᏔᏂ.
012447.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Ni-ga-dv u-hna-v-i dv-ga-ti-di-s-ta-ni.

012448.english: But and if that evil servant shall say in his heart, My lord delayeth his coming;
012448.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᏓᏅᏛᎢ; ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎪᎯᏗᎭ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ;
012448.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni-no na-s-gi na u-ne-gu-tsi-dv a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-s-di tsu-da-nv-dv-i; A-gi-nv-si-do-hi go-hi-di-ha u-lu-hi-s-di-yi;

012449.english: And shall begin to smite his fellowservants, and to eat and drink with the drunken;
012449.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎴᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏙᎦᎸᏂᎮᏍᏗ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᏂᏴᏍᏕᏍᎩ,
012449.phonetic: A-le a-le-ni-s-ge-s-di do-ga-lv-ni-he-s-di i-tsu-la-ha ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le i-tsu-la-ha a-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-s-di a-le da-na-di-ta-s-ge-s-di tsu-ni-yv-s-de-s-gi,

012450.english: The lord of that servant shall come in a day when he looketh not for him, and in an hour that he is not aware of,
012450.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᏓᎦᎷᏥ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎾᏓᎦᏖᏃᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳ ᏁᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ,
012450.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di u-nv-si-do-hi da-ga-lu-tsi na-hi-yu i-ga na-da-ga-te-no-hv-na ge-sv-i, a-le i-yu ne-li-s-gv-na ge-sv-i,

012451.english: And shall cut him asunder, and appoint him his portion with the hypocrites: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
012451.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᏳᎦᎵᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏩᏁᎲ ᏮᏓᏳᏎᎮᎵ; ᎾᎿᎭᏓᏂᏴᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᎸᏓᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏓᏂᏄᏙᎬᎢ.
012451.phonetic: A-le do-da-yu-ga-li-si, a-le u-na-tlo-na-s-di wa-ne-hv wv-da-yu-se-he-li; na-hna da-ni-yv-ge-s-di a-le da-ni-lv-da-gi-s-ge-s-di da-ni-nu-do-gv-i.

012501.english: Then shall the kingdom of heaven be likened unto ten virgins, which took their lamps, and went forth to meet the bridegroom.
012501.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᎾᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᏂᏅᏎ ᏗᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᎾᏠᏒᏎ ᎠᏕᏒᎲᏍᎩ.
012501.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv na-s-gi-ya ge-se-s-di a-s-go-hi i-ya-ni-dv a-na-dv, na-s-gi tsi-du-ni-nv-se di-tsv-s-do-di a-le tsi-du-na-tlo-sv-se a-de-sv-hv-s-gi.

012502.english: And five of them were wise, and five were foolish.
012502.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎯᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏂᏁᎫ.
012502.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-no i-ya-ni-dv a-ni-ga-ta-hna-i ge-se-i, hi-s-gi-no u-ni-ne-gu.

012503.english: They that were foolish took their lamps, and took no oil with them:
012503.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᎫ ᏚᏂᏅᏎ ᏗᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎢ ᏄᏂᏁᏨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ,
012503.phonetic: U-ni-ne-gu du-ni-nv-se di-tsv-s-do-di a-se-no go-i nu-ni-ne-tsv-sv-na ge-se-i,

012504.english: But the wise took oil in their vessels with their lamps.
012504.cherokee: ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᏂᏅᏎ ᏧᏂᏨᏍᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᎢ ᎤᏂᏁᏨᏎ ᏚᏂᏟᏍᏔᏁ ᏗᏖᎵᏙ.
012504.phonetic: A-ni-ga-ta-hna-i-s-gi-ni du-ni-nv-se tsu-ni-tsv-s-do-di, a-le na-s-quo go-i u-ni-ne-tsv-se du-ni-tli-s-ta-ne di-te-li-do.

012505.english: While the bridegroom tarried, they all slumbered and slept.
012505.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏃ ᎤᎪᏂᏲᎨ ᎠᏕᏒᎲᏍᎩ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᎵᏅᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎵᏅᏤᎢ.
012505.phonetic: A-si-no u-go-ni-yo-ge a-de-sv-hv-s-gi, ni-ga-dv a-ni-li-nv-ge-i, a-le u-ni-li-nv-tse-i.

012506.english: And at midnight there was a cry made, Behold, the bridegroom cometh; go ye out to meet him.
012506.cherokee: ᏒᏃᏱᏃ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎤᏁᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏕᏒᎲᏍᎩ ᏓᏯᎢ!  ᏫᏕᏣᏠᎢ!
012506.phonetic: Sv-no-yi-no a-ye-li gi-lo a-s-da-ya u-ne-tse-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; Gv-ni-yu-quo a-de-sv-hv-s-gi da-ya-i!  wi-de-tsa-tlo-i!

012507.english: Then all those virgins arose, and trimmed their lamps.
012507.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎾᏛ ᎤᎾᏗᏓᏁᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᏥᏃᏍᎦᎸᎮ ᏚᏂᏨᏍᏛᎢ.
012507.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ni-ga-dv a-na-dv u-na-di-da-ne-se-i, a-le du-ni-tsi-no-s-ga-lv-he du-ni-tsv-s-dv-i.

012508.english: And the foolish said unto the wise, Give us of your oil; for our lamps are gone out.
012508.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᎫᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏂᏪᏎᎴ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ; ᎢᎦᏛ ᎪᎢ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᏍᎩᏁᎥᏏ, ᏙᎬᏠᎯᏎᎭᏰᏃ ᏙᎩᏨᏍᏛᎢ.
012508.phonetic: U-ni-ne-gu-no hi-a ni-du-ni-we-se-le a-ni-ga-ta-hna-i; I-ga-dv go-i i-tsa-tse-li s-gi-ne-v-si, do-gv-tlo-hi-se-ha-ye-no do-gi-tsv-s-dv-i.

012509.english: But the wise answered, saying, Not so; lest there be not enough for us and you: but go ye rather to them that sell, and buy for yourselves.
012509.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ ᎤᏂᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᏝᎨ ᏰᎵ ᏱᏙᎨᎩᏰᎵᎦ ᏂᎦᏛ, ᎢᏤᎾᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏂᏃᏗᏍᎬ, ᎢᏨᏒ ᏫᏥᏩᎯ.
012509.phonetic: A-se-no a-ni-ga-ta-hna-i u-ni-ne-tsv hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Tla-ge ye-li yi-do-ge-gi-ye-li-ga ni-ga-dv, i-tse-na-quo-s-gi-ni di-ni-no-di-s-gv, i-tsv-sv wi-tsi-wa-hi.

012510.english: And while they went to buy, the bridegroom came; and they that were ready went in with him to the marriage: and the door was shut.
012510.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏩᏎᏅᏃ ᎠᏕᏒᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᎷᏤᎢ, ᎤᎾᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏣᎦᏨᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏭᏂᏴᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏍᏚᏁ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
012510.phonetic: U-ni-wa-se-nv-no a-de-sv-hv-s-gi u-lu-tse-i, u-na-dv-nv-i-s-di-no na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha tsa-ga-tsv-s-do-di-yi wu-ni-yv-le-i, a-le u-ni-s-du-ne ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi.

012511.english: Afterward came also the other virgins, saying, Lord, Lord, open to us.
012511.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᎠᎾᏛ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎡᏍᎩᏍᏚᎩ.
012511.phonetic: O-ni-no na-s-quo a-ni-so-i a-na-dv u-ni-lu-tse-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, e-s-gi-s-du-gi.

012512.english: But he answered and said, Verily I say unto you, I know you not.
012512.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏧᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏨᎦᏔᎭ.
012512.phonetic: A-se-no tsu-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-i; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsv-yo-se-ha, v-tla yi-tsv-ga-ta-ha.

012513.english: Watch therefore, for ye know neither the day nor the hour wherein the Son of man cometh.
012513.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ.
012513.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di, v-tla-ye-no yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-hi-yu i-ga ge-sv a-le i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv u-lu-hi-s-di-yi yv-wi U-we-tsi.

012514.english: For the kingdom of heaven is as a man travelling into a far country, who called his own servants, and delivered unto them his goods.
012514.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᏅ ᏥᏮᏗᎦᎶᏏᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏫᏚᏯᏅᎮ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᏲᎯᏎᎴ ᎤᎿᎭᎥᎢ.
012514.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-quo-ye-no gi-lo a-s-ga-ya i-nv-tsi-wv-di-ga-lo-si-se-i, a-le tsi-wi-du-ya-nv-he tsu-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le tsi-du-yo-hi-se-le u-hna-v-i.

012515.english: And unto one he gave five talents, to another two, and to another one; to every man according to his several ability; and straightway took his journey.
012515.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏚᏁᎴᎢ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ, ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎬᏩᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏂᎩᏎᎢ.
012515.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no hi-s-gi i-ya-ga-yv-li a-de-lv du-ne-le-i, so-i-no ta-li i-ya-ga-yv-li, so-i-no sa-quo i-ya-ga-yv-li, a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha na-s-gi ye-li i-gv-wa-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i.  Hna-quo-no u-ni-gi-se-i.

012516.english: Then he that had received the five talents went and traded with the same, and made them other five talents.
012516.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏣᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏪᏅᏎ ᏭᏃᏔᏁᎢ, ᎯᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎤᏁᏉᏤᎴᎢ.
012516.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-s-gi i-ya-ga-yv-li tsa-tsi-ne-lv-hi u-we-nv-se wu-no-ta-ne-i, hi-s-gi-no i-ya-ga-yv-li u-ne-quo-tse-le-i.

012517.english: And likewise he that had received two, he also gained other two.
012517.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎴ Ꮎ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏣᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎤᏁᏉᏤᎴᎢ.
012517.phonetic: Na-s-quo a-le na ta-li i-ya-ga-yv-li tsa-tsi-ne-lv-hi na-s-quo ta-li i-ya-ga-yv-li u-ne-quo-tse-le-i.

012518.english: But he that had received one went and digged in the earth, and hid his lord's money.
012518.cherokee: ᏌᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏣᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏪᏅᏎᎢ, ᏭᏍᎪᎭ ᎦᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏚᏩᏍᎦᎳᏁ ᎤᎾᏝᎢ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎠᏕᎸ.
012518.phonetic: Sa-quo-s-gi-ni i-ya-ga-yv-li tsa-tsi-ne-lv-hi u-we-nv-se-i, wu-s-go-ha ga-do-hi, a-le wi-du-wa-s-ga-la-ne u-na-tla-i tsu-tse-li a-de-lv.

012519.english: After a long time the lord of those servants cometh, and reckoneth with them.
012519.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏳᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᎷᏤ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎾᏝᎢ, ᎣᏍᏛᏃ ᏄᏅᏁᎴᎢ.
012519.phonetic: I-lv-hi-yu-no i-yv-dv u-lu-tse na-s-gi ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di u-ni-na-tla-i, o-s-dv-no nu-nv-ne-le-i.

012520.english: And so he that had received five talents came and brought other five talents, saying, Lord, thou deliveredst unto me five talents: behold, I have gained beside them five talents more.
012520.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏣᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᎷᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏲᎴ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎠᏕᎸ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ, ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏕᏍᎩᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏕᏴᎵ ᎬᎩᏁᏉᏤᎸ.
012520.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-no i-ya-ga-yv-li tsa-tsi-ne-lv-hi u-lu-tse-i, a-le du-yo-le nv-wa-na-da-le hi-s-gi i-ya-ga-yv-li a-de-lv, hi-a nu-we-se-i; S-gi-na-tla-i, hi-s-gi i-ya-ga-yv-li a-de-lv de-s-gi-yo-hi-se-lv-gi; gv-ni-yu-quo nv-wa-na-da-le hi-s-gi i-ya-de-yv-li gv-gi-ne-quo-tse-lv.

012521.english: His lord said unto him, Well done, thou good and faithful servant: thou hast been faithful over a few things, I will make thee ruler over many things: enter thou into the joy of thy lord.
012521.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏝᎢᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎣᏏᏳ!  ᎰᏍᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎯᎦᎵᏯ ᎡᏣᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ!  ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ; ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏅᏓᎬᏴᏁᎵ; ᎯᏴᎭ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏣᎾᏝᎢ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
012521.phonetic: U-na-tla-i-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; O-si-yu!  ho-s-dv a-le hi-ga-li-ya e-tsa-nv-si-da-s-di!  du-yu-go-dv ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv u-s-di tsu-da-le-nv-dv de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i; u-tsa-ti tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsa-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi nv-da-gv-yv-ne-li; hi-yv-ha o-s-dv a-da-nv-da-di-s-di-yi tsa-na-tla-i u-tse-li-go-hi.

012522.english: He also that had received two talents came and said, Lord, thou deliveredst unto me two talents: behold, I have gained two other talents beside them.
012522.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏃ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏣᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᎷᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ, ᏔᎵ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏕᏍᎩᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎬᎩᏁᏉᏤᎸ.
012522.phonetic: Na-s-quo-no ta-li i-ya-ga-yv-li tsa-tsi-ne-lv-hi u-lu-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-i; S-gi-na-tla-i, ta-li i-ya-ga-yv-li a-de-lv de-s-gi-yo-hi-se-lv-gi; gv-ni-yu-quo nv-wa-na-da-le ta-li i-ya-ga-yv-li gv-gi-ne-quo-tse-lv.

012523.english: His lord said unto him, Well done, good and faithful servant; thou hast been faithful over a few things, I will make thee ruler over many things: enter thou into the joy of thy lord.
012523.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏝᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎣᏏᏳ!  ᎰᏍᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎯᎦᎵᏯ ᎡᏣᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ!  ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ; ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏅᏓᎬᏴᏁᎵ; ᎯᏴᎭ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏣᎾᏝᎢ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
012523.phonetic: U-na-tla-i hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; O-si-yu!  ho-s-dv a-le hi-ga-li-ya e-tsa-nv-si-da-s-di!  du-yu-go-dv ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv u-s-di tsu-da-le-nv-dv de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i; u-tsa-ti tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsa-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi nv-da-gv-yv-ne-li; hi-yv-ha o-s-dv a-da-nv-da-di-s-di-yi tsa-na-tla-i u-tse-li-go-hi.

012524.english: Then he which had received the one talent came and said, Lord, I knew thee that thou art an hard man, reaping where thou hast not sown, and gathering where thou hast not strawed:
012524.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏣᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᎷᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ, ᎬᎦᏔᎲᎩ, ᎯᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᏍᎫᏕᏍᎬᎢ ᎾᎿᎭᏂᏣᏫᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎱᏖᏍᎬᎢ ᎾᎿᎭᏂᏣᎴᎳᏛᏅᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
012524.phonetic: Hna-quo-no sa-quo i-ya-ga-yv-li tsa-tsi-ne-lv-hi u-lu-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-i; S-gi-na-tla-i, gv-ga-ta-hv-gi, hi-s-da-yi-yu ge-sv-i, a-le hi-s-gu-de-s-gv-i na-hna ni-tsa-wi-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-le hu-te-s-gv-i na-hna ni-tsa-le-la-dv-nv-na ge-sv-i.

012525.english: And I was afraid, and went and hid thy talent in the earth: lo, there thou hast that is thine.
012525.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᏍᎦᎢᎲᎢ ᎠᏇᏅᏒᎩ, ᏫᏓᎬᏍᎦᎳᏅᎩ ᎦᏙᎯ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏗᏣᏤᎵᎦ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏣᏤᎵᎦ.
012525.phonetic: A-le tsi-s-ga-i-hv-i a-que-nv-sv-gi, wi-da-gv-s-ga-la-nv-gi ga-do-hi a-de-lv di-tsa-tse-li-ga; gv-ni-yu-quo a-ni na-s-gi di-tsa-tse-li-ga.

012526.english: His lord answered and said unto him, Thou wicked and slothful servant, thou knewest that I reap where I sowed not, and gather where I have not strawed:
012526.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏝᎢᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏣᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏓᏄᎸᏗ ᎡᏣᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ! ᎯᎦᏔᎲᎩ ᏥᏍᎫᏕᏍᎬ ᎾᎿᎭᎾᎩᏫᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎫᏖᏍᎬ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎾᎩᎴᎳᏛᏅᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ!
012526.phonetic: U-na-tla-i-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Tsa-ne-gu-tsi-dv a-le tsa-da-nu-lv-di e-tsa-nv-si-da-s-di!  hi-ga-ta-hv-gi tsi-s-gu-de-s-gv na-hna na-gi-wi-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-le gu-te-s-gv na-hna na-gi-le-la-dv-nv-na ge-sv-i!

012527.english: Thou oughtest therefore to have put my money to the exchangers, and then at my coming I should have received mine own with usury.
012527.cherokee: ᎠᏕᎸ ᏗᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎩᏱ ᏱᏫᏙᏣᏁ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏗᏆᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎪᎯ ᏥᏥᎷᎩ ᏱᏓᎩᎪᎮ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁᏉᏨᎯ.
012527.phonetic: A-de-lv di-ni-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gi-yi yi-wi-do-tsa-ne a-de-lv di-qua-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi-no go-hi tsi-tsi-lu-gi yi-da-gi-go-he di-qua-tse-li a-le u-ni-ne-quo-tsv-hi.

012528.english: Take therefore the talent from him, and give it unto him which hath ten talents.
012528.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏥᏙᎡᏥᎩᏏᏉ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎠᏕᎸ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏃ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏧᎯ ᏤᏥᎥᏏ.
012528.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tsi-do-e-tsi-gi-si-quo sa-quo i-ya-ga-yv-li a-de-lv, a-s-go-hi-no i-ya-ga-yv-li tsu-hi tse-tsi-v-si.

012529.english: For unto every one that hath shall be given, and he shall have abundance: but from him that hath not shall be taken away even that which he hath.
012529.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎤᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏣᏘᏃ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏕᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᏄᎲᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᎩᎡᏗᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎲᎢ.
012529.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no u-he-s-di a-tsi-ne-di ge-se-s-di, u-tsa-ti-no u-s-qua-ni-go-de-s-di; gi-lo-s-gi-ni nu-hv-na ge-se-s-di a-tsi-gi-e-di-quo ge-se-s-di na-s-gi na-s-quo u-hv-i.

012530.english: And cast ye the unprofitable servant into outer darkness: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
012530.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎦᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏙᏱᏗᏢ ᏧᎵᏏᎬ ᏪᏣᏓᎤᎦ; ᎾᎿᎭᏓᏂᏴᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᎸᏓᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏓᏂᏄᏙᎬᎢ.
012530.phonetic: Hi-a-no go-hu-s-di gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ga-nv-si-da-s-di do-yi-di-tlv tsu-li-si-gv we-tsa-da-u-ga; na-hna da-ni-yv-ge-s-di a-le da-ni-lv-da-gi-s-ge-s-di da-ni-nu-do-gv-i.

012531.english: When the Son of man shall come in his glory, and all the holy angels with him, then shall he sit upon the throne of his glory:
012531.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏄᏬᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏓᏘᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᏓᎦᏂ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎤᏪᏍᎩᎸᎢ;
012531.phonetic: I-yu-no hna-quo yv-wi U-we-tsi ga-lu-tsv-ha u-wa-sv u-tse-li-ga ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv u-nu-wo-s-de-s-di, a-le ni-ga-dv ge-tsi-lv-quo-di di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi da-ti-ne-he-s-di, hna-quo da-ga-ni ga-lv-quo-di-yu u-we-s-gi-lv-i;

012532.english: And before him shall be gathered all nations: and he shall separate them one from another, as a shepherd divideth his sheep from the goats:
012532.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢᏃ ᏙᏓᎨᏥᎳᏫᏗ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏄᎾᏓᎴᏒ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏛᎦᎴᏅᏔᏂ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏫ-ᏗᎦᏘᏯ ᏥᏓᎦᎴᏅᏗᏍᎪ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎠᏫ ᎤᏂᏃᏕᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏫ ᏗᏂᎭᏄᎸᎯ.
012532.phonetic: I-gv-yi-di-tlv-no do-da-ge-tsi-la-wi-di ni-ga-di-yu nu-na-da-le-sv yv-wi, a-le do-dv-ga-le-nv-ta-ni na-s-gi-ya a-wi--di-ga-ti-ya tsi-da-ga-le-nv-di-s-go tsu-tse-li a-wi u-ni-no-de-na a-le a-wi di-ni-ha-nu-lv-hi.

012533.english: And he shall set the sheep on his right hand, but the goats on the left.
012533.cherokee: ᎠᏫᏃ ᎤᏂᏃᏕᎾ ᎠᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏙᏓᎦᎪᏔᏂ, ᎠᏫᏃ ᏗᏂᎭᏄᎸᎯ ᎠᎦᏍᎦᏂ ᎢᏗᏢ;
012533.phonetic: A-wi-no u-ni-no-de-na a-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv do-da-ga-go-ta-ni, a-wi-no di-ni-ha-nu-lv-hi a-ga-s-ga-ni i-di-tlv;

012534.english: Then shall the King say unto them on his right hand, Come, ye blessed of my Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world:
012534.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏙᏓᎦᏪᏎᎵ ᎠᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎢ; ᎡᏤᎾ, ᎡᏙᏓ ᎢᏥᎸᏉᏔᏅᎯ, ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎡᏣᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᏙᏢᏅ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ.
012534.phonetic: Hna-quo-no U-gv-wi-yu-hi hi-a ni-do-da-ga-we-se-li a-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv a-ni-do-na-i; E-tse-na, E-do-da I-tsi-lv-quo-ta-nv-hi, i-tsa-tse-li wi-ni-ga-li-s-da u-tse-li-go-hi e-tsa-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi e-lo-hi tsu-do-tlv-nv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv.

012535.english: For I was an hungred, and ye gave me meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me drink: I was a stranger, and ye took me in:
012535.cherokee: ᎠᎪᏄᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᏲᏏᏍᎬᎩ, ᎥᏍᎩᏰᎳᏍᏔᏅᏃ; ᎠᎩᏔᏕᎩᏍᎬᎩ, ᎥᏍᎩᎤᏅᏃ; ᏅᎩᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎥᏍᎩᏴᏔᏅᎩ;
012535.phonetic: A-go-nu-ye-no a-gi-yo-si-s-gv-gi, v-s-gi-ye-la-s-ta-nv-no; a-gi-ta-de-gi-s-gv-gi, v-s-gi-u-nv-no; nv-gi-ga-ta-hv-na ge-sv-gi, v-s-gi-yv-ta-nv-gi;

012536.english: Naked, and ye clothed me: I was sick, and ye visited me: I was in prison, and ye came unto me.
012536.cherokee: ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᏙᏍᎩᏄᏬᎥᎩᏃ; ᎠᎩᏢᎬᎩ, ᎥᏍᎩᏯᎦᏔᏂᎸᎩᏃ; ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎥᎩᏍᏚᎲᎩ, ᎥᏍᎩᏩᏛᎯᎸᎩᏃ.
012536.phonetic: A-gi-ye-lv-ha ge-sv-gi, do-s-gi-nu-wo-v-gi-no; a-gi-tlv-gv-gi, v-s-gi-ya-ga-ta-ni-lv-gi-no; di-da-s-du-di-yi v-gi-s-du-hv-gi, v-s-gi-wa-dv-hi-lv-gi-no.

012537.english: Then shall the righteous answer him, saying, Lord, when saw we thee an hungred, and fed thee? or thirsty, and gave thee drink?
012537.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᏛᏂᏁᏥ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏪᏎᎵ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎢᎳᎩᏳ ᎢᏨᎪᏒ ᏣᏲᏏᏍᎨᎢ, ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏍᏔᏁᏃ; ᎠᎴ ᏣᏔᏕᎩᏍᎨᎢ, ᎢᏨᎤᏁᏃ;
012537.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-na-da-nv-ti dv-ni-ne-tsi hi-a nv-da-gv-wa-we-se-li; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, i-la-gi-yu i-tsv-go-sv tsa-yo-si-s-ge-i, i-tsv-ye-la-s-ta-ne-no; a-le tsa-ta-de-gi-s-ge-i, i-tsv-u-ne-no;

012538.english: When saw we thee a stranger, and took thee in? or naked, and clothed thee?
012538.cherokee: ᎢᎳᎩᏳ ᎢᏨᎪᎡ ᏁᏣᎦᏔᎲᎾ, ᎢᏨᏴᏔᏁᏃ; ᎠᎴ ᏣᏰᎸᎭ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎢᏨᏄᏬᎡᏃ;
012538.phonetic: I-la-gi-yu i-tsv-go-e ne-tsa-ga-ta-hv-na, i-tsv-yv-ta-ne-no; a-le tsa-ye-lv-ha ge-se-i, i-tsv-nu-wo-e-no;

012539.english: Or when saw we thee sick, or in prison, and came unto thee?
012539.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᎳᎩᏳ ᎢᏨᎪᎡ ᏣᏢᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎡᏣᏍᏚᎮᎢ, ᎢᏨᏯᎦᏔᏂᎴᏃ?
012539.phonetic: A-le i-la-gi-yu i-tsv-go-e tsa-tlv-ge-i, a-le di-da-s-du-di-yi e-tsa-s-du-he-i, i-tsv-ya-ga-ta-ni-le-no?

012540.english: And the King shall answer and say unto them, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye have done it unto one of the least of these my brethren, ye have done it unto me.
012540.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᏓᎧᏁᏥ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏙᏓᎦᏪᏎᎵ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏥᏁᏣᏛᏁᎸ ᎤᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᏴ ᏂᏍᎩᏯᏛᏁᎸᎩ.
012540.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no da-ka-ne-tsi hi-a ni-do-da-ga-we-se-li; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Na-s-gi-ye-no tsi-ne-tsa-dv-ne-lv u-s-di-ka-ni hi-a na-s-gi o-tsa-li-nv-tli, a-yv ni-s-gi-ya-dv-ne-lv-gi.

012541.english: Then shall he say also unto them on the left hand, Depart from me, ye cursed, into everlasting fire, prepared for the devil and his angels:
012541.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᏙᏓᎦᏪᏎᎵ ᎠᎦᏍᎦᏂ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎢ; ᏍᎩᏯᏓᏅᏏ, ᎡᏥᏍᎦᏨᎯ, ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᏥᎸᏱ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏫᏥᎶᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎨᎪᏢᎾᏁᎸᎯ.
012541.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-quo ni-do-da-ga-we-se-li a-ga-s-ga-ni i-di-tlv a-ni-do-na-i; S-gi-ya-da-nv-si, e-tsi-s-ga-tsv-hi, wi-na-s-dv-na a-tsi-lv-yi di-ge-sv wi-tsi-lo-hi, na-s-gi a-s-gi-na a-le tsu-tse-li di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ge-go-tlv-na-ne-lv-hi.

012542.english: For I was an hungred, and ye gave me no meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me no drink:
012542.cherokee: ᎠᎪᏄᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᏲᏏᏍᎬᎩ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏱᏍᎩᏰᎳᏍᏔᏁᎢ; ᎠᎩᏔᏕᎩᏍᎬᎩ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏱᏍᎩᎤᏁᎢ;
012542.phonetic: A-go-nu-ye-no a-gi-yo-si-s-gv-gi, v-tla-no yi-s-gi-ye-la-s-ta-ne-i; a-gi-ta-de-gi-s-gv-gi, v-tla-no yi-s-gi-u-ne-i;

012543.english: I was a stranger, and ye took me not in: naked, and ye clothed me not: sick, and in prison, and ye visited me not.
012543.cherokee: ᏅᎩᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏱᏍᎩᏴᏔᏁᎢ; ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏱᏗᏍᎩᏄᏬᎡᎢ; ᎠᎩᏢᎬᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎥᎩᏍᏚᎲᎩ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏱᏍᎩᏩᏛᎯᎴᎢ.
012543.phonetic: Nv-gi-ga-ta-hv-na ge-sv-gi, v-tla-no yi-s-gi-yv-ta-ne-i; a-gi-ye-lv-ha ge-sv-gi, v-tla-no yi-di-s-gi-nu-wo-e-i; a-gi-tlv-gv-gi, a-le di-da-s-du-di-yi v-gi-s-du-hv-gi, v-tla-no yi-s-gi-wa-dv-hi-le-i.

012544.english: Then shall they also answer him, saying, Lord, when saw we thee an hungred, or athirst, or a stranger, or naked, or sick, or in prison, and did not minister unto thee?
012544.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏛᏂᏁᏥ, ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏪᏎᎵ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎢᎳᎩᏳ ᎢᏨᎪᎡ ᏣᏲᏏᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏔᏕᎩᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏁᏣᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏰᎸᎭ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏢᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎡᏣᏍᏚᎮᎢ, ᏂᏨᏍᏕᎸᎲᎾᏃ ᎨᏎᎢ?
012544.phonetic: Na-s-quo-no na-s-gi dv-ni-ne-tsi, hi-a nv-da-gv-wa-we-se-li, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, i-la-gi-yu i-tsv-go-e tsa-yo-si-s-ge-i, a-le tsa-ta-de-gi-s-ge-i, a-le ne-tsa-ga-ta-hv-na ge-se-i, a-le tsa-ye-lv-ha ge-se-i, a-le tsa-tlv-ge-i, a-le di-da-s-du-di-yi e-tsa-s-du-he-i, ni-tsv-s-de-lv-hv-na-no ge-se-i?

012545.english: Then shall he answer them, saying, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye did it not to one of the least of these, ye did it not to me.
012545.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏓᎧᏁᏥ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏙᏓᎦᏪᏎᎵ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏁᏣᏛᏁᎸᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏂᏍᎩᏯᏛᏁᎴᎢ.
012545.phonetic: Hna-quo-no da-ka-ne-tsi hi-a ni-do-da-ga-we-se-li; u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, na-s-gi-ye-no ne-tsa-dv-ne-lv-na ge-sv u-s-di-ka-ni hi-a na-s-gi, a-yv v-tla yi-ni-s-gi-ya-dv-ne-le-i.

012546.english: And these shall go away into everlasting punishment: but the righteous into life eternal.
012546.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏮᏛᏂᎶᏏ; ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘᏍᎩᏂ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ.
012546.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi wi-na-s-dv-na a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-yi di-ge-sv wv-dv-ni-lo-si; u-na-da-nv-ti-s-gi-ni wi-na-s-dv-na gv-ni-dv di-ge-sv-i.

012601.english: And it came to pass, when Jesus had finished all these sayings, he said unto his disciples,
012601.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏍᏆᏛ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ;
012601.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi, na-s-gi Tsi-sa u-s-qua-dv ni-ga-dv hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-we-s-gv-i, hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi;

012602.english: Ye know that after two days is the feast of the passover, and the Son of man is betrayed to be crucified.
012602.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏳᏒᎯ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏣᎦᏡᏔᏂᏒ ᎠᎦᏛᏗᏱ.
012602.phonetic: I-tsi-ga-ta-ha ta-li i-yu-sv-hi ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ge-sv-i, a-le yv-wi U-we-tsi tsa-ga-tlu-ta-ni-sv a-ga-dv-di-yi.

012603.english: Then assembled together the chief priests, and the scribes, and the elders of the people, unto the palace of the high priest, who was called Caiaphas,
012603.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏚᏂᎳᏫᏤ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏴᏫ, ᎦᏁᎸ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎧᏯᏆ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ;
012603.phonetic: Hna-quo-no du-ni-la-wi-tse nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi a-ne-hv yv-wi, ga-ne-lv nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi Ka-ya-qua tsu-do-i-dv;

012604.english: And consulted that they might take Jesus by subtilty, and kill him.
012604.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎴᏃ ᎦᎶᏄᎮᏛ ᎤᏅᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏂᏴᏗᏱ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
012604.phonetic: U-ni-no-he-le-no ga-lo-nu-he-dv u-nv-do-di-yi u-ni-ni-yv-di-yi Tsi-sa, a-le u-ni-hi-s-di-yi.

012605.english: But they said, Not on the feast day, lest there be an uproar among the people.
012605.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏯᎾᎵᏖᎸᎲᎦ ᏴᏫ.
012605.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Tle-s-di di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ge-sv-i, na-hi-yu-ye-no yi-gi u-tsa-ti ya-na-li-te-lv-hv-ga yv-wi.

012606.english: Now when Jesus was in Bethany, in the house of Simon the leper,
012606.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏇᏗᏂᏱ ᎡᏙᎲᎢ, ᏌᏩᏂ ᎠᏓᏰᏍᎩ ᎤᏢᎩ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ,
012606.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no Que-di-ni-yi e-do-hv-i, Sa-wa-ni a-da-ye-s-gi u-tlv-gi ga-ne-lv-i,

012607.english: There came unto him a woman having an alabaster box of very precious ointment, and poured it on his head, as he sat at meat.
012607.cherokee: ᎤᎷᏤᎸᎩ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎠᏰᎲᎩ ᎫᎫ ᏅᏯ ᎤᏁᎬ ᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏟᏍᏛᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᏠᏁᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎶᏁᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᎦᏅᎬ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ.
012607.phonetic: U-lu-tse-lv-gi a-ge-yv a-ye-hv-gi gu-gu nv-ya u-ne-gv go-tlv-ta-nv-hi a-tli-s-dv-gi u-tsa-ti tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-tlo-ne-di, a-le u-lo-ne-ta-nv-gi a-s-go-li ga-nv-gv a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i.

012608.english: But when his disciples saw it, they had indignation, saying, To what purpose is this waste?
012608.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎬᏩᎪᎲ ᎤᏂᏔᎳᏬᏒᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏣᏤᏬᎩ?
012608.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no gv-wa-go-hv u-ni-ta-la-wo-sv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ga-do-no hi-a tsa-tse-wo-gi?

012609.english: For this ointment might have been sold for much, and given to the poor.
012609.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎠᏠᏁᏗ ᏳᎾᏗᏅᏎ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏱᏚᎬᏩᎳᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏗᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
012609.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no a-tlo-ne-di yu-na-di-nv-se u-tsa-ti yi-du-gv-wa-la-ne-i, a-le na-s-gi u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi di-ne-di yi-ge-se-i.

012610.english: When Jesus understood it, he said unto them, Why trouble ye the woman? for she hath wrought a good work upon me.
012610.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎡᏣᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᎠᎨᏴ?  ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ ᏥᎾᏋᎦ.
012610.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-do-le-ho-sv, hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do-no i-e-tsa-de-ya-do-di a-ge-yv?  O-si-yu-ye-no du-lv-wi-s-da-si tsi-na-quv-ga.

012611.english: For ye have the poor always with you; but me ye have not always.
012611.cherokee: ᎤᏲᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎨᏤᎳᏗᏙᎭ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏱᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎭ.
012611.phonetic: U-yo-ye-no i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi ni-go-hi-lv ge-tse-la-di-do-ha, a-yv-s-gi-ni v-tla ni-go-hi-lv yi-tsv-ye-la-di-do-ha.

012612.english: For in that she hath poured this ointment on my body, she did it for my burial.
012612.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎠᏠᏁᏗ ᏥᏰᎸᎢ ᏣᎩᎶᏁᏓ, ᎥᎩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗᎭ.
012612.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no a-tlo-ne-di tsi-ye-lv-i tsa-gi-lo-ne-da, v-gi-ni-so-di-yi a-qua-dv-nv-i-s-di-ha.

012613.english: Verily I say unto you, Wheresoever this gospel shall be preached in the whole world, there shall also this, that this woman hath done, be told for a memorial of her.
012613.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᏂᏙᎸᎭ ᎯᎠ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎡᎳᏂᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏥᎾᏛᎦ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏅᏓᏗᏍᏙᏗ.
012613.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; A-na-li-tsi-do-ni-do-lv-ha hi-a o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv i-lv-hi-tlv e-la-ni-gv-i, na-s-quo hi-a a-ge-yv tsi-na-dv-ga u-ni-no-he-di ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi a-ga-nv-da-di-s-do-di.

012614.english: Then one of the twelve, called Judas Iscariot, went unto the chief priests,
012614.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏧᏓᏏ ᎢᏍᎦᎳᏗ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᏫᏚᎷᏤᎴᎢ,
012614.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-si-yv-wi ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv-i, Tsu-da-si I-s-ga-la-di tsu-do-i-dv, nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi wi-du-lu-tse-le-i,

012615.english: And said unto them, What will ye give me, and I will deliver him unto you? And they covenanted with him for thirty pieces of silver.
012615.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏫᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎦᏙ ᏓᏍᎩᏁᎵ ᎠᏴᏃ ᏙᏓᏨᏲᎯᏎᎵ?  ᏦᎠᏍᎪᎯᏃ ᎠᏰᎵ-ᎠᏕᎸ ᏕᎬᏩᏌᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ.
012615.phonetic: Hi-a wi-ni-du-we-se-le-i; Ga-do da-s-gi-ne-li a-yv-no do-da-tsv-yo-hi-se-li?  Tso-a-s-go-hi-no a-ye-li--a-de-lv de-gv-wa-sa-s-da-ne-le-i.

012616.english: And from that time he sought opportunity to betray him.

012617.english: Now the first day of the feast of unleavened bread the disciples came to Jesus, saying unto him, Where wilt thou that we prepare for thee to eat the passover?
012617.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏉᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎾᎪᏔᏅᎾ ᎦᏚ ᎠᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸ ᏥᏌ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎭᏢ ᏣᏚᎵᎭ ᎣᎦᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ.
012617.phonetic: I-gv-yi-yi-quo-no i-ga na-go-ta-nv-na ga-du a-gi-s-di-yi ge-sv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi gv-wa-lu-tse-lv Tsi-sa, hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi, Ha-tlv tsa-du-li-ha o-ga-dv-nv-i-s-do-di-yi tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ka-no-hi-ye-gi.

012618.english: And he said, Go into the city to such a man, and say unto him, The Master saith, My time is at hand; I will keep the passover at thy house with my disciples.
012618.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎢᏤᎾ ᏗᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏤᎲ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏥᏪᏎᎸᎭ; ᏗᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᎩᏍᏆᎸᎡᎵᏗ, ᎬᎩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᏁᎸ ᏓᏲᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏂ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ.
012618.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-sv-gi; I-tse-na di-ga-du-hv-i, na-hna tse-hv a-s-ga-ya, hi-a-no na-tsi-we-se-lv-ha; Di-de-yo-hv-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-we-ha; Hna-quo a-gi-s-qua-lv-e-li-di, gv-gi-s-da-wa-di-do-hi hi-ne-lv da-yo-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-ta-ni ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ge-sv-i.

012619.english: And the disciples did as Jesus had appointed them; and they made ready the passover.
012619.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏥᏌ ᏚᏁᏤᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏄᏅᏁᎸᎩ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ.
012619.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no nu-s-dv Tsi-sa du-ne-tse-lv na-s-gi nu-na-dv-ne-lv-gi, a-le o-s-dv nu-nv-ne-lv-gi ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi.

012620.english: Now when the even was come, he sat down with the twelve.
012620.cherokee: ᎤᏒᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᎾᏂᏢᏅᎩ [ᏥᏌ] ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ
012620.phonetic: U-sv-no nu-li-s-ta-nv u-na-ni-tlv-nv-gi [Tsi-sa] ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi

012621.english: And as they did eat, he said, Verily I say unto you, that one of you shall betray me.
012621.cherokee: ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏓᏑᏯ ᏛᏆᏡᏔᏂ.
012621.phonetic: A-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-no hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv sa-quo u-da-su-ya dv-qua-tlu-ta-ni.

012622.english: And they were exceeding sorrowful, and began every one of them to say unto him, Lord, is it I?
012622.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘᏃ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎲᎩ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏥᎪ ᎠᏴ?
012622.phonetic: U-tsa-ti-no u-yo-i-yu u-ni-ye-lv-nv-gi, a-le u-na-le-nv-hv-gi a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, tsi-go a-yv?

012623.english: And he answered and said, He that dippeth his hand with me in the dish, the same shall betray me.
012623.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏦᏍᏓᏑᏫᏍᎦ ᎠᏖᎵᏙᎩᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏛᏆᏡᏔᏂ.
012623.phonetic: U-ne-tsv-no hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; i-tsu-la-ha tso-s-da-su-wi-s-ga a-te-li-do-gi-hi na-s-gi dv-qua-tlu-ta-ni.

012624.english: The Son of man goeth as it is written of him: but woe unto that man by whom the Son of man is betrayed! it had been good for that man if he had not been born.
012624.cherokee: ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎢ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏡᏗᏍᎩ.  ᎣᏏᏳ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏄᏕᏅᎾᏉ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
012624.phonetic: Yv-wi U-we-tsi a-i nu-s-dv go-we-li a-tsi-no-he-s-gv-i; a-se-no u-yo-i-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya a-wi U-we-tsi a-tlu-di-s-gi.  O-si-yu yi-ge-se na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya nu-de-nv-na-quo yi-ge-se-i.

012625.english: Then Judas, which betrayed him, answered and said, Master, is it I? He said unto him, Thou hast said.
012625.cherokee: ᏧᏓᏏᏃ ᎠᏓᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᏥᎪ ᎠᏴ?  ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏰᎵ ᏂᏫ.
012625.phonetic: Tsu-da-si-no a-da-tlu-di-s-gi u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, tsi-go a-yv?  Hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ye-li ni-wi.

012626.english: And as they were eating, Jesus took bread, and blessed it, and brake it, and gave it to the disciples, and said, Take, eat; this is my body.
012626.cherokee: ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎦᏚ ᎤᎩᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᎭᎷᏴᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏁᎸ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎢᏥᎩ, ᎢᏥᎦ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏰᎸᎢ.
012626.phonetic: A-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-no Tsi-sa ga-du u-gi-sv-gi, a-le u-li-he-li-tsv-gi, a-le u-gv-ha-lu-yv-gi, a-le du-ne-lv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, hi-a-no nu-we-sv-gi; I-tsi-gi, i-tsi-ga, hi-a na-s-gi a-yv tsi-ye-lv-i.

012627.english: And he took the cup, and gave thanks, and gave it to them, saying, Drink ye all of it;
012627.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗᏃ ᎤᎩᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨ ᏚᏁᏁᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏣᏗᏔ;
012627.phonetic: U-li-s-qui-di-no u-gi-sv a-le u-li-he-li-tsv du-ne-ne-lv-gi, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Ni-tsi-v i-tsa-di-ta;

012628.english: For this is my blood of the new testament, which is shed for many for the remission of sins.
012628.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎠᎩᎩᎬ ᎢᏤ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏥᎨᎦᏤᏪᎸ, ᎦᎨᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
012628.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a a-gi-gi-gv i-tse ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i, na-s-gi u-ni-tsa-ti tsi-ge-ga-tse-we-lv, ga-ge-tsi-ne-di-yi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

012629.english: But I say unto you, I will not drink henceforth of this fruit of the vine, until that day when I drink it new with you in my Father's kingdom.
012629.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎪᎩ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᎦᎦᏗᏔ ᎯᎠ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ, ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏤ ᎢᏓᏗᏔᎲᎭ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
012629.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; v-tla i-lv-hi-yu go-gi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv yv-ga-ga-di-ta hi-a te-lv-la-di u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi, gv-ni na-hi-yu i-ga i-tsu-la-ha i-tse i-da-di-ta-hv-ha E-do-da u-tse-li-go-hi.

012630.english: And when they had sung an hymn, they went out into the mount of Olives.
012630.cherokee: ᏚᏂᏃᎩᏒᏃ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏄᎪᏨᎩ, ᎣᎵᏩᏲᎢ ᎤᏌᎯᎸ ᏭᏂᎶᏒᎩ.
012630.phonetic: Du-ni-no-gi-sv-no di-ka-no-gi-s-di u-ni-nu-go-tsv-gi, O-li-wa-yo-i u-sa-hi-lv wu-ni-lo-sv-gi.

012631.english: Then saith Jesus unto them, All ye shall be offended because of me this night: for it is written, I will smite the shepherd, and the sheep of the flock shall be scattered abroad.
012631.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏂᎯ ᏂᏥᎥ ᏙᏓᏦᏕᎵ ᎪᎯ ᏒᏃᏱ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏴ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.  ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎪᏪᎳ, ᏓᏥᏴᏂᎵ ᎠᏫ-ᏗᎦᏘᏯ, ᎠᏫᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᏛᎾᏗᎦᎴᏲᏥ.
012631.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; ni-hi ni-tsi-v do-da-tso-de-li go-hi sv-no-yi tsi-gi, a-yv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di.  Hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv i-go-we-la, da-tsi-yv-ni-li A-wi--di-ga-ti-ya, a-wi-no u-na-da-tlu-gv dv-na-di-ga-le-yo-tsi.

012632.english: But after I am risen again, I will go before you into Galilee.
012632.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏗᏆᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏅᏓᏨᏰᏅᎡᎵ ᎨᎵᎵ.
012632.phonetic: A-se-no di-qua-le-nv-hi ge-se-s-di i-gv-yi nv-da-tsv-ye-nv-e-li Ge-li-li.

012633.english: Peter answered and said unto him, Though all men shall be offended because of thee, yet will I never be offended.
012633.cherokee: ᏈᏓ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏱᏚᏃᏕᎸ ᏂᎯ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎠᏎ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏙᎬᏉᏕᎦ.
012633.phonetic: Qui-da u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Na-s-quo ni-ga-dv yi-du-no-de-lv ni-hi yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, a-se a-yv v-tla yi-do-gv-quo-de-ga.

012634.english: Jesus said unto him, Verily I say unto thee, That this night, before the cock crow, thou shalt deny me thrice.
012634.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏪᏎᎭ; ᎪᎯᏉ ᏒᏃᏱ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏏ ᏣᏔᎦ ᎾᏂᏴᎬᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏦᎢ ᏅᏓᏍᏆᏓᏱᎵ.
012634.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-gv-we-se-ha; Go-hi-quo sv-no-yi tsi-gi a-si tsa-ta-ga na-ni-yv-gv-na ge-se-s-di tso-i nv-da-s-qua-da-yi-li.

012635.english: Peter said unto him, Though I should die with thee, yet will I not deny thee. Likewise also said all the disciples.
012635.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏗᏱᏂᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏎ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎦᎬᏯᏓᏱᎦ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ.
012635.phonetic: Qui-da-no hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; na-s-quo i-tsu-la-ha di-yi-ni-yo-hu-hi-s-di yi-gi, a-se v-tla yv-ga-gv-ya-da-yi-ga.  Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-ga-dv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi na-s-gi nu-ni-we-sv-gi.

012636.english: Then cometh Jesus with them unto a place called Gethsemane, and saith unto the disciples, Sit ye here, while I go and pray yonder.
012636.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏂᎷᏨᎩ ᎨᏏᎻᏂ ᏚᏙᎥᎢ, ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ; ᎠᏂ ᎢᏥᏁᏍᏗ ᎬᏂ ᎢᏢ ᏫᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏅᎭ.
012636.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-ni-lu-tsv-gi Ge-si-mi-ni du-do-v-i, hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi; A-ni i-tsi-ne-s-di gv-ni i-tlv wi-ga-da-do-li-s-ta-nv-ha.

012637.english: And he took with him Peter and the two sons of Zebedee, and began to be sorrowful and very heavy.
012637.cherokee: ᏚᏘᏅᏒᎩᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏤᏈᏗ ᏧᏪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏓᏕᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎦᎨᏗᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
012637.phonetic: Du-ti-nv-sv-gi-no Qui-da a-le a-ni-ta-li Tse-qui-di tsu-we-tsi, a-le u-le-nv-he e-hi-s-di u-da-nv-da-de-i, a-le u-tsa-ti ga-ge-di-yu nu-li-s-da-ne-le u-da-nv-dv-i.

012638.english: Then saith he unto them, My soul is exceeding sorrowful, even unto death: tarry ye here, and watch with me.
012638.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏛ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᎢ.  ᎠᏂ ᎢᏥᏁᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏗᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
012638.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; A-qua-da-nv-dv u-ka-li-tsv-hi u-tsa-ti e-hi-s-di ge-sv-i a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv i-ga-i.  A-ni i-tsi-ne-s-di a-le i-tsu-la-ha i-di-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di.

012639.english: And he went a little further, and fell on his face, and prayed, saying, O my Father, if it be possible, let this cup pass from me: nevertheless not as I will, but as thou wilt.
012639.cherokee: ᎤᏍᏗᎩᏛᏃ ᎤᏗᏗᏢᏍᏙᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏭᎷᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏯᏍᏚᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏩᎩᎶᎯᏏᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ; ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ.
012639.phonetic: U-s-di-gi-dv-no u-di-di-tlv-s-do-di i-yv-dv wu-lu-tse-i, a-le u-li-ya-s-du-ne-i, a-le u-da-do-li-s-ta-ne-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; E-do-da, i-yu-no ye-li i-gv-wa-li-s-do-di ge-se-s-di wa-gi-lo-hi-si-quo hi-a u-li-s-qui-di; v-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-yv nu-s-dv ga-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, ni-hi-s-gi-ni.

012640.english: And he cometh unto the disciples, and findeth them asleep, and saith unto Peter, What, could ye not watch with me one hour?
012640.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎠᏂᏅ ᏗᎤᎷᏨ ᏚᏩᏛᎮ ᎠᏂᎵᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᏈᏓ; ᎦᏙᏉ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏥᏯᏫᏍᎬ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎨᏥᏯᏫᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ?
012640.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no a-ni-nv di-u-lu-tsv du-wa-dv-he a-ni-li-ne-i, hi-a-no nu-we-se-le Qui-da; Ga-do-quo, tla-s-go tsi-ya-wi-s-gv sa-quo i-yu-tli-lo-dv i-go-hi-dv ge-tsi-ya-wi-s-di yi-gi?

012641.english: Watch and pray, that ye enter not into temptation: the spirit indeed is willing, but the flesh is weak.
012641.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᏫᏥᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎤᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ, ᎤᏇᏓᎸᏍᎩᏂ ᏩᎾᎦᎳᎯᏳ.
012641.phonetic: I-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di a-le i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi u-da-go-li-ye-di-yi ge-sv wi-tsi-na-nu-go-i-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.  A-da-nv-do u-do-hi-yu-hi u-dv-nv-i-s-di, u-que-da-lv-s-gi-ni wa-na-ga-la-hi-yu.

012642.english: He went away again the second time, and prayed, saying, O my Father, if this cup may not pass away from me, except I drink it, thy will be done.
012642.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎤᏪᏅᏎᎢ, ᏭᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏫᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎬᎩᎶᎯᏎᏗᏉ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎬᏂ ᏯᏆᏗᏔᎲ, ᏄᏍᏛ ᎭᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ.
012642.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no u-we-nv-se-i, wu-da-do-li-s-ta-ne-i, hi-a wi-nu-we-se-i; E-do-da, i-yu-no hi-a u-li-s-qui-di gv-gi-lo-hi-se-di-quo ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi, gv-ni ya-qua-di-ta-hv, nu-s-dv ha-da-nv-te-s-gv wi-ni-ga-li-s-da.

012643.english: And he came and found them asleep again: for their eyes were heavy.
012643.cherokee: ᏗᎤᎷᏨᏃ ᏚᏩᏛᎮ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎠᏂᎵᎾᎡᎢ, ᏗᏂᎦᏙᎵᏰᏃ ᏗᎦᎨᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᎢ.
012643.phonetic: Di-u-lu-tsv-no du-wa-dv-he ta-li-ne a-ni-li-na-e-i, di-ni-ga-do-li-ye-no di-ga-ge-di-yu ge-se-i.

012644.english: And he left them, and went away again, and prayed the third time, saying the same words.
012644.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᏚᏮᏕᏤ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢᏁ ᏭᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏫᏄᏪᏎᎢ.
012644.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no du-wv-de-tse a-le u-da-nv-se-i, a-le tso-i-ne wu-da-do-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi-ya wi-nu-we-se-i.

012645.english: Then cometh he to his disciples, and saith unto them, Sleep on now, and take your rest: behold, the hour is at hand, and the Son of man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.
012645.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏗᎤᎷᏨ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎠᏂᏅᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏥᎵᏅᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏯᏪᏐᎸᎦ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎢᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏗ, ᏴᏫᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎦᏡᏔᏅ ᎤᏂᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏕᎨᏥᏲᎯᏎᎸ.
012645.phonetic: Hna-quo-no di-u-lu-tsv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi a-ni-nv-i, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; Hna-quo i-tsi-li-nv-gi a-le i-tsi-ya-we-so-lv-ga; gv-ni-yu-quo i-yu ge-sv u-s-qua-lv-hi-di, yv-wi-no U-we-tsi a-ga-tlu-ta-nv u-ni-ne-gu-tsi-dv yv-wi de-ge-tsi-yo-hi-se-lv.

012646.english: Rise, let us be going: behold, he is at hand that doth betray me.
012646.cherokee: ᏗᏣᎴᎲᎦ!  ᎢᏓᎢᏎᏍᏗ!  ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏉ ᏓᏯᎢ ᎠᏆᏡᏗᏍᎩ.
012646.phonetic: Di-tsa-le-hv-ga!  i-da-i-se-s-di!  gv-ni-yu-quo a-quo da-ya-i a-qua-tlu-di-s-gi.

012647.english: And while he yet spake, lo, Judas, one of the twelve, came, and with him a great multitude with swords and staves, from the chief priests and elders of the people.
012647.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏧᏓᏏ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏘᏁᎲᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓ ᏗᏂᏁᎯ, ᏅᏓᎬᏂᏅᏏᏛ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏴᏫ.
012647.phonetic: A-si-quo-no ga-wo-ni-s-gv-i gv-ni-yu-quo Tsu-da-si a-si-yv-wi ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv u-lu-tsv-gi, a-le da-ti-ne-hv-gi u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi, a-ye-la-s-di--di-ga-nv-hi-dv a-le a-da di-ni-ne-hi, nv-da-gv-ni-nv-si-dv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-a-ne-lo-hi di-ni-la-wi-gi a-ne-hv yv-wi.

012648.english: Now he that betrayed him gave them a sign, saying, Whomsoever I shall kiss, that same is he: hold him fast.
012648.cherokee: ᎤᏡᏗᏍᎩᏃ ᏧᏃᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏳᏪᏒᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ; ᎩᎶ ᏥᏯᏚᏣᎳᏅᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᏕᏥᏂᏴᎲᎭ.
012648.phonetic: U-tlu-di-s-gi-no tsu-no-ne-lv-hi ge-se u-na-do-le-ho-hi-s-do-di hi-a i-yu-we-sv-hi ge-se-i; gi-lo tsi-ya-du-tsa-la-nv-ha na-s-gi ge-se-s-di, a-s-da-ya de-tsi-ni-yv-hv-ha.

012649.english: And forthwith he came to Jesus, and said, Hail, master; and kissed him.
012649.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏗᏳᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎦᏙᎬ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏙᎯᏱ ᏕᎾᏓᎪᏩᏛ, ᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᏣᎳᏅᎩ.
012649.phonetic: U-li-s-di-yu-no Tsi-sa ga-do-gv u-lu-tsv-gi, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Do-hi-yi de-na-da-go-wa-dv, S-gi-na-tla-i; a-le u-du-tsa-la-nv-gi.

012650.english: And Jesus said unto him, Friend, wherefore art thou come? Then came they, and laid hands on Jesus, and took him.
012650.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎩᎾᎵᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎥᎯᎷᎩ.  ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏂᎷᏨᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏕᎬᏩᏏᏔᏛᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᎬᏩᏂᏴᎲᎩ.
012650.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Gi-na-li-i, ga-do-no v-hi-lu-gi.  Hna-quo-no u-ni-lu-tsv-gi a-le de-gv-wa-si-ta-dv-gi Tsi-sa, gv-wa-ni-yv-hv-gi.

012651.english: And, behold, one of them which were with Jesus stretched out his hand, and drew his sword, and struck a servant of the high priest's, and smote off his ear.
012651.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎤᏌᎳᏓᏅᎩ ᎧᏃᎨᏂ ᎤᎸᎲᎩ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎷᏴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᏍᏔᏅᎩ.
012651.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo a-si-yv-wi Tsi-sa a-ne-hi u-sa-la-da-nv-gi ka-no-ge-ni u-lv-hv-gi a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv, a-le u-lu-yv u-gv-wi-yu-hi a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi u-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le u-li-s-de-s-ta-nv-gi.

012652.english: Then said Jesus unto him, Put up again thy sword into his place: for all they that take the sword shall perish with the sword.
012652.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᎯᎳᏓ ᏣᏤᎵ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ, ᏂᎦᏛᏰᏃ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
012652.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-la-di-s-di-yi tsi-hi-la-da tsa-tse-li a-ye-la-s-di-ga-nv-hi-dv, ni-ga-dv-ye-no a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv a-ni-yi-s-gi a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv tsu-ni-yo-hu-hi-s-do-di ge-se-s-di.

012653.english: Thinkest thou that I cannot now pray to my Father, and he shall presently give me more than twelve legions of angels?
012653.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏯᏓᏅᏖᎭ ᏰᎵ ᎦᏥᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏔᎳᏚᏉ ᎢᏳᎾᏓᏡᎩ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏱᏙᎬᎩᎧᏏ?
012653.phonetic: Tla-s-go ya-da-nv-te-ha ye-li ga-tsi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv E-do-da, gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv v-tla ta-la-du-quo i-yu-na-da-tlu-gi di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi yi-do-gv-gi-ka-si?

012654.english: But how then shall the scriptures be fulfilled, that thus it must be?
012654.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏯᏙᎯᏳᎲᎦ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ, ᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ?
012654.phonetic: A-se-no ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da ya-do-hi-yu-hv-ga nu-s-dv go-we-lv-i, a-se na-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di tsi-gi?

012655.english: In that same hour said Jesus to the multitudes, Are ye come out as against a thief with swords and staves for to take me? I sat daily with you teaching in the temple, and ye laid no hold on me.
012655.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ; ᏥᎪ ᎦᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᏲᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏥᎷᎩ ᏍᎩᏂᏴᎯᎦ, ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓ ᏗᏥᏁᎯ?  ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏗᏅᎩ ᏕᎦᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎩ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏱᏍᎩᏂᏱᏍᎨᎢ.
012655.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi u-ni-tsa-ti; Tsi-go ga-no-s-gi-s-gi tsi-tsi-yo-ho na-s-gi-ya i-tsi-lu-gi s-gi-ni-yv-hi-ga, a-ye-la-s-di-di-ga-nv-hi-dv a-le a-da di-tsi-ne-hi?  Ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv i-tsu-la-ha i-di-nv-gi de-ga-de-yo-hv-s-gv-gi u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, v-tla-no yi-s-gi-ni-yi-s-ge-i.

012656.english: But all this was done, that the scriptures of the prophets might be fulfilled. Then all the disciples forsook him, and fled.
012656.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏃᏪᎳᏅᎯ.  ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏩᏕᏨᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎵᏒᎩ.
012656.phonetic: A-se-no ni-ga-dv na-s-gi hi-a nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi u-do-hi-yu-di-yi a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi u-no-we-la-nv-hi.  Hna-quo-no ni-ga-dv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi gv-wa-de-tsv-gi a-le u-na-li-sv-gi.

012657.english: And they that had laid hold on Jesus led him away to Caiaphas the high priest, where the scribes and the elders were assembled.
012657.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏂᏂᏴᏛ ᎧᏯᏉᎢ ᏭᎾᏘᏅᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ, ᎾᎿᎭᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ ᏓᏂᎳᏫᎥᎢ.
012657.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ni-ni-yv-dv ka-ya-quo-i wu-na-ti-nv-s-ta-nv-gi na-s-gi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi, na-hna di-no-we-li-s-gi a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi da-ni-la-wi-v-i.

012658.english: But Peter followed him afar off unto the high priest's palace, and went in, and sat with the servants, to see the end.
012658.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎ Ꭸ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏣᎢᏎ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏗᎦᏁᎸ ᎬᏗᏍᎩ, ᎤᏴᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᏂᏁᎢ, ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎤᏰᎸᏎ ᏩᎵᏍᏆᏗᎯᎲᎢ.
012658.phonetic: Qui-da-no u-s-da-wa-dv-se ge i-yv-dv tsa-i-se nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi di-ga-ne-lv gv-di-s-gi, u-yv-le-i, a-le ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di i-tsu-la-ha a-ni-ne-i, u-go-wa-dv-di-yi u-ye-lv-se wa-li-s-qua-di-hi-hv-i.

012659.english: Now the chief priests, and elders, and all the council, sought false witness against Jesus, to put him to death;
012659.cherokee: ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏛᏐᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ ᎤᏂᏲᎴ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎸᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏡᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎨᎢ;
012659.phonetic: Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le tsu-na-dv-so-nv-hi a-le ni-ga-dv di-ni-la-wi-gi u-ni-yo-le ga-ye-go-gi u-ni-no-he-lv-hi Tsi-sa u-tlu-di-s-gi, na-s-gi u-ni-hi-s-di-yi u-na-du-li-s-ge-i;

012660.english: But found none: yea, though many false witnesses came, yet found they none. At the last came two false witnesses,
012660.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᎾᏠᏤᏉ; ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎾᏄᎪᏤᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᎾᏠᏤᏉ.  ᎣᏂᏱᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ;
012660.phonetic: A-se-no u-na-tlo-tse-quo; u-ni-tsa-te-s-gi-ni-no-nv ga-ye-go-gi a-ni-no-he-s-gi u-ni-na-nu-go-tse-i, a-se-no u-na-tlo-tse-quo.  O-ni-yi-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-ni-ta-li ga-ye-go-gi a-ni-no-he-s-gi u-ni-lu-tse-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i;

012661.english: And said, This fellow said, I am able to destroy the temple of God, and to build it in three days.
012661.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏒᎩ; ᏰᎵᏉ ᏱᏥᏲᏍᏓ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏦᎢᏉᏃ ᏧᏙᏓᏆᏛ [ᏔᎵᏁ] ᏴᎦᏁᏍᎬᎵ.
012661.phonetic: Hi-a ni-du-we-sv-gi; Ye-li-quo yi-tsi-yo-s-da U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, tso-i-quo-no tsu-do-da-qua-dv [ta-li-ne] yv-ga-ne-s-gv-li.

012662.english: And the high priest arose, and said unto him, Answerest thou nothing? what is it which these witness against thee?
012662.cherokee: ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏚᎴᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏁᎦ?  ᎦᏙ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᏣᏂᏃᎮᎭ ᏥᎨᏣᏡᏗᎭ?
012662.phonetic: Nu-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi du-le-ne-i, hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Tla-s-go yi-ne-ga?  Ga-do hi-a a-ni-ga-ta-hv tsa-ni-no-he-ha tsi-ge-tsa-tlu-di-ha?

012663.english: But Jesus held his peace. And the high priest answered and said unto him, I adjure thee by the living God, that thou tell us whether thou be the Christ, the Son of God.
012663.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎡᎳᏪᏱᏉ ᎨᏎᎢ.  ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎢᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎬᎳᏲᏏ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎯᏁᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ, ᏥᎪ ᏂᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ?
012663.phonetic: A-se-no Tsi-sa e-la-we-yi-quo ge-se-i.  Nu-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi i-u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Gv-la-yo-si U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-ni-dv hi-ne-i-s-do-di-yi, s-gi-no-hv-si, tsi-go ni-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi?

012664.english: Jesus saith unto him, Thou hast said: nevertheless I say unto you, Hereafter shall ye see the Son of man sitting on the right hand of power, and coming in the clouds of heaven.
012664.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏰᎵ ᏂᏫ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏓᏰᏥᎪᎢ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎤᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎤᏬᎴᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᎢᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎶᎩᎸ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ.
012664.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ye-li ni-wi.  A-se-no hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; i-lv-hi-yu da-ye-tsi-go-i yv-wi U-we-tsi a-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv u-li-ni-gv-gv u-wo-le-s-di, a-le tsa-i-se-s-di u-lo-gi-lv ga-lv-lo-i.

012665.english: Then the high priest rent his clothes, saying, He hath spoken blasphemy; what further need have we of witnesses? behold, now ye have heard his blasphemy.
012665.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏚᏄᏩᎥ ᏚᏪᏣᎦᎸᎮᎢ; ᎠᏐᏢᎢᏍᏓ, ᎤᏛᏁᎢ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏏ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎯ ᏯᏂᏃᎮᎭ?  ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏣᏛᎬᎦ ᎠᏐᏢᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
012665.phonetic: Hna-quo-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi du-nu-wa-v du-we-tsa-ga-lv-he-i; A-so-tlv-i-s-da, u-dv-ne-i; ga-do-no a-si a-ni-ga-ta-hi ya-ni-no-he-ha?  Gv-ni-yu-quo hna-quo i-tsa-dv-gv-ga a-so-tlv-i-s-di-s-gv-i.

012666.english: What think ye? They answered and said, He is guilty of death.
012666.cherokee: ᎦᏙ ᎢᏤᎵᎭ?  ᎤᏂᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᏰᎵᏉ ᎬᏩᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ.
012666.phonetic: Ga-do i-tse-li-ha?  U-ni-ne-tsv-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Ye-li-quo gv-wa-yo-hu-hi-s-di.

012667.english: Then did they spit in his face, and buffeted him; and others smote him with the palms of their hands,
012667.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎧᏛ ᏚᎾᎵᏥᏍᏇᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏈᏅ ᏕᎬᏩᎾᏍᏗᏍᎨᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᏧᏃᏰᏂ ᏕᎬᏩᎾᏍᏗᏍᎨᎢ,
012667.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-ka-dv du-na-li-tsi-s-que-i, a-le a-s-qui-nv de-gv-wa-na-s-di-s-ge-i a-le a-ni-so-i tsu-no-ye-ni de-gv-wa-na-s-di-s-ge-i,

012668.english: Saying, Prophesy unto us, thou Christ, Who is he that smote thee?
012668.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ; ᏍᎩᏯᏙᎴᎣᎯᏏ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎦᎪ ᏥᏨᏂᎦ?
012668.phonetic: Hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i; S-gi-ya-do-le-o-hi-si, Ga-lo-ne-dv, Ga-go tsi-tsv-ni-ga?

012669.english: Now Peter sat without in the palace: and a damsel came unto him, saying, Thou also wast with Jesus of Galilee.
012669.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎤᏬᎴ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎤᎷᏤᎴᏃ ᎠᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏍᏕᏙᎲᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎡᎯ.
012669.phonetic: Qui-da-no u-wo-le u-dla-nv-dv-i, u-lu-tse-le-no a-dv hi-a nu-we-se-i; Ni-hi na-s-quo s-de-do-hv-gi Tsi-sa Ge-li-li e-hi.

012670.english: But he denied before them all, saying, I know not what thou sayest.
012670.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᎤᏓᏱᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏂᏪᏍᎬᎢ.
012670.phonetic: A-se-no ni-ga-dv a-ni-ga-ta-hv u-da-yi-le-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; V-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha ni-we-s-gv-i.

012671.english: And when he was gone out into the porch, another maid saw him, and said unto them that were there, This fellow was also with Jesus of Nazareth.
012671.cherokee: ᏙᏱᏢᏃ ᏭᎶᏒ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᎪᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᏙᎯ; ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ ᏓᏁᏙᎲᎩ.
012671.phonetic: Do-yi-tlv-no wu-lo-sv nv-wa-da-le u-go-he-i, a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le na-hna a-ne-do-hi; Na-s-quo hi-a Tsi-sa Na-se-li-di e-hi da-ne-do-hv-gi.

012672.english: And again he denied with an oath, I do not know the man.
012672.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎤᏓᏱᎴᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏔᏁᎢ; Ꮭ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ Ꮎ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎤᏛᏁᎢ.
012672.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no u-da-yi-le-i, u-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-i-s-ta-ne-i; tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha na a-s-ga-ya, u-dv-ne-i.

012673.english: And after a while came unto him they that stood by, and said to Peter, Surely thou also art one of them; for thy speech bewrayeth thee.
012673.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏱᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎴ ᎾᎥ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴ ᏈᏓ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᏙᎸᎯ, ᎯᏬᏂᏍᎬᏰᏃ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏁᎭ.
012673.phonetic: Go-hi-yi-no i-yv-dv gv-wa-lu-tse-le na-v a-ni-do-na-i, hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le Qui-da; U-do-hi-yu-hi na-s-quo ni-hi i-tse-do-lv-hi, hi-wo-ni-s-gv-ye-no gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-ne-ha.

012674.english: Then began he to curse and to swear, saying, I know not the man. And immediately the cock crew.
012674.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎤᏍᎩᏅᏕᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏔᏁᎢ; Ꮭ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ Ꮎ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎤᏛᏁᎢ; ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏣᏔᎦ ᎤᏴᎳᏎᎢ.
012674.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-le-nv-he u-s-gi-nv-de-i, a-le u-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-i-s-ta-ne-i; Tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha na a-s-ga-ya, u-dv-ne-i; gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv tsa-ta-ga u-yv-la-se-i.

012675.english: And Peter remembered the word of Jesus, which said unto him, Before the cock crow, thou shalt deny me thrice. And he went out, and wept bitterly.
012675.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎤᏅᏓᏕ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏏ ᏣᏔᎦ ᎾᏂᏴᎬᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏦᎢ ᏅᏓᏍᏆᏓᏱᎵ.  ᎤᏄᎪᏨᏃ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᏫᏚᏠᏱᎴᎢ.
012675.phonetic: Qui-da-no u-nv-da-de Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv-hi, hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-le-i; A-si tsa-ta-ga na-ni-yv-gv-na ge-se-s-di tso-i nv-da-s-qua-da-yi-li.  U-nu-go-tsv-no e-hi-s-di wi-du-tlo-yi-le-i.

012701.english: When the morning was come, all the chief priests and elders of the people took counsel against Jesus to put him to death:
012701.cherokee: ᏑᎾᎴᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎠᏫ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎴ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
012701.phonetic: Su-na-le-no nu-li-s-ta-nv, ni-ga-dv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi a-ne-hv a-wi u-ni-no-he-le i-yu-na-dv-ne-di-yi Tsi-sa u-ni-hi-s-di-yi.

012702.english: And when they had bound him, they led him away, and delivered him to Pontius Pilate the governor.
012702.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎾᎸᎸ ᎤᏁᎵᏌᎾᏫᏛᎮᎢ, ᏆᏂᏛ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏫᏚᏂᏲᎯᏎᎴᎢ.
012702.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-na-lv-lv u-ne-li-sa-na-wi-dv-he-i, Qua-ni-dv Qua-le-di u-gv-wi-yu-hi wi-du-ni-yo-hi-se-le-i.

012703.english: Then Judas, which had betrayed him, when he saw that he was condemned, repented himself, and brought again the thirty pieces of silver to the chief priests and elders,
012703.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏧᏓᏏ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎶᏄᎮᎸᎯ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᏓᎫᎪᏓᏁᎸᎢ ᎤᏁᏟᏴᏎ ᎤᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏛᏐᏅᎯ ᏙᎤᏲᎮᎴ ᏦᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎠᏰᎵ-ᎠᏕᎸ ᏧᎾᎬᏩᎶᏗ,
012703.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsu-da-si na-s-gi u-lo-nu-he-lv-hi u-do-le-ho-sv da-gu-go-da-ne-lv-i u-ne-tli-yv-se u-da-nv-dv-i, a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le tsu-na-dv-so-nv-hi do-u-yo-he-le tso-a-s-go-hi a-ye-li--a-de-lv tsu-na-gv-wa-lo-di,

012704.english: Saying, I have sinned in that I have betrayed the innocent blood. And they said, What is that to us? see thou to that.
012704.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏥᏍᎦᏅᎩ ᏄᏍᎦᏅᏨᎾ ᎩᎬ ᏥᎦᏡᏓ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎦᏙ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎬᏙᏗ?  ᏨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ.
012704.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-i; tsi-s-ga-nv-gi nu-s-ga-nv-tsv-na gi-gv tsi-ga-tlu-da.  Hi-a-no nu-ni-we-se-i; Ga-do na-s-gi a-yv o-gv-do-di?  Tsv-sv na-s-gi di-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-si.

012705.english: And he cast down the pieces of silver in the temple, and departed, and went and hanged himself.
012705.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏚᏗᏅ ᎠᏕᎸ ᎾᎿᎭᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏄᎪᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏭᎶᏒ, ᎤᏩᏒ ᏭᏓᏛᏁᎢ.
012705.phonetic: A-le du-di-nv a-de-lv na-hna di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le u-nu-go-tse-i, a-le i-yv-dv wu-lo-sv, u-wa-sv wu-da-dv-ne-i.

012706.english: And the chief priests took the silver pieces, and said, It is not lawful for to put them into the treasury, because it is the price of blood.
012706.cherokee: ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᏚᏂᎩᏒ ᎠᏕᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏱᎦᎩ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏗᏗᏱ ᏱᏗᏗᎲᏍᎦ, ᎩᎬᏰᏃ ᏧᎬᏩᎳᏅᎯ.
012706.phonetic: Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi du-ni-gi-sv a-de-lv hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; v-tla du-yu-go-dv yi-ga-gi a-de-lv--di-di-yi yi-di-di-hv-s-ga, gi-gv-ye-no tsu-gv-wa-la-nv-hi.

012707.english: And they took counsel, and bought with them the potter's field, to bury strangers in.
012707.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎸᏃ, ᎤᏂᏩᎯᏍᏔᏁ ᎥᏘ ᏗᎪᏢᏍᎩ ᎤᎶᎨᏒᎢ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᏙᎯ ᏗᎨᏥᏂᏐᏗᏱ.
012707.phonetic: U-ni-no-he-lv-no, u-ni-wa-hi-s-ta-ne v-ti di-go-tlv-s-gi u-lo-ge-sv-i na-hna a-ne-do-hi di-ge-tsi-ni-so-di-yi.

012708.english: Wherefore that field was called, The field of blood, unto this day.
012708.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏠᎨᏏ ᎩᎬ ᎤᎶᎨᏒ ᎠᏃᏎᎭ ᎪᎯ ᏥᎩ.
012708.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-gi tlo-ge-si gi-gv u-lo-ge-sv a-no-se-ha go-hi tsi-gi.

012709.english: Then was fulfilled that which was spoken by Jeremy the prophet, saying, And they took the thirty pieces of silver, the price of him that was valued, whom they of the children of Israel did value;
012709.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏁ ᏧᏁᏤ ᏤᎵᎹᏯ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᎩᏒᎩ ᏦᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎠᏰᎵ-ᎠᏕᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᎬᏩᏔᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏥᎬᏩᎶᏔᏅᎯ, ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏧᏂᎬᏩᎶᏔᏅᎯ,
012709.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-do-hi-yu-ne tsu-ne-tse Tse-li-ma-ya a-do-le-ho-s-gi, hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-i; A-le du-ni-gi-sv-gi tso-a-s-go-hi a-ye-li--a-de-lv na-s-gi na tsu-gv-wa-ta-nv-hi, na-s-gi tsa-tsi-gv-wa-lo-ta-nv-hi, I-si-li tsu-we-tsi tsu-ni-gv-wa-lo-ta-nv-hi,

012710.english: And gave them for the potter's field, as the Lord appointed me.
012710.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏩᎯᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎥᏘ ᏗᎪᏢᏍᎩ ᎤᎶᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎠᏇᏲᏅᎢ.
012710.phonetic: A-le u-ni-wa-hi-s-ta-nv-gi v-ti di-go-tlv-s-gi u-lo-ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya Yi-ho-wa a-que-yo-nv-i.

012711.english: And Jesus stood before the governor: and the governor asked him, saying, Art thou the King of the Jews? And Jesus said unto him, Thou sayest.
012711.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎦᏙᎨ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏬᎸᎢ.  ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎤᏛᏛᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏂᎯᏍᎪ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ?  ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏰᎵᏂᏫ.
012711.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no ga-do-ge i-gv-yi-di-tlv u-gv-wi-yu-hi u-wo-lv-i.  U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no u-dv-dv-ne-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; ni-hi-s-go Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga?  Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ye-li-ni-wi.

012712.english: And when he was accused of the chief priests and elders, he answered nothing.
012712.cherokee: ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ ᎬᏩᏱᎵᏙᎸ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏁᏤᎢ.
012712.phonetic: Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi gv-wa-yi-li-do-lv v-tla yu-ne-tse-i.

012713.english: Then said Pilate unto him, Hearest thou not how many things they witness against thee?
012713.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᏯᏛᎩᎭ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᏅᏁᎲ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎯ ᎨᏣᏡᏗᏍᎬᎢ?
012713.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qua-le-di hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Tla-s-go ya-dv-gi-ha ni-ga-v gv-ni-ge-sv na-nv-ne-hv a-ni-ga-ta-hi ge-tsa-tlu-di-s-gv-i?

012714.english: And he answered him to never a word; insomuch that the governor marvelled greatly.
012714.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉᎤᏅ ᏱᏄᏁᏤᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎢ.
012714.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla sa-quo-u-nv yi-nu-ne-tse-i, na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tsa-ti u-s-qua-ni-go-se-i.

012715.english: Now at that feast the governor was wont to release unto the people a prisoner, whom they would.
012715.cherokee: ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎢ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᏲᎯᏎᏗ ᎨᏐ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏴᎩ, ᎯᎠᏉ ᎠᏁᎳ ᏴᏫ.
012715.phonetic: Di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi-no ge-sv i-yu-i u-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-yo-hi-se-di ge-so sa-quo a-yv-gi, hi-a-quo a-ne-la yv-wi.

012716.english: And they had then a notable prisoner, called Barabbas.
012716.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᏗᎦᏃᏣᎵ ᎠᏴᎩ ᎤᏂᎧᎮ ᏆᎳᏆ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ.
012716.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no di-ga-no-tsa-li a-yv-gi u-ni-ka-he Qua-la-qua tsu-do-i-dv.

012717.english: Therefore when they were gathered together, Pilate said unto them, Whom will ye that I release unto you? Barabbas, or Jesus which is called Christ?
012717.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏚᏂᎳᏫᏨ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎦᎪ ᎢᏣᏚᎵ ᏗᏨᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ?  ᏆᎳᏆᏍᎪ?  ᏥᏌᎨ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏣᏃᏎᎰᎢ?
012717.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hna-quo du-ni-la-wi-tsv Qua-le-di hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; Ga-go i-tsa-du-li di-tsv-yo-hi-se-di-yi?  Qua-la-qua-s-go?  Tsi-sa-ge Ga-lo-ne-dv tsa-no-se-ho-i?

012718.english: For he knew that for envy they had delivered him.
